name: Team Voter Action Project
subject: The threat of the SAVE Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=RtymrV1XyFdopiZ0SnsGzzvqiFF0ZxNlDybhpEz967I=&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=RtymrV1XyFdopiZ0SnsGzzvqiFF0ZxNlDybhpEz967I=&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=RtymrV1XyFdopiZ0SnsGzzvqiFF0ZxNlDybhpEz967I=&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=RtymrV1XyFdopiZ0SnsGzzvqiFF0ZxNlDybhpEz967I=&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=RtymrV1XyFdopiZ0SnsGzzvqiFF0ZxNlDybhpEz967I=&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=AetzfArzITglOnregAxqkrua3ezH2E/RfUU9Fxot+mRKJ9+q7C7L8Yz4ozwch6jDa9CURBW147m7xOB2a5CzqL/YIVdUP8YFKTeM3Hb+prc=]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=1Ebm06n%2FmCoui3VG1n316vH%2FvIrJONZI8nxrh7nj1qftZ3bUs5C24LbEjLoiab7qsygg4VyNhNCQrcNahHc%2FnMIA2BI2NbxLA7E%2B4HLjOOeOl%2FjsQBa%2Bc5Ti3hAdq2%2B%2FHz5JnTWZctr1sE7xMLzBunFDU4afiZC2RelDV5CCwNexRSzmYMrorUPyu9rhU6rYjIT8icxQk13VxhWNUoS1Z7flxeuhVZrIGl7a3Vq%2BX25B7t5CcDiiH20SxTkwejweCbiruKhP8IcXfEamZTVFQXj%2FZ0RI0%2FFq57ceKAlSvna%2FdfFAEVfqThlkhaT0O8g4cJYQnJSsXooD2cGHVZgr0MQpXMiSXbkk%2F6yh6b8sZYyqHXuGBNTuptLuh7lbMFrmwoQ8X8grPZYBSQiH7ZNTSo%2FobFymElYqxJASTot9FjQ%3D .

name: Deb
subject: a broken leg and three options
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a bit of a tumble.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3291%2E400544%2EfIXqt6)
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a _bit_ of a tumble.
I was hiking up the side of a mountain when I slipped on a loose rock. It was a total freak accident — I couldn’t believe it! But there I was, covered in dirt with a pain in my leg and ankle and three options:
* Get airlifted down in a helicopter,
* take eight National Park staff away from their jobs to carry me down,
* or hike down myself.

**I chose to walk back down the mountain** because I couldn’t stomach the idea of taking our National Park staff away from their work, even for a few hours. It turns out I hiked down all that way with a broken leg. I’ll be honest, I didn’t think my leg was actually broken at the time.
The federal workers who care for our public lands have absolutely crucial jobs to do. They preserve and protect our public lands for millions of visitors each year and for future generations. **Donald Trump has made it clear he intends to auction off our lands to extractive industries like Big Oil. They’ve attempted to fire our dedicated National Parks and National Forests workers en masse.**
As Governor of New Mexico, I will be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests. I will always stand up for the dedicated workers who serve our communities. **[If you’re with me, will you donate $5 to support our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250719_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250719-3291&refcode2=3291_400544_fIXqt6&akid=3291%2E400544%2EfIXqt6)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250719_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250719-3291&refcode2=3291_400544_fIXqt6&akid=3291%2E400544%2EfIXqt6)**
As a former Secretary of the Interior, it breaks my heart to see what this administration is doing to exploit our lands and those who care for them.
**But just like the day I chose to hike down the mountain on my broken leg, I am determined to stand up and do right by the workers who proudly serve our nation.**
**[New Mexicans need a governor who isn’t afraid of the tough fights that lie ahead. I can’t win this campaign without you, so please chip in $5 if you can afford it today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250719_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250719-3291&refcode2=3291_400544_fIXqt6&akid=3291%2E400544%2EfIXqt6)**
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. In case you’re wondering, not even a broken left fibula could keep me away from our beautiful parks for long. Here’s a photo of me from one of my favorite places to visit, Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250719_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250719-3291&refcode2=3291_400544_fIXqt6&akid=3291%2E400544%2EfIXqt6)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250719-2&t=2&refcode2=3291_400544_fIXqt6&akid=3291%2E400544%2EfIXqt6)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3291%2E400544%2EfIXqt6)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3291%2E400544%2EfIXqt6)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

subject: Sell us out? We send you packing!!
body:
Tom Cotton (Arkansas) and Joni Ernst (Iowa) sold us out — they promised to protect Medicaid, then voted to gut it and shower billionaires with tax breaks.
Now they want another six years in power? Not a chance.
We’re building the war chest to defeat them and elect Democrats who will actually fight for working families. Chip in now to help flip these seats and hold the line in 2026! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cottonernst?refcode=071925_4]
Tom Cotton and Joni Ernst.
They promised they’d never gut Medicaid. They said they’d protect working families and the most vulnerable.
They lied.
When Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” came up, they voted to slash Medicaid and hand billionaires a windfall.
Now they want six more years in the Senate?!?
Not on our watch.
They're both up for re-election next year, and we're building a war chest starting NOW to suppor the Democrats who run against these MAGA sellouts. If you're ready to fight back and protect working families, chip in to help flip these seats in 2026! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cottonernst?refcode=071925_4]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z32nd3ohom7f373tcop8ks4gqeehbo75rqtq7n48_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor1c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu3fppgi509mrd09mtd1s8uk6vqilfjskqtj00fo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor1c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2fondrdmtgd5i3o4od33cs4qv26shdai90r0plo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor1c1h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9gfvvq8dqbock79997cbvjs1o4eabkt3sgsl638_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor1c1h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood corruption
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfkvkbsoaie51qll6o68lse8h4kk93b80jsdph2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zglglghe4aqi073l8ssigpn8samrpf1g6dinnkd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z48p1023pmil4qlk4j51t45j7a6cdetnu60g9628_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqtlnvvn0g762pqjk8qvccu84051sq2v17utqffo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpgk4r77aj4u626glq29v5l7ua3d7k6aubujp4pg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zms4a85ktp6k01elu7da2jta0906iqsjf90tnn38_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zftp59ihehl540gghgnhuvspvjf5o2941caf794g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrb32rr84790of5fbrmnuodq7katdqb3v89qf8oo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrlbec1nb7o0bbkcgv3n32gon2n3tdbr3u7tcsto_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2qfvqegpp7rg8lnei5v8a5a08easrmotjisfq9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf6oo3rt1g3ntujm318f77nscnekfmf2cioik6a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor5clh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

---

name: Jake Warner
subject: Can CO Censor Counselors?
body:
This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg831k8ujs4bnenl5rg8b54t29m0bkt7th44msq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor0s3h2bs)
Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bars Kaley from having conversations that her clients want to have to help them achieve their goals.

Kaley already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. And we're excited the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear this case.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

[https://adflegal.org/support/chiles-case-statement/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0eus6ig5raegmu71kda42913f661dpg7gc89t20_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor0s3h2bs) For freedom, **Jake Warner** Senior Counsel

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans

name: First Look News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on Why We Should Study War
body:
Tech is moving fast. Don’t get left behind. Get your early copy of the Stanford Emerging Tech Review now.

# The Stanford Emerging Tech Review 2025
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsikmfaurtjh89f786guber8p9c3vp7orvr0d3b8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor0sjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Wars begin. Freedoms fade. Hard-won peace unravels.

The question is why.

One answer: we've stopped studying military history. And when that knowledge fades, so does our ability to understand today's conflicts--or anticipate tomorrow's.
---
|
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0174t9lcp1o3fhons48pip0st4l0sqitcvt8cvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor0sjh2bs)
---
| | Victor Davis Hanson believes this is no small matter.

In a new ebook from the Hoover Institution, _Why We Should Study War_ , Hanson examines what military history reveals about human nature, conflict, and the cost of preserving peace. His analysis draws on historical case studies and connects them to the challenges facing the world today.

Without knowledge of military history, we risk:
* Repeating past mistakes
* Making uninformed decisions about current and future conflicts
* Undervaluing the sacrifices made for our freedoms

I'd like to share this ebook with you--which includes Hanson's core arguments for studying war along with his answers to key questions about deterrence, WWII, and essential military history reading.

Inside, you'll discover:
* How studying war is, in essence, an attempt to prevent it
* Why human nature and the patterns of conflict remain constant across time
* What battles from Shiloh to Verdun to Okinawa teach us about sacrifice
* How military history provides moral education about the cost of freedom
Why the United States--"born through war, reunited by war, and saved from destruction by war"--must never forget this knowledge
* Understanding the past is essential so we can engage more seriously with the present.

I hope this material deepens your appreciation for military history--and informs how you think about peace, conflict, and public responsibility.

You can request your free copy using the link below:
[https://resources.hoover.org/why-we-should-study-war](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zifhttn1ltn8gvfr01696rpp4g1kgjulofrqo4bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g6aor0sjh2bs) Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA
---
---

name: Jake Warner
subject: Can CO Censor Counselors?
body:
This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgr2ai6rhkgqae9emtdda0mu3lcavjnmdimv452g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj1chh2bs)
Dear Fellow American, Trauma. Addiction. Depression. Personality disorders.

This world is full of people who need a trusted person to guide them through their mental health issues.

Kaley Chiles is a licensed counselor and committed Christian. Many of Kaley's clients come to her because they share her Christian worldview and faith-based values.

But Colorado law bars Kaley from having conversations that her clients want to have to help them achieve their goals.

Kaley already had to start censoring herself to avoid potential fines of $5,000 for each offense and even the loss of her license.

This law violates freedom of speech. The government has no business censoring conversations between clients and counselors.

We are working with Kaley and other counselors to stop this government censorship. And we're excited the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear this case.

Will you stand with Kaley?

Click this link to stand with Kaley Chiles and her constitutional right to speak with clients about their shared faith-based values.

[https://adflegal.org/support/chiles-case-statement/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4gdmikh6lq03cvl0hmhuov89j4nc234j7doshkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj1chh2bs) For freedom, **Jake Warner** Senior Counsel

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3rr31jsokb62u2g3ocqcl0jd5tmvp4hrjshhl7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj5cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znjkngi1lkdbgphc064ucvm7nlaq7urfipjfk3ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj5cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq103lhotvgb4a8tp54qv28mjlhgog9l8ihs0o50_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj5cdh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za991qotqmrfsf3ilt0n3ttsbo4pid2plqoucb20_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj5cdh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Thank you for your support. Warm Regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: American Action News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on Why We Should Study War
body:
Tech is moving fast. Don’t get left behind. Get your early copy of the Stanford Emerging Tech Review now.

# The Stanford Emerging Tech Review 2025
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1v5l6sm5i0l7081nt481tt4l4u4gfovmvoov1b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj5c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Wars begin. Freedoms fade. Hard-won peace unravels.

The question is why.

One answer: we've stopped studying military history. And when that knowledge fades, so does our ability to understand today's conflicts--or anticipate tomorrow's.
---
|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqgmqd7tnv0nir7revc198dkmntfgietb73u6fm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj5c1h2bs)
---
| | Victor Davis Hanson believes this is no small matter.

In a new ebook from the Hoover Institution, _Why We Should Study War_ , Hanson examines what military history reveals about human nature, conflict, and the cost of preserving peace. His analysis draws on historical case studies and connects them to the challenges facing the world today.

Without knowledge of military history, we risk:
* Repeating past mistakes
* Making uninformed decisions about current and future conflicts
* Undervaluing the sacrifices made for our freedoms

I'd like to share this ebook with you--which includes Hanson's core arguments for studying war along with his answers to key questions about deterrence, WWII, and essential military history reading.

Inside, you'll discover:
* How studying war is, in essence, an attempt to prevent it
* Why human nature and the patterns of conflict remain constant across time
* What battles from Shiloh to Verdun to Okinawa teach us about sacrifice
* How military history provides moral education about the cost of freedom
Why the United States--"born through war, reunited by war, and saved from destruction by war"--must never forget this knowledge
* Understanding the past is essential so we can engage more seriously with the present.

I hope this material deepens your appreciation for military history--and informs how you think about peace, conflict, and public responsibility.

You can request your free copy using the link below:
[https://resources.hoover.org/why-we-should-study-war](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0plt8007oc23d8pna0hobt908n59cvs63o0paeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1g69oj5c1h2bs) Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA
---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: I refuse to back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
There are so many fantastic patriots in our Commonwealth; folks from all different walks of life and from every corner of Virginia.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9uhlnrn6t14ommqa414ttg16198vqrhubh776fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i60p36cph2bs) [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5sc0f80oetpjjm9okpur8hpuuf5ccqe5i124qv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i60p36cph2bs) Friend - this is how we win.
There are so many fantastic patriots in our Commonwealth; folks from all different walks of life and from every corner of Virginia. Common-sense conservatives are all standing together right now to ensure we win this race.
We may not all look the same, but we all have this in common: we'll do whatever it takes to build a brighter future here in Virginia for us, children, and neighbors!
Back in 2021, Governor Youngkin, AG Miyares, and I gave everything we had to winning in a tough and crucial battle. With support from dedicated conservatives like you, we won that race.
It was a tipping point for our Commonwealth. We had a choice to follow the most radical wing of the Demcorat party down a path of irreversible socialism and DEI practices or to choose to build our Commonwealth into the best version it can be. Virginians chose freedom, education, and prosperity then and we've been so much better off because of it.
Now, we're facing another tipping point. If we do not stand together just as we did four years ago, my radical Democrat opponent will win this CRITICAL race and send Virignia into a socialist tailspin!
I will not let a dishonest, radical Democrat like Abigail Spanberger undo all of the work that Governor Youngkin and I have done to protect and build up Virginia!
I'm 100% committed to winning and keeping our Commonwealth red, Friend. I'm sure you don't want to see a radical Leftist take control of our home. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This moment won’t last forever... it’s time to go all in
body:
Something is shifting -- and fast

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhn62ji65loj99ur5lf10fpvq3cavkgqtq7v54v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i66ob1cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
If you've ever wondered whether we can actually win this fight for the soul of our great nation...Let me give you the proof.We're seeing crowds packing every campus -- not in protest, not in outrage -- but in patriotic celebration.These kids chant _" USA!"_ They raise their hands to ask what they can do for their country.And for the first time in years... **Young Americans are PROUD to be American again.**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm7tcg9c4gajt4tnnq1fcqaac7qv2nrjkag7i3go_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i66ob1cdh2bs)
---
But here's what the fake news media won't tell you: _This isn 't happening by accident..._**It 's happening because grassroots patriots like YOU are making it happen.** Because YOU are helping Turning Point USA show up, speak boldly, and shatter the narrative that the LEFT owns our youngest generations... and America's future.Friend, we're just getting started...We are witnessing a moment that NO ONE ever thought was possible:🔥 Students standing for FAITH, FAMILY, and FREEDOM
🔥 Crowds overflowing campuses - even in deep "Blue" states
🔥 Gen Z waking up and LOVING this country again**We 've sparked a wildfire. A REVOLUTION.**But now we have to keep it burning. _And that 's why I'm writing to you today._If we don't seize this moment... If we don't push harder, move faster, reach more campuses... _The Left will try to take it all back._ They're regrouping. Retooling. Pouring money into influence and indoctrination.But we have something they don't...**We have the truth. We have the students. And we have YOU.**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp0gd9bhvqpusd0nrc00fgn6s3ur5jlksjv2r4fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i66ob1cdh2bs)
---
_That 's why I have to ask, Friend: Will you make your first gift to Turning Point USA today?_**Your gift will help us:** ✅ Go BIGGER with our campus tours
✅ Train thousands of bold student leaders
✅ Take the fight directly to the Left's strongholds
✅ Make Gen Z **Gen FREE** -- the most PATRIOTIC generation in American history **And when you join our mission today, I 'll send you a limited-edition "47" hat -- the same one students are BEGGING for on campus -- as my personal thank-you.**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**Claim Your "47" Hat**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh1uq0r5of13m3kia54ogiu1nkhe9p70fc1k7bv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i66ob1cdh2bs)
---
This isn't just about watching history. It's about making it.And when you give, you won't just be supporting a movement -- you'll be helping us write the next chapter of American greatness. Let's do this. Together.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmjnijgkqfuj80a9eeq0hdcqiakh9g67bie7htao_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i66ob1cdh2bs)
---
**P.S.** The next generation is CHOOSING America. Let's make sure they never look back. This is our opportunity to take our country's future back from the Left and DEFEAT them in the culture war for good.**[Make your most generous gift to Turning Point USA, and I will send you a limited edition"47" hat as my personal thank you for joining the fight.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuj0t2qpo8c4ahhl0aijsrejcfeeqqib1bijhgvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i66ob1cdh2bs)**
---

**Claim Your "47" Hat**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8m2ecg32rqqb2kd4ki9hjl3u7lgl4li36sk3kd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c1i66ob1cdh2bs)

| | Dear Friend,

Wars begin. Freedoms fade. Hard-won peace unravels.

The question is why.

One answer: we've stopped studying military history. And when that knowledge fades, so does our ability to understand today's conflicts--or anticipate tomorrow's.
---
|
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PR61G2Dre6gTz8D-pMyx4w~~/AARclBA~/PbPuYtwNbBlF3h6jvIkdqGfDVaX0MsNRg76KbNoTlR5CZeXnJjRqYLHOwtkUB2CbXFo7zo-Uk0Hr5w7g0oicaoZK2RFQWlVuRmftu6__UxrI8o2fzfm3o_7vExcmWQMxHbRVkDfdrqjPOaJp2eGHs9bZrzXocl_xMg4SWna-Q7KuectzD50I9VNQewdoGi2BSP3xgfhXLEhyWZI19GYfDqFz_J3OZmzDlSMauCj04qzzbGbwE_UCOzYvjPjQrOGeXtUml7gMyFinCcpVOMQo96v2Y-MGLZ7SynkXSj8Mais~)
---
| | Victor Davis Hanson believes this is no small matter.

In a new ebook from the Hoover Institution, _Why We Should Study War_ , Hanson examines what military history reveals about human nature, conflict, and the cost of preserving peace. His analysis draws on historical case studies and connects them to the challenges facing the world today.

Without knowledge of military history, we risk:
* Repeating past mistakes
* Making uninformed decisions about current and future conflicts
* Undervaluing the sacrifices made for our freedoms

I'd like to share this ebook with you--which includes Hanson's core arguments for studying war along with his answers to key questions about deterrence, WWII, and essential military history reading.

Inside, you'll discover:
* How studying war is, in essence, an attempt to prevent it
* Why human nature and the patterns of conflict remain constant across time
* What battles from Shiloh to Verdun to Okinawa teach us about sacrifice
* How military history provides moral education about the cost of freedom
Why the United States--"born through war, reunited by war, and saved from destruction by war"--must never forget this knowledge
* Understanding the past is essential so we can engage more seriously with the present.

I hope this material deepens your appreciation for military history--and informs how you think about peace, conflict, and public responsibility.

You can request your free copy using the link below:
[https://resources.hoover.org/why-we-should-study-war](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PR61G2Dre6gTz8D-pMyx4w~~/AARclBA~/PbPuYtwNbBlF3h6jvIkdqGfDVaX0MsNRg76KbNoTlR5CZeXnJjRqYLHOwtkUB2CbXFo7zo-Uk0Hr5w7g0oicaoZK2RFQWlVuRmftu6__UxrI8o2fzfm3o_7vExcmWQMxHbRVkDfdrqjPOaJp2eGHs9bZrzXocl_xMg4SWna-Q7KuectzD50I9VNQewdoGi2BSP3xgfhXLEhyWZI19GYfDqFz_J3OZmzDlSMauCj04qzzbGbwE_UCOzYvjPjQrOGeXtUml7gMyFinCcpVOMQo96v2Y-MGLZ7SynkXSj8Mais~) Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

subject: They're trying to gerrymander their way to victory
body:
Our democracy is under attack. We need to hold the line.
| | | | | [](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kPeMnM4ajBKiZNBI7u1hjWxP6qKmS3tMK8rwBY2t1bFB4Rxv_J5crQuLQjct4mBaUYsxj4_CZW24k5n6IMfuhZakVaZLtsaTtpgUi0BQE9XoAzlz8U6_rG5W6kVeo3nap5oSZ5vHaKPLF0RmCZAHwHxKnBhFitRMX6I5kCrNcfEb61BvFmd5q8DayqieUJXaoikw6YO8eO4yN3kzgM0Tc3xBeOezrW6kBloUD2xd2eE=&c=TKg38SRGSRVXd0w10IxErpVF7R3JuZiQmTBvrQTFpd6wGzD1GL_4OA==&ch=Pg4O68MRzk46soPgxRQhuRksteodQIQ2-tzmhccfSRm7C_n_A1JjNQ==)

| | | | Peter,
Politicians choosing their own voters, instead of voters choosing their politicians, is toxic to our democracy.
Texas Gov. Greg Abbott announced he will gerrymander Texas to stop Democrats from retaking control of the House this Midterm election. One party gerrymandering in the middle of an election cycle to redraw absurd districts that would deny the other party a majority in Congress is a vile act of cowardice and disdain for the American people.
MAGA has nothing but contempt towards the American people.
---
| | | | | [](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kPeMnM4ajBKiZNBI7u1hjWxP6qKmS3tMK8rwBY2t1bFB4Rxv_J5crQuLQjct4mBaUYsxj4_CZW24k5n6IMfuhZakVaZLtsaTtpgUi0BQE9XoAzlz8U6_rG5W6kVeo3nap5oSZ5vHaKPLF0RmCZAHwHxKnBhFitRMX6I5kCrNcfEb61BvFmd5q8DayqieUJXaoikw6YO8eO4yN3kzgM0Tc3xBeOezrW6kMFW0clAqkXo=&c=TKg38SRGSRVXd0w10IxErpVF7R3JuZiQmTBvrQTFpd6wGzD1GL_4OA==&ch=Pg4O68MRzk46soPgxRQhuRksteodQIQ2-tzmhccfSRm7C_n_A1JjNQ==)

| | | | I'll get right to it: Texas' gerrymander upped the stakes for my race even higher.
We can't control what ultimately happens in Texas, a red state with a GOP majority in the legislature. But we can control what happens in critical races like mine. I am running in NH-01 is a swingy, purple district that votes for bold candidates who fight for solutions to real problems.
That is the fighting spirit I am bringing to this campaign--but if the MAGA GOP is going to pull out all the stops to defeat Democrats in states they control, we simply have to win here, and win big. The RNCC knows this - it's why they have already started attacking me.
The only path to victory in this must-win district is to put up a true fighter for the people.
I have served in the Army National Guard for years, standing up as a defense attorney for our troops and for our freedoms when they needed defending. And I will serve only the people in Congress, fighting for healthcare and for equal rights for every person in this country.
---
| | | | [But I need your help to do this. Can I count on your support to ensure that Democrats win one the most competitive districts in the country? A driver [plowed into a crowd of people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ_G7oiWxTahoPibdPnbKy0MS0y0MRFwsfz2J98rXDkaaTTf93Wf7y5x2h7_3Ytsi3neaK9MrVGZfXF1Tdvzu1BVEEuiLfCxJ54RcBSgBcIcXOJjHvpgIxGS6slKPSqA0Vx1v9qJxjgMzujg4xS9gwCjhqiURDCGZJ_suQYaQQJMKC-LQi1RL3KaZDBX6AagkFoul2dOW1sp8pE_VC4-v3q2a2vv2ql_Hd46vLn3CXBWZygteaYOb5yrcNuDmKrwroi0tSx8yXsQ5GoTa2Y-9pyD0IMEM45qUVFioIBqCn4gDBq9kWbpiw3vPTGnOulugMfLJf690v7k72PxJwAA__-V7IJd) waiting to enter a nightclub along a busy boulevard in Los Angeles early Saturday, injuring 30 people.

# Sunday, July 20, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1969, Apollo 11 astronaut Neil Armstrong became the first man to walk on the moon. As he stepped onto the lunar surface, he said, "That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind." [Relive this iconic moment as it was broadcast live](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OqzAQAODTmC5oPAacFC6eFPGqZMvVVsg_A0zkQGSbIG6_2r3CXuArvs_bcLMceZnu9kmmjOuw0J4jlUJp8MnmmZfHligrGBPTEuKxcxwQsD2BPiEMwXI8hqYKZiRCUhUZqVsF0F7OupoN-i54cOBCI8l2NCp9BueURgWt9Lpi86OBRpAAHcraKdQStZNdJ8PlDKIBClzWVD9WXspMYzzWN6Xar88qmrmUVxbqn8BeYH-sW9lqRwL7aWrv3l_-f1y_hOpHsmVLJNQ1zzZRqJIJr51j5Nxp0cD0tBx_yfKnh7fB7wAAAP__PhRvwA). A man rescued two horses stuck in several feet of concrete-like mud in the desert. He dug them out with a stick and pulled them to safety with a rope. [See the video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OgzAQhJ8GOkfr5cehcHENXa69EjnsEjZn7Mg2QXn7U_IKV41GI80nfT-X6eLES7h9u41tWeIU-MieS-E0zcnlVcJ9T5wbWJJwIP86xE8I2CkwCmEiJ_41tTXZhRm5qdlq0zUA3XA29WqHtu9mN7Rtv5xpvpLWpsNmAKSua-a5rcW-38AgaIAe9enaoNForrrvNQ1nqFpgkhLT6R4llJUX_4pPTqc5brW3aymPXDVfFY4VjnEvFGPK77HCcXNBZffkrA7xpNaYMmeVyz7_Kglq2-kdZWW1CZFnFZdPI86cSoVjnSw9DvFecm-qFm6bE_8hl3_pelr8CwAA___FKn6j). ## Driver Plows into LA Crowd, Injures 30
A driver [plowed into a crowd of people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ_G7oiWxTahoPibdPnbKy0MS0y0MRFwsfz2J98rXDkaaTTf93Wf7y5x2h7_3Ytsi3neaK9MrVGZfXF1Tdvzu1BVEEuiLfCxJ54RcBSgBcIcXOJjHvpgIxGS6slKPSqA0Vx1v9qJxjgMzujg4xS9gwCjhqiURDCGZJ_suQYaQQJMKC-LQi1RL3KaZDBX6AagkFoul2dOW1sp8pE_VC4-v3q2a2vv2ql_Hd46vLn3CXBWZygteaYOb5yrcNuDmKrwroi0tSx8yXsQ5GoTa2Y-9pyD0IMEM45qUVFioIBqCn4gDBq9kWbpiw3vPTGnOulugMfLJf690v7k72PxJwAA__-V7IJd) waiting to enter a nightclub along Santa Monica Boulevard in Los Angeles early Saturday, injuring 30 people. The Los Angeles Fire Department indicated 23 people were transported to medical facilities, including [seven people in critical condition](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOqP1AjYpXFxDl2uvRMZeYCPHRLYDytufiP43-LtPGmk03_y7T3fLgeP61z7JlGWfIp05UCmUJpds3jg-3olyC0tiij58Tg4TAvYCtECYvOXwmbram4UIqa3JSN23AP1t0PVmeuXV0kmthrmXWls39EBSzmpohxasq9lcbaARJIBC2cwtaol6lkpJfxug6oA8lz01j51j2WgJn_2g1Lj9WQezlfLKVfunwrHC8TzPJs7usrjyCscLKxzfWfzQQRu7QMInPigLl_bTi7BnYeNKgbL4KnNcBYJILlqUN91BnYx_nRwCZ6WrDtan5fDdUH513GHwfwAAAP__IvmBDw) and six in serious condition. Following the crash, bystanders removed the driver from the vehicle and attacked him. When officers arrived, they discovered [the driver had been shot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOszAQBeDTmA40HgIOhYu_ocvfbomMPQ6OJjiyvbG4_YrdvcG230jz9N7HbbmZwGG__zdP0sXHZaeamUqhtNhk8hb2x2ei3INPgXbHRw28IODQgmoRFmcCH8ulcdoTIfUNaamGHmCYrqrZNIzge0cOUa529b2daEL00sBo0fuhCfr8BgpBAowou7VHJVGtchylm64gLkAulJi6Rwx72cjzEd-UOhufDeutlFcW_T-Bs8C51trZNZ8tzrvAmWM2-52YssD59B9rf7F90xYsU2tTrK7dIvNRY3QC5yZp96qBOeRRiQvcnybwd2r501RvjV8BAAD__7LCfkQ). Police say the suspect was seen running away from the scene and remains at large.
## Jailed U.S. Citizens Released from Venezuela
Venezuela on Friday [released 10 jailed U.S. citizens](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE9jd0SPhwG7oNgmXbbd0sLwiIkItoDYyp5-5b3CX45GGs33_XnMDxtTzM_f9k2mhW3OdNZErVGZXbF1jfn1KVQFhBIp-_Q9Y5oRUDLQDGH2NqbvPPTeBCIk0ZPhWgoAOY26Xw2qaQwqeJpwmJRwng9oHUqngC-Tpz6aaw00AgdQyG-LQM1RL1wp7qcRugHIx7aV22uLua0U0nc7qNzc9u6TWVvbayd-dXjv8G73C-CqrlBadIk6vO8l1i1TYfW0Ozso098PJcs-OTbyrDbbqDJKrNp0WL8VZsEJ0CCkDIt3ggfA0XIFk3JSSen6Yvx-xpRiVbob4Pm2Mf2_1H7k8TD4LwAA__8gQoWj) and residents in exchange for migrants the U.S. deported to El Salvador months earlier under an immigration crackdown. Former Navy SEAL Wilbert Joseph Castaneda, detained in Venezuela last year during personal travel, was [among the Americans released](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GO8zloqIFxTZ2s-2WBuU6MmHAACOZffqN-wp_d5KTnJPv-_NYHsZ5F56_zZt02eMSqGZPpVBatmTy4cLrkyhL2JOjYP23Or8gYM9BcYTFGue_S9dYvRMhyYa0UL0E6KdRNYfuaJpo763soFdEKFY77nY1G3UjjEo2Tt9roBAEwICiXSUqgWoVwyDsNALrgKwrMbWv6EI5aPffeFFqt_huvD5KOTOTvxjODOdaa7ut-aa4e4bzHRnOZ3I5Bko8V3PyT-YXBfr7IW84eZ6Nv4yNieHcJG3P6rx3eVCsg-fbOP__q_xI0KXxXwAAAP__xrJ6mA) despite U.S. travel warnings. The U.S. has warned Americans against traveling to Venezuela or near its borders, citing the risks of wrongful detention. The U.S. Embassy in Venezuela [posted a photo of the freed Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSqyAUgOGnwS6ZwwFBCorb2OW2WzIoh0gGNQMkrm-_k32Fbf_iK_6vm7v5lNN2_-9Xsi3ubqOjZmqNipuLr0vaHq9CVUAsibaQzyNlh4D9BfQFwQWf8ulkF2wkQhIdWa57AdCbQXeLBZq1MloQzApVH2iScZLBSIxD7I3okv1ooBE4gEJ-nQRqjnriSvFgBmASKKS2l-tjT1tbKOZzf1O5zvvaZbu09qxM_GM4Mhy_P5Xh-Kq0Tr7W800Mx9p8e1WGIzdSoTED19wY1QuhVFdseB4p51SVZhLuq0_5125_GvK2-BMAAP__bEVw0g) with U.S. diplomat John McNamara. El Salvador released more than 250 Venezuelan migrants who were believed to belong to the violent [Tren de Aragua](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DmUftxmATONhksr_phqhtN-AvY5AxM5o9_Yq9wg9LJZXqvT9f0xfFFPPymza2dd6nzO8zca1cJl_oXGP-vgqfHcwlcg7p845pQsBegBYIU6CYPpNqg52ZkbuWrdR9B9CPRrer1fMIHoJh6Mj7GdH3AxnD3nWuB-XbaO810AgSYED5cB1qidrJYZBhNNAo4BDrXh7fe8x15Tl99heXh9-3Ntm11uNsul8NPht80nED3NUdSo0-cYPPWq7tEJQiZ8GZt8inIF_FizP_vTiRqIWzCCyo0HKRWMg5KkEEI433vRkHdDSCD-hH5Uk6Naqg5tAWG453TCmeg24ULBvF9P9Z_ZHOl8V_AQAA__9-LYjv) street gang. They had been housed at the Terrorism Confinement Center mega-prison since March.
## Trump Sues WSJ for $10 Billion
President [Trump sued The Wall Street Journal's publisher](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOyaXqyNSUGxDN9tuaVCuIxMEAzjGt9-4-wh_fU6-nPP9eY0v64OP7992I12XNEY6S6BaKY9ztmX18XNkKi0s2VN04Tp9GBHwyUFyhNFZH66xa5xeiJDahrSQzxbgqQbZrFq1blbDIId5UjCDUkvfwYRCWqkcdkPj9U0DiSAAehSPqUUpUE6i74VTA7AOyPma8uOTfKwrLeFKX8qPOW1N0Gute2HtL4aGoYnXnkq9I4bmBjM0IBkaoRiao_D7H0NT87HtvBxU-GlD4KVmoso_6cjRBr6kzAXwyYfgU-R2qZR5oNNx2kslH_l_R7zUlC-Gpsna7eddL71kHbw368O_hfVHWr8a_wYAAP__4beK3A) Friday for $10 billion over an article he called false and defamatory, alleging it erroneously linked him to Epstein via a lewd letter. The outlet [described the letter as](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DmUdtG2gTONhkstl0Q2Rwe2hkDDJmRtx-xb_CD0slleq9f6_h5Thyev91K9kStiHR94hUCuVhyu6YOS1npkNDyEzJx-vLcVCgWgEoFAzecbyGpvY2ECnSNVmJrQZoe4P1bFHSiKBb0xtvtEMf_KhxdAob2XYOarb3GqACCdAp-Ri1QqlwlF0nfW-gaoA8ly0_lo1TmSnEa_tQfkzbWkc7l7Iflf5TqWelnm6_Ae7qDrnwFKlSz5LPdRcLhZDpErQfhTiJd3bJi-XMl1jOo_BEwtPuclkpFUETGWc0hn70EntEGQxIh11LqlHU1Nn6_csx8tFh1cB7dRx_TpVfmfxY9T8AAP__K-6Glw) a naked woman's outline sent to Epstein for his 50th birthday but omitted a full image and did not disclose its source. Meanwhile, the Justice Department filed [a request to unseal grand jury transcripts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtSAUhJ8GO8zhoOItKP7G7v7tlgblqLiIBvAa337jvsJ2k5lkMvN9vfu3cd6F-b_ZSOdp7wNdyVPOFPsxmrS4sJ6RkoQpOgrW35fzPQLWHBRH6K1x_u6rwuqJCEkWpIWqJUD9alWx6BaFaq2oBAwNTdSSkVCP9GoAJZGsCqefNlAIAqBBUQ4SlUA1iKYR9tUCq4Csy3ss192FvNDk7_1DsRz3rfB6yflITP5j2DHsrusqxyE9L56cYfdIhl2O53Ykvp4pu5G4pcPEvFHI3KTvx7cz8bzzMyQyntORMrnA52iC5esZb76ZTNEZz7ArorbH5bx3qVGsgnkzzv_uyX-C-NH4EwAA___LeIfm) related to Epstein's 2019 child sex trafficking charges in New York, which ended when Epstein died in custody later that year.

| _Flying together with our sponsor_ [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcGK5CAQhp_G3NKUZaLm4GFh6NvsdY9itDLWrG0a407Tb79MGNjrwhx_-Oorqv5fr_41cOH69jPcyPVt95UeR6HeqfnYwpG5vv9pdCjYGlNN5fng4hFwHsGMCD4FLk8_DcltREhqICfNrADmxZohu5ls2GIknHCTerJKRROVlFbRQhD0wO7TBgZBAmiUl1WhkWhWqbVMiwUxASXue7u871x7pq089w9ql7jfhuJy7_dDqB8CrwKvvYX4-5IplJ6fJx84fZICr1arlVYzj9pCGCcb5nGVehspKhtNSjItRqjrvYRIN6pdqJevVf647_XYm__K_55UPWipcBaoQ-Ik1EvMgZtA3c-UuFHsq_8fkZELzv6c91kOzaX7g0vhQxsxwdstcDlv7t8q6sPh3wAAAP__G_SpBw) **Why Getting Up From A Chair Gets Harder Each Year (It's Not Age)** How do some folks stay active well into their 70s, 80s, and even 90s... while others find themselves hobbling down stairs or needing to rock back and forth just to get out of a chair? According to a breakthrough discovery by Harvard University scientists, it comes down to a hidden culprit that dries out your joints from the inside: "joint drought." When this "drought" is addressed, it not only soothes joint discomfort but also makes joints feel younger and more mobile than they have in years. The good news? Doing this is easy, affordable, and takes just 5 seconds a day. A Boston medical doctor recently recorded a short presentation explaining exactly what joint drought is — and how this 5-second trick can help beat it starting today. His video quickly went viral with over seven million views. And thousands across the country are singing the praises of this method on social media. clean_body: A driver waiting to enter a nightclub along a busy boulevard in Los Angeles early Saturday, injuring 30 people. | | | | | | Sunday, July 20, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1969, Apollo 11 astronaut Neil Armstrong became the first man to walk on the moon. As he stepped onto the lunar surface, he said, "That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind." . A man rescued two horses stuck in several feet of concrete-like mud in the desert. He dug them out with a stick and pulled them to safety with a rope. . If you have trouble standing without assistance, be sure to check out today's sponsor, | Driver Plows into LA Crowd, Injures 30 A driver waiting to enter a nightclub along Santa Monica Boulevard in Los Angeles early Saturday, injuring 30 people. The Los Angeles Fire Department indicated 23 people were transported to medical facilities, including and six in serious condition. Following the crash, bystanders removed the driver from the vehicle and attacked him. When officers arrived, they discovered . Police say the suspect was seen running away from the scene and remains at large. Jailed U.S. Citizens Released from Venezuela Venezuela on Friday and residents in exchange for migrants the U.S. deported to El Salvador months earlier under an immigration crackdown. Former Navy SEAL Wilbert Joseph Castaneda, detained in Venezuela last year during personal travel, was despite U.S. travel warnings. The U.S. has warned Americans against traveling to Venezuela or near its borders, citing the risks of wrongful detention. The U.S. Embassy in Venezuela with U.S. diplomat John McNamara. El Salvador released more than 250 Venezuelan migrants who were believed to belong to the violent street gang. They had been housed at the Terrorism Confinement Center mega-prison since March. Trump Sues WSJ for $10 Billion President Friday for $10 billion over an article he called false and defamatory, alleging it erroneously linked him to Epstein via a lewd letter. The outlet a naked woman's outline sent to Epstein for his 50th birthday but omitted a full image and did not disclose its source. Meanwhile, the Justice Department filed related to Epstein's 2019 child sex trafficking charges in New York, which ended when Epstein died in custody later that year. According to a breakthrough discovery by Harvard University scientists, it comes down to a hidden culprit that dries out your joints from the inside: "joint drought." When this "drought" is addressed, it not only soothes joint discomfort but also makes joints feel younger and more mobile than they have in years. The good news? Doing this is easy, affordable, and takes just 5 seconds a day. A Boston medical doctor recently recorded a short presentation explaining exactly what joint drought is — and how this 5-second trick can help beat it starting today. His video quickly went viral with over seven million views. And thousands across the country are singing the praises of this method on social media. Kay Gilbert from Athens, Alabama wrote, "I'm 73 and feel like running all over the place again. My kids say I outshop them in Walmart." Now, what about you? Could your joints use some relief? () | Today's Rotator section is brought to you by: - Ladies and gentlemen, here are our most-clicked stories of the week: ➤A 5,830-square-foot Wyoming home on a 35-acre estate is listed for $34.5 million and features an open floor plan, gym, pet spa, office, and Snake River Trail access. () ➤A man found two wild horses trapped in thick mud and, unable to call for help, spent hours digging them out. () **➤**A list ranking wild animals by approachability names dolphins and otters as friendly, while warning that crocodiles and hippos are best avoided. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Today’s sponsor , Sculpt Nation, created a 2-scoop collagen blend that helps reduce wrinkles, firm skin, and support hair, nails, and joints. Just add it to coffee or smoothies daily. It’s packed with 5 age-fighting nutrients — and it’s completely unflavored. - | Flying together with our sponsor The Real Reason Getting Up From Seats Is So Hard Harvard scientists discovered a hidden condition called "" that affects millions of seniors. This silent culprit makes simple movements like standing from a chair increasingly difficult. A Boston doctor's 5-second solution has helped 180,547 people regain mobility. His viral video (7+ million views) explains how to rehydrate dried-out joints, making them feel years younger. "Back to walking the dog and hiking...at 71 years old!" says Robert from Colorado after trying this affordable method. | ➤The Trump administration replaced the Naval Academy's first female superintendent with its first Marine Corps general, reassigning Vice Adm. Yvette Davids to the chief of naval operations staff. () ➤ Two NYPD officers and volunteer firefighters rushed into a burning Queens home, kicking down doors and rescuing trapped residents. () ➤ Billionaire In-N-Out heiress Lynsi Snyder confirmed the chain is relocating its office to Franklin, Tennessee, stating it's not easy to raise a family or conduct business in California. name: Jared Hudson
subject: God & destiny have brought us to this very moment in time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/july-bio-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

Patriot,

My name is Jared Hudson.

I’m a former Navy SEAL and Christian conservative running for U.S.
Senate.

I’m pro God, pro gun, and 100% pro Trump.

I’m sure you’ve heard that a million times before from other
candidates, but usually it's just lip service from some RINO doing
whatever it takes to keep his job.

But that’s not who I am. And that’s not what this is.

_THIS IS A GENUINE, BUT URGENT PLEA FOR YOUR HELP._

You already know this, but I’ll say it anyway.

THE RADICAL LEFT CATEGORICALLY HATES FOLKS LIKE US.

THEY ARE ANTI-GOD, AND THEY ARE ANTI-AMERICA.

And I’m not just talking about liberal activists, or what remains of
CNN’s viewership.

I’m talking about Hollywood celebrities, pro athletes, and the uber
wealthy elite.

I’m talking Clooney. Soros. Oprah. Obama. All of them shelling out
MILLIONS to break my resolve, crush my faith, and end my candidacy
before we even have a chance to fight back.

AND THAT’S WHY I’M HUMBLY ASKING YOU FOR YOUR HELP TODAY.
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/july-bio-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

I know my fate is in God’s hands _BUT TODAY MY CANDIDACY IS IN
YOURS_.

$20
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/july-bio-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=20]

$30
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/july-bio-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=30]

$40
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/july-bio-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=40]

$50
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/july-bio-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=50]

I hope you’ll do what you can to protect it.

With the spirit of a soldier and the heart of a patriot,

Jared Hudson

Former Navy SEAL

Candidate for U.S. Senate

A MESSAGE FROM JARED HUDSON:

[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/bio-footer-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

It’s Jared Hudson.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Alabama, and I wanted to take a
moment to introduce myself.

I HOPE THAT BY THE TIME YOU FINISH READING THIS MESSAGE, YOU’LL
CONSIDER STANDING WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT BY MAKING A DONATION OF ANY
AMOUNT.
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/bio-footer-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

I’m a former Navy SEAL Sniper, law enforcement officer, business
owner, husband, father, and follower of Christ.

I’ve deployed in support of the Global War on Terror, and I’ve led
the charge in combatting human trafficking.

I’ve been to some of the darkest corners of the world, looked evil
in the eye, and seen how faith, courage, and conviction can overcome
anything.

Now, I’m entering a new battlefield: I’M RUNNING FOR U.S. SENATE
TO STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP AND TO BE THE TIP OF THE SPEAR THAT’LL
DEFEND OUR CHRISTIAN VALUES, PROTECT THE PRINCIPLES WE HOLD DEAR, AND
END THE WOKE AGENDA.

If you believe in God, country, the Constitution, and standing with
President Trump, I need your support on this mission.

WILL YOU JOIN ME IN THIS FIGHT FOR OUR COUNTRY’S FUTURE BY PITCHING
IN A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT TODAY?
[https://secure.winred.com/hudson-for-alabama/bio-footer-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250716_julybio_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

I’m not a politician, I’m a warrior. And with your help, I’ll
fight every day in Washington to put America - _and you_ - first.

Thank you,

Jared Hudson

Paid for by Hudson for Alabama

Hudson for Alabama – PO Box 100 Gardendale, AL 35071

_Jared Hudson is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job
titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the
Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This moment won’t last forever... it’s time to go all in
body:
Something is shifting - and fast

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b0JtB3hktYFI98ynj0FPcg~~/AARclBA~/rSQ2cgmxEDD8QDVIXcDqqrozjf86-DlW7ZRiGCORHJSIvuD-4DJSjF4BrKetrOUaeexyFmG_Gwss-h_9-XSV4qoBZ1G8XLYGR0C9jBWfNEfY6LFBKhMhWt05kWbMyj4b7-IOJL01a9emETMvU_q_yq6wynG2TQ-qt14bgGFxF7ljYi9PZitvq-CsVZyhbahRzXlKpdja4dXGxk9qCEhW8A~~)
---
Friend,
---
If you've ever wondered whether we can actually win this fight for the soul of our great nation... Let me give you the proof. We're seeing crowds packing every campus -- not in protest, not in outrage -- but in patriotic celebration. These kids chant _" USA!"_ They raise their hands to ask what they can do for their country. And for the first time in years... **Young Americans are PROUD to be American again.**
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b0JtB3hktYFI98ynj0FPcg~~/AARclBA~/rSQ2cgmxEDD8QDVIXcDqqrozjf86-DlW7ZRiGCORHJSIvuD-4DJSjF4BrKetrOUaeexyFmG_Gwss-h_9-XSV4qoBZ1G8XLYGR0C9jBWfNEfY6LFBKhMhWt05kWbMyj4b7-IOJL01a9emETMvU_q_yq6wynG2TQ-qt14bgGFxF7ljYi9PZitvq-CsVZyhbahRzXlKpdja4dXGxk9qCEhW8A~~)
---
But here's what the fake news media won't tell you: _This isn 't happening by accident..._ **It 's happening because grassroots patriots like YOU are making it happen.** Because YOU are helping Turning Point USA show up, speak boldly, and shatter the narrative that the LEFT owns our youngest generations... and America's future. Friend, we're just getting started... We are witnessing a moment that NO ONE ever thought was possible: 🔥 Students standing for FAITH, FAMILY, and FREEDOM
🔥 Crowds overflowing campuses - even in deep "Blue" states
🔥 Gen Z waking up and LOVING this country again **We 've sparked a wildfire. A REVOLUTION.** But now we have to keep it burning. _And that 's why I'm writing to you today._ If we don't seize this moment... If we don't push harder, move faster, reach more campuses... _The Left will try to take it all back._ They're regrouping. Retooling. Pouring money into influence and indoctrination. But we have something they don't... **We have the truth. We have the students. And we have YOU.**
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b0JtB3hktYFI98ynj0FPcg~~/AARclBA~/rSQ2cgmxEDD8QDVIXcDqqrozjf86-DlW7ZRiGCORHJSIvuD-4DJSjF4BrKetrOUaeexyFmG_Gwss-h_9-XSV4qoBZ1G8XLYGR0C9jBWfNEfY6LFBKhMhWt05kWbMyj4b7-IOJL01a9emETMvU_q_yq6wynG2TQ-qt14bgGFxF7ljYi9PZitvq-CsVZyhbahRzXlKpdja4dXGxk9qCEhW8A~~)
---
_That 's why I have to ask, Friend: Will you make your first gift to Turning Point USA today?_ **Your gift will help us:** ✅ Go BIGGER with our campus tours
✅ Train thousands of bold student leaders
✅ Take the fight directly to the Left's strongholds
✅ Make Gen Z **Gen FREE** -- the most PATRIOTIC generation in American history **And when you join our mission today, I 'll send you a limited-edition "47" hat -- the same one students are BEGGING for on campus -- as my personal thank-you.**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**Claim Your "47" Hat**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b0JtB3hktYFI98ynj0FPcg~~/AARclBA~/rSQ2cgmxEDD8QDVIXcDqqrozjf86-DlW7ZRiGCORHJSIvuD-4DJSjF4BrKetrOUaeexyFmG_Gwss-h_9-XSV4qoBZ1G8XLYGR0C9jBWfNEfY6LFBKhMhWt05kWbMyj4b7-IOJL01a9emETMvU_q_yq6wynG2TQ-qt14bgGFxF7ljYi9PZitvq-CsVZyhbahRzXlKpdja4dXGxk9qCEhW8A~~)
---
This isn't just about watching history. It's about making it. And when you give, you won't just be supporting a movement -- you'll be helping us write the next chapter of American greatness. Let's do this. Together.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b0JtB3hktYFI98ynj0FPcg~~/AARclBA~/rSQ2cgmxEDD8QDVIXcDqqrozjf86-DlW7ZRiGCORHJSIvuD-4DJSjF4BrKetrOUaeexyFmG_Gwss-h_9-XSV4qoBZ1G8XLYGR0C9jBWfNEfY6LFBKhMhWt05kWbMyj4b7-IOJL01a9emETMvU_q_yq6wynG2TQ-qt14bgGFxF7ljYi9PZitvq-CsVZyhbahRzXlKpdja4dXGxk9qCEhW8A~~)
---
**P.S.** The next generation is CHOOSING America. Let's make sure they never look back. This is our opportunity to take our country's future back from the Left and DEFEAT them in the culture war for good. **[Make your most generous gift to Turning Point USA, and I will send you a limited edition"47" hat as my personal thank you for joining the fight.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b0JtB3hktYFI98ynj0FPcg~~/AARclBA~/rSQ2cgmxEDD8QDVIXcDqqrozjf86-DlW7ZRiGCORHJSIvuD-4DJSjF4BrKetrOUaeexyFmG_Gwss-h_9-XSV4qoBZ1G8XLYGR0C9jBWfNEfY6LFBKhMhWt05kWbMyj4b7-IOJL01a9emETMvU_q_yq6wynG2TQ-qt14bgGFxF7ljYi9PZitvq-CsVZyhbahRzXlKpdja4dXGxk9qCEhW8A~~)**

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Record Jobs Report, UT Preseason No. 1, and Monster Happy Meals
body:
Texas reported another [strong jobs gain](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOiN7CCEuXGxD97bdEg32AF45NrIH_PL3q2Q_4bVXV1f3nD9f8xf64OP2G59k-HtNc6RaAjFTnjPZlN3ftJRMR8p88pGpEJYZJAxCjgLk7NCH13xrnVmk06olo8ahl1KDvre7uavFrUig-hGd1so98KGGcZBDr6RboPXmPSZHkEpJ1ffdYsFKGB5Sawejts1NkvOccsc7MX1jWcMrXZQ7m55tMDvzUZr-VwNTA1OtteNqu0-x29LVwPRGamD6RML6ywePUQRcUhZrypZEIS4iUhX_kQXGeGIQW06Vd5GRSdgU2ceTikgnH2hJRGSfYpuNO6oPwZf72Nzk9kQfPtf4Z0IvA_8CAAD__ysljqU), reaching a record 15.85 million in its civilian labor force and a 1.4% annual nonfarm growth rate, surpassing the 0.3% national average.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb-O2zAMh59G3hRQkv9Ug4cCQbbr2tGQRcZRIUsGJSd3efrCxQXt3BvJj_hI_PjzbXpzIYa0_HArjfX9mqdEjxKpVuKJyWfGX3kuTFvmuteNqZArkwbdSRikhgldiB9T2-A4A1rV0KiGzgBYbfvmNqrBmh5awK6ldgY1K0KFTllj_GBt14TxkMGgQSlQxpxmrz3o7htYi3qwXrRAGGrmU71RpXdXrvEj34lPPq9NHG-1bkWY70JfhL5cQ3LJ07w_nwcX-hJdwpAW6fnQSO8YZWV3pyiZHo6xyDulujO9amEue12nknf2JMy53uhzpbzOT6H7g66EYV-FOW8uoPybmuTyOVGJD8751fBu3VxYkjDnl-8_jtO9w4XzvgU8RC_TP4Yih5OGhkfcHiHGUPpBtLCsLsQ_mdWvffo-6t8BAAD__-r1xjM) | |
# Sunday, July 20, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1917, country music singer and songwriter [Cindy Walker](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFygzAQheHTiA5mtRiwChVp6Jw2JSOklVEiECOtjbl9xrlC2q94b-b_uk03E2LY7p9mJc0vn6aNjhKJmfKUyabsvtNcMu0p84P3TIVMmRCwq2GoESZnQjynS-X0DE7JirQcuhZAoeqrRSvZ2St42ZveGhq865G8kggwK9fPbRX0ewwGBClBtm0zW7SA3RWUcjgoKy5ALnDKDS_E9DLFxzM9KTc2rVXUC_NeRPshcBQ4HsfR2PTYOJ_rowS7mBiT92alJuW7wPENdfL1mwSONmzurA8TfyhXWbv9CDGG0g_iAvfVhPj3wv9r89T4GwAA___jvXrW) was born in Mart. Among her notable hits were _You Don’t Know Me_ , which was performed by Ray Charles and Elvis, and Roy Orbison’s _Dream Baby_. If you've heard of the craze surrounding Labubu, you'll want to check out this burger joint that offered Happy Meals with the trendy toy. ## **Gov. Abbott Calls Special Session**
The special session called by Gov. Greg Abbott is set to take place on Monday, with [18 items for consideration](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNtDzI2A8eIiqUnVIW3XpaBn7Aa6cGNkOSf6-Ir_Q6SxXV_een5M6aefdZf7QZ5L5PgV1oVvylDNFFcmEaH_DmCKtIeZrXiMl0kkhYFsBrxCU1c4_1KG0cgQrWEmS8bYBECi6cpHatFwYYONIfcdaBtQTmE60hiyOXVM6uZcBR2AMWNPUo0ED2PYghEUuTHEAsi6HWOeFMt11mvwjbBRrE86ll0vOayqaY4FDgcMctvoZquewFThcVx-0TQUOk_O0c_-w8-v780VNLqasjPaerEqUkgsX1Yu8KE-zS17nayT1fjq-vSrgFYgK23q1UxmlXW_Oe5c6XhxgPmvnn4Py_zRuEv8CAAD__9LaiIU) by lawmakers. The agenda includes measures to improve flood warning systems and communications, relief funding for flood victims, redistricting efforts, regulation of hemp-based THC products, and more. The meeting drew national attention with Abbott's redistricting announcement after Trump urged changes to Texas maps favoring Republicans in the 2026 midterms. Special sessions last up to 30 days and focus only on topics set by the governor. Abbott has 10 days to veto a bill passed during the session, or it becomes law. [You can see the full agenda here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O2zAQRE8jdRRWq18WLNKoc9qUAkWuZQY0VyDXsn37wM4RvnoGM3jvz2W92BBD2n_bOxl5XXlN9CyRRCivmRxn_5e3kungLA85MhWyZUXAQcGkEFZvQ3yvfe3NBl63NZl2GjoAjXqsb6aznR-uU7cBwTTi6IceZxjn2Wk_EGIdzGcMJoS2hbbrms2hAxxm0NrjpF3VA_kgnBu5kdDLlmt880m5cXyvo7mJHKXqflW4VLjsfDbfUrPzWeHywalwObjI_5Ry4qzstrGIsinxIzkqqhzkgo2qUCmBk7I7JW9VnY0_niHGUMap6mG_2xC_x_IzXafBfwEAAP__TZ6A4A).
## Inspiring Stories Emerge from Flood Volunteers
Inspiring stories continue to surface three weeks after the floods, including one about [a grandmother who launched a Facebook group](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGngW6i8YDjS-HiNumy7ZbI4AG8MhjZE0jefpW8wtZH-nT0f9_7uwsxbPOXW9nKc0r9xmeJLMK5zzym7H_SUDLvKctD9syFXekJSQMaIOy9C_HVt7W3A_pO1WyV0Q1iR921Xiyi95octxMpz4P2g6FmIqPVqDUNpg72jaEhVApV01yGkUYk_Q-7zpPpxqpF9kFSvsjCwk9XpvhKB-fLmNY62kVkL1Xzv6JbRbed0x75PVV0m7Pb_OqgiMtS4AjZRUhbDBvDnNNjh8yPLQjDx4UppuThCKOEtcAZZIFzcQKy8AtiOhhiKgJKGYNEWGfr9zPEGMrVVC3Oqwvx80r-1vKw9BsAAP__a1aLxg) to help people recover cherished items lost in the rising waters. Dondi Persyn, who lives near the Guadalupe River, created the group, which has since attracted more than 20,000 members sharing found objects and heartfelt requests. Persyn says they treat each item like “it’s extra, super special.” Virginia [firefighter Matthew Rafferty](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAUhE9jOqPnR4hx4WIbumy7JfLPI3HkYGSbkNx-RbQ32O6TRvpGMz-X6WJCDMv12zxI19ecpoX2EqlWylMml7K_J1syrSnXra6ZCpkyIWDPQXKEyZsQ39Op8dqCV6IhLWTfAShU5-amjcPeogLhjOw6CY78WXmEGZ21gxBN0IcMJIIQILqutQ4dYD-AUh6lcuwE5ENNua03qvQyZY7v9KTcuvRoor7VuhbWfTEcGY77vreLdceKI2c4Hshw3Ar_o4-DzzElX_gzxW2pRLnwTNsSKvFk7-Rq4dktBsUgYWiy9useYgzlLNkJrg8T4qe-_u-0p8bfAAAA___Lk4ME) found a mud-soaked baby quilt during recovery efforts. He cleaned it, shared it online, and personally returned it to its owner. Multiple organizations are leading efforts to help flood victims recover. If you or someone you know is in a position to volunteer, [you can find more information here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb8GOiN7DHEoXLyGLq_dEhl7CF4ZBtkDSf5-lWj_YPujo3vP1228uZjidv_vVrT8nGnc8FESMmMeM3rK4ZumknGnzAfvGQu6MoKETkgjQI7BxfQa2zrYSYZe1WiV6bSUPfSXerHaowavQRnQ2hsfJqf01LUqzNcZ_bWO9i2TBqRSUmndTB68hO4q-z6A6X3VSgyRKTe8IOPTlTm96MTceFrrZBfmvVT6XwVDBQOjW_MxRU_bUVxD-V7B8P4k3BZEYcoRSwXDQg_BJBZMu_hIxZyIgjij57j-0kc-40n5zdfZhv0RU4rlYqpW3lcX02cB_63baeEnAAD__wRrhUQ).
## Texas Sets Jobs Record
Texas reported another [strong jobs gain](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOiN7CCEuXGxD97bdEg32AF45NrIH_PL3q2Q_4bVXV1f3nD9f8xf64OP2G59k-HtNc6RaAjFTnjPZlN3ftJRMR8p88pGpEJYZJAxCjgLk7NCH13xrnVmk06olo8ahl1KDvre7uavFrUig-hGd1so98KGGcZBDr6RboPXmPSZHkEpJ1ffdYsFKGB5Sawejts1NkvOccsc7MX1jWcMrXZQ7m55tMDvzUZr-VwNTA1OtteNqu0-x29LVwPRGamD6RML6ywePUQRcUhZrypZEIS4iUhX_kQXGeGIQW06Vd5GRSdgU2ceTikgnH2hJRGSfYpuNO6oPwZf72Nzk9kQfPtf4Z0IvA_8CAAD__ysljqU), reaching a record 15.85 million in its civilian labor force and a 1.4% annual nonfarm growth rate, surpassing the 0.3% national average. Of the 10,800 jobs added, private education and health services created 6,900 jobs, followed by leisure and hospitality with 3,000. The information sector posted the next-largest gain, adding 1,000 jobs. The jobs report marks growth in 60 of the previous 62 months, and it brings the annual total growth in the civilian labor force to 237,800 people. You can access the jobs report and more economic data on the state [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykj71uwyAURp8GtkSXix3KwNDFW7p2RJh7HVPhYAHNz9tXySt0_r5zpPN99ueQcrpevsLGrj-W4q98b5l75-orx1Lpp8yt8l5q_-175caheQQcD2AOCJ5Cyk8_SHIzkFWSnTKjBrBoT3J1xtJJwUAcF4WRNY1KjWogpQPBHK1M7iUDg6AUKK2Pc8QIOH6AtYTGRjEAU-qlHvvKnR-hLflZblyPsWwyu7X3vQn9KXASOL0PeUuvUeAkq6P9nnJO7WTEAJctpPwG-_9ybw7_AgAA__9DtWl7).

Abbott Calls Special Session The special session called by Gov. Greg Abbott is set to take place on Monday, with by lawmakers. The agenda includes measures to improve flood warning systems and communications, relief funding for flood victims, redistricting efforts, regulation of hemp-based THC products, and more. The meeting drew national attention with Abbott's redistricting announcement after Trump urged changes to Texas maps favoring Republicans in the 2026 midterms. Special sessions last up to 30 days and focus only on topics set by the governor. Abbott has 10 days to veto a bill passed during the session, or it becomes law. . Inspiring Stories Emerge from Flood Volunteers Inspiring stories continue to surface three weeks after the floods, including one about to help people recover cherished items lost in the rising waters. Dondi Persyn, who lives near the Guadalupe River, created the group, which has since attracted more than 20,000 members sharing found objects and heartfelt requests. Persyn says they treat each item like “it’s extra, super special.” Virginia found a mud-soaked baby quilt during recovery efforts. He cleaned it, shared it online, and personally returned it to its owner. Multiple organizations are leading efforts to help flood victims recover. If you or someone you know is in a position to volunteer, . Texas Sets Jobs Record Texas reported another , reaching a record 15.85 million in its civilian labor force and a 1.4% annual nonfarm growth rate, surpassing the 0.3% national average. Of the 10,800 jobs added, private education and health services created 6,900 jobs, followed by leisure and hospitality with 3,000. The information sector posted the next-largest gain, adding 1,000 jobs. The jobs report marks growth in 60 of the previous 62 months, and it brings the annual total growth in the civilian labor force to 237,800 people. | Wow, Peter, did you catch what's happening in New York?? Democrats have an amazing opportunity to win big with New York's mayoral race, but MAGA Republicans are attacking Dems' overwhelmingly popular candidate, Zohran Mamdani, on all fronts. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T581837fa-47f2-4b8a-8ff6-2a7a97a9c6d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) They're even going so far as calling to "deport and denaturalize" Mamdani so they can stop Democrats from winning! This is unacceptable in a fair and free democracy. If extremist Republicans have their way, they will continue their racist attacks and cheat their way to win in upcoming 2026 elections. We cannot let the voice of the people be silenced. [Please, will you be one of the 10,000 people that stand with Zohran Mamdani and condemn Republicans’ shameless attacks?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T509f0727-c683-4c5f-9346-85a4d4f73999/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce2dacb8-eeb8-42e4-b0b3-eca11ac90e57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
