name: Dr. Chad Walding
subject: 5 Collagen Lies Exposed
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1995371/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvUEVhR213TTVWcQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjA/LbmNsV0dLQ293Sw/qP2hpZHM9bmM3eVpTNktrRmdaMzVscw/gaHzRrw/s0p91c85557)

If you’re over the age of 50, man or woman...
And you’re struggling with pain in your joints, loss of mobility, or loose, sagging skin that’s robbing you of your confidence...
You’ve probably heard about collagen and its incredible anti-aging benefits.
But if we’ve learned anything (especially this time of year), it’s that it’s vital to do our own research when it comes to our health.
So before you run to the store and grab the first jar of collagen you see, [one health expert is urging anyone over 50 to see these 5 collagen warnings](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1995371/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjA/LbmNsV0dLQ293Sw/qP3NpZD0xMzYwJnB1Yj0yNDA1NzMmYzE9MjAyNTA3MjAtQUZXUi0xNDUwJmMyPVREVjNBbHRTTDQmYzM9QUZXUg/gaHzRrw/s7k98047886).
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Big news announcement from B+L
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | _Broad + Liberty_ ’s Todd Shepherd was awarded **first place** in the investigative reporting category in the 2025 Keystone Media Awards, one of Pennsylvania’s most competitive and respected contests recognizing excellence in journalism.

The Keystone Media Awards received over 2,500 entries from news outlets across Pennsylvania. _Broad + Liberty_ competed in Division I—the category for the state’s largest publications, including the _Inquirer_ and _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_.

Read all about it [here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e2a8057707&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=09def5514e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
What happens when government documents accidentally fall into a reporter’s hands? And why do some explosive stories never make the front page?

On the [Voices of Reason podcast](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a08dffd02a&e=b7b3eddce2),_Broad + Liberty_ 's Todd Shepherd takes us inside the world of investigative reporting in Pennsylvania — where exposing the truth means battling bureaucracy, political pressure, and media silence.
|
---
| Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4a4ac7ed1e&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Guy Ciarrocchi: They did not cut Medicaid (for better or worse)](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ef2b65d487&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Medicaid spending is set to increase in 2026 by 6.8 percent. It will grow by the same amount in 2027, too.

Those are facts. The “big, beautiful bill” doesn’t reduce spending in 2026 or 2027. Many of the reforms don’t even take effect until January 2027. And, the cost restructuring — placing more burdens on states to design their own plans — doesn’t begin until 2031.

All of the yelling, theatrics, and warnings of death are built on misinformation, lies, or cynical politicians trying to gain political power. They do not care that innocent people — seniors, families with children, or the disabled — might become frightened. It’s just a cost of doing business for the Left and their quest for an insatiable, ever-growing, ever more powerful federal government.

**Why It Matters**. The sad political reality is that the Left talks about death and despair as a rhetorical tool. To grab attention. To instill fear. To try to pull voters away from Trump and the GOP.

Plus, many on the Left are screaming about “cuts” to avoid what they’re really defending, but won’t say out loud.

What they are really angry about are the reforms in the “big, beautiful bill.” The Left hates any limits being placed on the scope of the budgets of their pet projects. There are reforms in the bill that slow the growth, ensure that the money spent goes only to those truly deserving and in need, and that money is not wasted. (By the way, when the economy grows, and more poor people get jobs and don’t need Medicaid — and, therefore, less money is needed for Medicaid — that’s a good thing for everyone.) **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=61aca38847&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Do one job and do it right](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=99358908a2&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Kyle Sammin_
No one in the Philadelphia area is likely to be a big fan of Bill Belichick, but plenty of people in our region will nod in agreement with the former Pats’ coach’s quotidian mantra of “[Do your jo](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6e0acad559&e=b7b3eddce2)[b](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=37c19f21b0&e=b7b3eddce2).”

It’s a pretty simple concept: when you have a task in life, whether it be at home or at work, just do the thing you’re supposed to do. Do it. Then, when it’s done and everything is as it should be, you have time to take on other tasks that you may find more enjoyable.

“Do your job” is what many government employees need to hear when, even as their primary missions are failing, they insist on taking on more responsibilities in the social justice arena.

**Why It Matters**. Why are we doing this to ourselves? Why let public institutions degrade?

It is partly a problem of governmental cowardice – everyone in Harrisburg and the county seats is afraid to cut funding for anything. So they just pour more money into sections of government that are not only not getting the job done, but are increasingly uninterested in even trying — not if trying comes at the cost of not doing all the new trendy stuff.

The employees themselves are the issue here in many cases: instead of the people funding it making decisions, the staff are. And the staff wants to do what is rewarding to the staff, whether the customers (us and our children) agree or not. Librarians and schoolteachers used to be staid professionals, not political activists. They weren’t looking to start a revolution, they were trying to educate and elevate the next generation of Americans. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bad8735818&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Audio: Voice messages reveal orchestrated effort to oust St. Joe’s math professor over racial reparations tweet](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bb3439d2ac&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Richard F. Kosich: The sanctuary county](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b6398cfe94&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Trump, McCormick unveil $90B AI and energy investment pledge for Pennsylvania](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6467fcdfcb&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[David Sanko: Local roads and bridges left out of Shapiro’s massive mass transit funding bill](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7beba0ce71&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: An organized retail theft story](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f8cb965e9c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Joshua Phillips: The hidden harm of legalizing marijuana use — why libertarians should oppose SB 120](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=01b8e1ddc3&e=b7b3eddce2)**

|
# **4\. The future of A.I. starts in PA**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f8e29190b6&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| | Guy Ciarrocchi weighs in on PA's role as the hub of American innovation in A.I.

_Broad + Liberty'_ s Lani Ebbert was on the ground in Pittsburgh at this week's PA Energy and Innovation Summit bringing you exclusive clips and interviews from the conference. [[Watch More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f4beed1b79&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
A year ago, a would-be assassin changed the course of the 2024 campaign and, with it, the course of American history. Christopher Caldwell looked back this week on Donald Trump’s brush with death in Butler, Pennsylvania, in [an essay at _UnHerd_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=66221923cc&e=b7b3eddce2) and posits that the shooting added an emotional valence to a theme that was already at work. “An argument persisted on the campaign trail that summer over whether Trump was being righteously held to account for his own corruption, or persecuted by adversaries who were corrupt themselves. The bullet fired at Trump settled that controversy. Not in any logical way, of course. But in an emotional way it validated the notion that ‘they’ — meaning something in society and the spirit of the times — were out to destroy Trump.” It is worth remembering all that is at stake in our politics, and how close we came to the national chaos that would have surely descended had that one deranged individual succeeded in his plans to murder the once and future president.
---

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | | | Broad + Liberty ’s Todd Shepherd was awarded first place in the investigative reporting category in the 2025 Keystone Media Awards, one of Pennsylvania’s most competitive and respected contests recognizing excellence in journalism. The Keystone Media Awards received over 2,500 entries from news outlets across Pennsylvania. Broad + Liberty competed in Division I—the category for the state’s largest publications, including the Inquirer and Pittsburgh Post-Gazette. Read all about it . | What happens when government documents accidentally fall into a reporter’s hands? And why do some explosive stories never make the front page? On the + Liberty 's Todd Shepherd takes us inside the world of investigative reporting in Pennsylvania — where exposing the truth means battling bureaucracy, political pressure, and media silence. | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Guy Ciarrocchi Medicaid spending is set to increase in 2026 by 6.8 percent. It will grow by the same amount in 2027, too. Those are facts. The “big, beautiful bill” doesn’t reduce spending in 2026 or 2027. Many of the reforms don’t even take effect until January 2027. And, the cost restructuring — placing more burdens on states to design their own plans — doesn’t begin until 2031. All of the yelling, theatrics, and warnings of death are built on misinformation, lies, or cynical politicians trying to gain political power. They do not care that innocent people — seniors, families with children, or the disabled — might become frightened. It’s just a cost of doing business for the Left and their quest for an insatiable, ever-growing, ever more powerful federal government. Why It Matters. The sad political reality is that the Left talks about death and despair as a rhetorical tool. To grab attention. To instill fear. To try to pull voters away from Trump and the GOP. Plus, many on the Left are screaming about “cuts” to avoid what they’re really defending, but won’t say out loud. What they are really angry about are the reforms in the “big, beautiful bill.” The Left hates any limits being placed on the scope of the budgets of their pet projects. There are reforms in the bill that slow the growth, ensure that the money spent goes only to those truly deserving and in need, and that money is not wasted. (By the way, when the economy grows, and more poor people get jobs and don’t need Medicaid — and, therefore, less money is needed for Medicaid — that’s a good thing for everyone.) | | 2. By Kyle Sammin No one in the Philadelphia area is likely to be a big fan of Bill Belichick, but plenty of people in our region will nod in agreement with the former Pats’ coach’s quotidian mantra of “.” It’s a pretty simple concept: when you have a task in life, whether it be at home or at work, just do the thing you’re supposed to do. Do it. Then, when it’s done and everything is as it should be, you have time to take on other tasks that you may find more enjoyable. “Do your job” is what many government employees need to hear when, even as their primary missions are failing, they insist on taking on more responsibilities in the social justice arena. Why It Matters. Why are we doing this to ourselves? Why let public institutions degrade? It is partly a problem of governmental cowardice – everyone in Harrisburg and the county seats is afraid to cut funding for anything. So they just pour more money into sections of government that are not only not getting the job done, but are increasingly uninterested in even trying — not if trying comes at the cost of not doing all the new trendy stuff. The employees themselves are the issue here in many cases: instead of the people funding it making decisions, the staff are. And the staff wants to do what is rewarding to the staff, whether the customers (us and our children) agree or not. Librarians and schoolteachers used to be staid professionals, not political activists. They weren’t looking to start a revolution, they were trying to educate and elevate the next generation of Americans. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. The future of A.I. starts in PA | | | Guy Ciarrocchi weighs in on PA's role as the hub of American innovation in A.I. Broad + Liberty' s Lani Ebbert was on the ground in Pittsburgh at this week's PA Energy and Innovation Summit bringing you exclusive clips and interviews from the conference. ] | 5\. What we're reading A year ago, a would-be assassin changed the course of the 2024 campaign and, with it, the course of American history. Christopher Caldwell looked back this week on Donald Trump’s brush with death in Butler, Pennsylvania, in and posits that the shooting added an emotional valence to a theme that was already at work. “An argument persisted on the campaign trail that summer over whether Trump was being righteously held to account for his own corruption, or persecuted by adversaries who were corrupt themselves. The bullet fired at Trump settled that controversy. Not in any logical way, of course. But in an emotional way it validated the notion that ‘they’ — meaning something in society and the spirit of the times — were out to destroy Trump.” It is worth remembering all that is at stake in our politics, and how close we came to the national chaos that would have surely descended had that one deranged individual succeeded in his plans to murder the once and future president. | | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. body:
The poll also found that Ciattarelli’s false attacks are working
| Another poll just came out showing Mikie with a razor-thin lead over right-wing extremist Jack Ciattarelli heading into November’s election: 🔵 **Sherrill 47%
🔴 Ciattarelli 42%**
_Undecided/Other 11%_
—KA Consulting Survey of Registered New Jersey Voters The same poll also found that when people hear the lies that Ciattarelli is spreading about Mikie’s record, undecided voters break _heavily_ in Ciattarelli’s direction — in fact, he pulls _ahead_ of Mikie in the contest.

As we write this, Ciattarelli’s super PAC is spending over a million dollars to spread those lies across New Jersey in one attack ad after another — and this poll is a blaring warning sign that we can’t let these attacks go unanswered.

[Will you rush a split donation between Mikie’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project today to make sure voters learn the truth about Mikie’s record before Ciattarelli has the chance to pull ahead in this race?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92350?t=6&akid=20681%2E878179%2Er05tue) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mikie Sherrill and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92351?t=7&akid=20681%2E878179%2Er05tue)

Ciattarelli and his deep-pocketed MAGA super PAC clearly think their path to the governorship is to smear Mikie’s record before Mikie has a chance to fight back. It’s our job to make sure they don’t succeed.

[Anything you split today between Mikie’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project will have a major impact — and it will meaningfully increase our chances of holding onto our narrow lead in this margin-of-error race.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92350?t=12&akid=20681%2E878179%2Er05tue)

Mikie Sherrill HQ

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Team AOTL
subject: In case you missed it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Did you catch this important message from Art?

Hey Peter,
Last week, All On The Line’s Deputy Director of Litigation, Art Mitchell, sent an email talking about the Voting Rights Act (VRA).
Understanding the VRA and threats against it is at the center of the fight for fair maps. The VRA has been under attack since its inception, but it's become particularly vulnerable since the Supreme Court’s Shelby County decision.
Take a moment to read Art’s message below, and if you’re able, donate to All On The Line to power our fight for equal representation and our work to end partisan gerrymandering.
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111789031/558425290/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_HistVRALift_email_20250720-AOTL-Tier1-HistVRALift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250720-AOTL-Tier1-HistVRALift_&utm_campaign=HistVRALift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1ODA0MDc3LTY5NjUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q0Z6P_XWL8m7sJf29Wa24qZ5Scz5SzMgF4nzBBnkXTw=)
---
Thanks,
Team AOTL
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Art Mitchell, All On The Line
Date: Wednesday, July 16, 2025
Subject: We need to talk about the Voting Rights Act
> Folks,
> There’s no ensuring fair maps without protecting equal access to the ballot box. But one of the tools created to advance and defend the voting rights of Black and Brown communities is under attack.
> **The Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA) was a landmark legislation** that finally created a robust safeguard against discrimination and disenfranchisement in our elections and established strong tools to deliver on the promise of fair representation with fair district lines.
> **For decades, the Voting Rights Act made a measurable impact in protecting the voting power of marginalized voters.**
> But all that changed with the Supreme Court’s disastrous decision in _Shelby County_. The Court’s ruling gutted Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act, taking away key protections and making it easier for states to discriminate against voters of color.
> Since then, anti-democracy forces have used and abused the courts, bringing case after case to advance a dangerous agenda that threatens the ability of certain voters to make their voices heard — and undermines the very foundations of our democracy.
> As you read this, ongoing cases in Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana are taking aim at other sections of the VRA, threatening to deprive voters of the chance to elect leaders who truly represent them.
> **Throughout these attacks on the Voting Rights Act, All On the Line has been there every step of the way, working tirelessly to defend voting rights and fair representation across the country.** Supporters like you make it possible for us to keep up the fight. As their attacks continue — and we know they will — we are committed to mobilizing our grassroots movement in support of fair maps and fair representation across the country.
> **[Today, we’re asking you to make a grassroots donation to power our critical work to protect the Voting Rights Act, stop partisan gerrymandering, and defend our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111789032/558425291/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_HistVRALift_email_20250720-AOTL-Tier1-HistVRALift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250720-AOTL-Tier1-HistVRALift_&utm_campaign=HistVRALift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1ODA0MDc3LTY5NjUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q0Z6P_XWL8m7sJf29Wa24qZ5Scz5SzMgF4nzBBnkXTw=)**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Did you catch this important message from Art? Hey Peter, Last week, All On The Line’s Deputy Director of Litigation, Art Mitchell, sent an email talking about the Voting Rights Act (VRA). Understanding the VRA and threats against it is at the center of the fight for fair maps. The VRA has been under attack since its inception, but it's become particularly vulnerable since the Supreme Court’s Shelby County decision. Take a moment to read Art’s message below, and if you’re able, donate to All On The Line to power our fight for equal representation and our work to end partisan gerrymandering. = Thanks, Team AOTL \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Art Mitchell, All On The Line Date: Wednesday, July 16, 2025 Subject: We need to talk about the Voting Rights Act Folks, There’s no ensuring fair maps without protecting equal access to the ballot box. But one of the tools created to advance and defend the voting rights of Black and Brown communities is under attack. The Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA) was a landmark legislation that finally created a robust safeguard against discrimination and disenfranchisement in our elections and established strong tools to deliver on the promise of fair representation with fair district lines. For decades, the Voting Rights Act made a measurable impact in protecting the voting power of marginalized voters. But all that changed with the Supreme Court’s disastrous decision in Shelby County. The Court’s ruling gutted Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act, taking away key protections and making it easier for states to discriminate against voters of color. Since then, anti-democracy forces have used and abused the courts, bringing case after case to advance a dangerous agenda that threatens the ability of certain voters to make their voices heard — and undermines the very foundations of our democracy. As you read this, ongoing cases in Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana are taking aim at other sections of the VRA, threatening to deprive voters of the chance to elect leaders who truly represent them. Throughout these attacks on the Voting Rights Act, All On the Line has been there every step of the way, working tirelessly to defend voting rights and fair representation across the country. Supporters like you make it possible for us to keep up the fight. As their attacks continue — and we know they will — we are committed to mobilizing our grassroots movement in support of fair maps and fair representation across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: --- = | = = | = = | = All the best, Art Arthur Mitchell Deputy Director of Litigation, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Please take action (via StateDemocrats.com)
subject: To: Supreme Court Justices Sonia Sotomayor, Elena Kagan, and Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
In the face of growing right-wing extremism and deeply troubling decisions from the conservative majority, your powerful dissents have been a beacon of hope.
#

**TO:** _Supreme Court Justices Sonia Sotomayor, Elena Kagan, and Ketanji Brown Jackson_ **FROM:** dpwillis67@gmail.com __
_Dear Justices Sotomayor, Kagan, and Jackson:_ _Thank you for your unwavering commitment to justice, equality, and the Constitution._ _In the face of growing right-wing extremism and deeply troubling decisions from the conservative majority, your powerful dissents have been a beacon of hope. Our highest court must stand with the American people, not a political agenda._ _Your voices speak for the millions of Americans who believe in the rule of law, in basic freedoms, and in a country where every person should be treated with fairness and dignity._ _Thank you for standing strong. We support you. And we are so grateful for your leadership in these challenging times._ _Respectfully,_ _Your Name Here_ **[CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-scotus-letter-july25?t=1&akid=9143%2E614464%2EM0i1Ii)**

| | Friend, What is Kamala doing? Here is yet another article published this week talking about how she gets “a glimmer in her eyes” about entering the governor’s race.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Let me be honest with you, Friend – who does she think she is? She has an “end-of-summer deadline” to decide if she’s going to run? Does she think she can lounge by the pool all summer and then get crowned governor? No! Becoming governor isn’t a consolation prize for running a failed presidential campaign. She has been in California politics for 20 years, and I can’t even name one accomplishment she’s done. I’ve been traveling all around the state talking with REAL Californians about the challenges they face – the challenges that Democrats like Kamala Harris created during the last 15 years of Democrat one-party rule. Trust me, they don’t want Kamala. If she does run, we will beat her. She has the liberal mega-donors and the unions, but I have you. REAL everyday Americans who know that California is ready for a change and the Democrats can’t fix the mess they created. Watch my full reaction to this below:
---
[ **WATCH** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
It’s time to Make California Golden Again, and I need you with me. Your support is critical. [Can you chip in $5, $10, or any amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)? Let’s show Kamala how serious our movement to Make California Golden Again is.
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Steve Hilton**
---
Republican Candidate for Governor of California

| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAOqnPSP99t2unzOvLXz0b4zeiyA0P1vdrCxAmJdeaXYlRxdaSpyiCVaOh4_BxMlAMoxeWoMzM-jrGTFJnMU0YajLq-JvO00c3teUJF_TmDV7dg-Qzcv-RDwPd_cD_ocrpLMHkCqUsiGUiErbOqHR9I3edQ8TNqx4we60KCDCQmXlP6SGvT-5RAiyb7uOxYwRraXX4s5w1J8nVc-DwXJyWyYt2R6H1JEWcS5pX45tde0uNrmCBtSQsnu9VN5b9C-T8K9Fdfnb13abSaH6kRb3J4NpAUUvTxHfIvs-Pk5r-JdkaLloefOCBiwHyOA8FUYeN1KeA7YS_z0wr_l_JL3-9RanecDPnC9OhhkzFfR8baJmFlqFvd10dEDG-LT3BWPmILF-FaWEFPb4rjEaOgKIYeRRGurlr_0KM96GC2OXDe0c/4ic/z3HGVujQS1WMTSyfwUTBKw/h0/h001.klSMTQPQT_uh2ZlO__HXfrlUgUZNYpRLlsnCkfX8jHM)

📢 **_Democrats Take a Stand:_ State Legislative Leaders Speak Out Against GOP’s “Screw The States” Law **
This week, the DLCC hosted a press conference with key state leaders unpacking how Dems are bracing for the impact of Republicans’ disastrous budget law. The contrast in state leadership could not be clearer, as the GOP’s extreme legislation will hurt communities nationwide. [Watch the press conference here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mpZwnrnKbY7vlihkGQe2mQThxGSpC9WGNLtsGJ7QToDVH0nWSs6ALcCtSkHH0CI8LoFd9UW_Dy_v-tG4rGqCnMl4w7PVunEVdYiskxDd8B133I5Q1VK74gXW6fEZJeew8EvuqarI5XktxNGVfdILjCg6iCHSAbpsx65EsCyzswVry0Mjed2kg6fquXJtfO-veVwJrwVHIlXgoH2S1ycZrvuGd9S5pK3OA7p_bo4IYDAo5thYfKWjWWcopddGgikbf66nqnfDHW-G3CYawan1pwhl6vgefXa-JIapVbLOQzYtkAtue3UBDQ7mhOltkvB2RGsdd3j4FeKU7BkNfiYhhUSxfGSizlLmA8GvahRjtRiNRKsFbxNO3evM_jqI4CK7OoJhzd6NCzSK3XdUKgZslrDNpvzoBapqRA_T7vp2K3BRQzz7hMNVaRrRorK-iPBXqPWXqdHjXiX8_k2psR7aWIrEibUhXTex0JiUh78h7cplcaG710otsmMrBDpZkKBqyQNxA0pfkbIc3In2lU6PERWGGl8qM8ktX1kYKcfa5oBsWHrDMqHXI1o26m1_ja9snQ/4ic/z3HGVujQS1WMTSyfwUTBKw/h1/h001.lH92o9U9etlSvumDf8eYzePSsSPwYBcCs2-QRdeYUK4)
🚨 **_GOP Extremism Alert:_ Iowa Republican Candidate spews hateful rhetoric and harmful conspiracies **
While Iowa is bracing for a consequential special election next month where Democrats have an opportunity to break the Republican supermajority, the GOP has named its nominee to compete for the seat: [this lawmaker has compared abortion rights to the Holocaust, spread election denial narratives, and claims climate change is a lie → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.T4f1s0H8aL8dqpmq959YtBtvQVxsb4kr3ngX5V2wXoiK4ND_kMO-ktpm99O-2qkDaYIl06qphl6VSBpVlE9upWCSrT_9cKhxEHJhXmVh21aH9Oia3F77eYYW_x2R7zruuqTE-1Jdas_AHAgJu6CDOuiqG0rIdeMA_-LrP25D35bZNRVAFzYV2a98olyKMvSEnsK-HFxlqzhCp6jU2IEkZYQkPCCq9BjKxGaltNKwYr3lKEatJt7uLUflEya4UIIR5AeJIQA4TTB5e5EXM4ROEPR5ghgo02xwsRVfORszH1VM5-8SEdbeiJsbEjncU-OOLdQamP3nVqXDo45wgd9RUpb-2FUTiC3lU7qtsS7ze9xCpYOsWgcQyeZ0WdMloOGjTsekRcz0dsUsQRKnQ3quxe-DTbNc5507QG2lqS-cbeGNWZYE5qaPaAy8uBas023t0eNckL7ckTYuqlTNlKhkcbVsZ9CmPyoLx7SHIeUe7MLM6qjfyRO2ro6iaZ8GBO8ffhRPtxzaEFdmKVs2hH0zWw990mpjGrnNGr9YXT_GMxAPZf3pe5zml57bLeRqPrRbd_lXEknNAJ0dBfds3mop0eL8lKkxFNexPpLr8ld3eVAdIL0klWnnd3A8uO4DoNeCmAbrWgU-8T_SmOvGi-qu8w/4ic/z3HGVujQS1WMTSyfwUTBKw/h2/h001.WLvHdjgAH6xBCCffc1V1vsUtNgDfy9kMoHj0PpA0gro)
🗳️ **_Virginia:_ Dems prepare for statewide elections & DLCC Hosts Virginia Strategy Update **
In the face of Washington Republicans’ chaos, Virginia Democrats are ready to defend and expand a one-seat majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. Virginia Democrats are already on the ground in their communities, connecting with voters who deserve leaders who will speak out against extremism and work to find solutions that serve the Commonwealth. [Learn more about the DLCC Strategy Update → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pA9SxAbrdc408cNVoiEJg3q-t4xNFH0Jb7ZUIE38iDzp4rGIl4PnddenjAxiv1zMisAVQam76FOAs_DqBybINDMxrlxa7I1YJbvFwPfcQVYwsLz0iCGItcUV_pzYz8JROpy5weIqX2pufEMFVxbkplhRWkBZNdmS9hhSI6Il-yu1ncbEVUtCCFI6Y6PWSpYnQpV8Viph6cuG-AS97k2Z8kC1iWJKwury0lzql--zGX48NOJuWH6ziEsUaD9q6ZPuwwtzDqmqeeO4vUqoO4neab8cOYhTR02CciVNJ7uvcttSo2oqzpJsqU8bjX7iHALWKA69AZNL2w_-SpQ74Uz4ORTlpFzUv7NEerzB3umRiq108sZ3VCt7SLRK9A1DYnAZwvASAEN1_v14ZBC_KLSTteGbhfavFK8gfk9qohAJua4QikgeP6sb-413jgbAmo-SduMLjisSArstqWuJBMeYJ4a2t3KgaKRq7K7orfB0cr3_b4TK2HLBwAFw-iRALEGFI7av6zAIOJbc6-Iza9n6YL6zUVj7UwN42C0SLXbB60jfoOLvaSz9tm6Jmz0kP_zYm1WgXcPdv86ZbAKoUaoGPeIBQ2snL2IJ9mWGV7UDO0qbQ/4ic/z3HGVujQS1WMTSyfwUTBKw/h3/h001.6UOVdodxzy4ckKc_alKwsEPLEx8OLiNUdtq4WsgcNKE)
🔦 **_Spotlight:_ Kimberly Pope Adams prepares for a consequential election ahead **
The DLCC announced Kimberly Pope Adams as a Spotlight Candidate in her extremely competitive race for a seat in the Virginia House. She is running again to flip her Virginia House district blue after mounting an incredibly strong campaign in 2023 that came within _just 53 votes_ of unseating a Republican incumbent. [Learn more about Kimberly Pope Adams here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW7iyz3WnsgDWJUDLbGMRg-mNA-FXdmOVyIsBy33jgu1_9-BTro5bwQV_8PQr2i-IdSCwj7bghIeTOAyvOTrkQ3nOSVcVDj-afDXKco8OZIgLN2FEa58oQjWnWMdVsY4IFexnRd0cnKn-xky0V-w9KlvoWM2Gg3gBF_E8jMp7IqPjq7l-XyFTeJW5-qsleQG9PkBI0hxddHd-M6NoS479L9eoVNU7vZMPHtDW7QTHzv_M8m5KI5PTecuO4dXd5NwDTb2oCHcIwZD0albSxlsK_1ObVnFUmkXCL9TjqmLsWGWk3wJEKnsX4obRm1vNFrJ63__VPEGAy0Qoaxwm9Cg6TLpvQEV0iXTmIhbKnD_MGIxXVWXBr7q8nj8xq_ku1O0Tl1peS7ZXVB5gOflJ6xmgQz8pu1DytYF9mbQ4-3JU0IdcVzQ_DDloTpmZGPBVEw5M7C_Ca21KWeLQwpaK2WpJiB9zDrNTslNuqOwFcLS6k3QTKG7bvmDzlIFvfSaSREUxfjU94vhITEaVVnaxIXxSkyTFvn2A_7zSg1Ae1Z38IMUSyVkmv_v5AtBz2OK81wwWF7i9QKIaKlShIGpnB2Amo0E/4ic/z3HGVujQS1WMTSyfwUTBKw/h4/h001.HcPrXPoyqOzxwOoPlCRgV4aLmMCCFikM7jJmta5GtPg)
🛡️** _Down Ballot Defenders Summit:_ Missed the event? Here’s what you need to know **
We hosted our first-ever Down Ballot Defenders Summit earlier this month, and we noticed you didn’t join the call. There are more events like this on the horizon, but you won’t want to miss the incredible insight that our legislative leaders shared on the webinar. [**Watch the recording here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvycxh5Y2xAfkchfuIMtSbTjmp0mkZrulGT83UPrwKJngkEznh0AXT8vdsXJfLPNQ-nEFFhs2CYovaugSPT8V7IYP47hgjPq40T8S3TS-VGFTWy6WUvgJv1iWzAihYx2OOGkAzyOu9D_tPFkQoHyayK0QPcRCnqM-XbSwsIOxtVa1K80TQeMUV4E19U1E0Ts8B7iRMU7KCuD9xZPoMOWWcnWJQZv0Xx-qpBj9U4Vj0Oo1N6yndZXz4ZnSDhzpHFAm7DoURIUWu0M4nEkkDM63uqmaiqSJrFET-y-289bWMas0Ira4_UuRgxaTHDl_uiVdPbUE-jqqgT96ueGqUX00zv4ejiZtv3IdsHkQUXq9nZh2yRqAPd250jjZqpJAue_tYLG8eNSlLU9qs5ob9IRnJQFrLiq4OH2VQE68ZalAKmjtmmNOPFs7z_pX6fHHj16gDEXlm-s0TeUvgdIeGzxF9-EloTEIEHf67MR86FvG6pjvNH0wCk3FQjzNFIfr57Ul7J6__1mcevWZq2DqFFV2W8kIWXEGvswIHBxmZGfqcFyw/4ic/z3HGVujQS1WMTSyfwUTBKw/h5/h001.-OtqY5HXDvYB_YiAPYTk8IcpavRBdz2C6LfKEuYZQyk)
**🗳️ _Upcoming elections:_ Democrats work to build progressive power **
State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. [**With Trump and his MAGA allies assaulting our democracy, Democrats are making key investments to elect state legislators who can block the MAGA agenda. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, July 20th, 2025. | | | | | | 📢 Democrats Take a Stand: State Legislative Leaders Speak Out Against GOP’s “Screw The States” Law This week, the DLCC hosted a press conference with key state leaders unpacking how Dems are bracing for the impact of Republicans’ disastrous budget law. The contrast in state leadership could not be clearer, as the GOP’s extreme legislation will hurt communities nationwide. 🚨 GOP Extremism Alert: Iowa Republican Candidate spews hateful rhetoric and harmful conspiracies While Iowa is bracing for a consequential special election next month where Democrats have an opportunity to break the Republican supermajority, the GOP has named its nominee to compete for the seat: 🗳️ Virginia: Dems prepare for statewide elections & DLCC Hosts Virginia Strategy Update In the face of Washington Republicans’ chaos, Virginia Democrats are ready to defend and expand a one-seat majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. Virginia Democrats are already on the ground in their communities, connecting with voters who deserve leaders who will speak out against extremism and work to find solutions that serve the Commonwealth. 🔦 Spotlight: Kimberly Pope Adams prepares for a consequential election ahead The DLCC announced Kimberly Pope Adams as a Spotlight Candidate in her extremely competitive race for a seat in the Virginia House. She is running again to flip her Virginia House district blue after mounting an incredibly strong campaign in 2023 that came within just 53 votes of unseating a Republican incumbent. 🛡️ Down Ballot Defenders Summit: Missed the event? Here’s what you need to know We hosted our first-ever Down Ballot Defenders Summit earlier this month, and we noticed you didn’t join the call. There are more events like this on the horizon, but you won’t want to miss the incredible insight that our legislative leaders shared on the webinar. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. | | 🤝 MAHA VOICES UNITE IN INSPIRING SUMMIT
# Rallying a Health Revolution
Last week, over 450 advocates and thought leaders gathered for the MAHA Action virtual summit, uniting voices for urgent health and food policy reform. From Policy Wins to the Road Ahead Speakers like Tony Robbins, Dr. Mehmet Oz, Russell Brand, Calley Means, and Dr. Aseem Malhotra emphasized the need to challenge big pharma and big agro. They covered several recent MAHA-driven victories that include:
* Kraft Heinz and PepsiCo removing artificial dyes and chemicals from products
* Stronger national dietary guidelines for safety
* Increased attention and funding for autism research
* COVID mRNA vaccine removed from the childhood vaccine schedule

Independent media and grassroots action remain critical to sustaining moment and achieving lasting change. Check out the full recording of the MAHA Media Hub to hear from the champions and visionaries of the MAHA movement. [](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=MmfJmO4LoKoPBjIZqPhddfxsEkzspI7zFgSYW4iY3-ZokQPzwFfayOQ0-OMlXjDo_3EAO7sFQ6PzkDs4w7RZEw&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maha_media_summit_v001&n=4)

name: New Dems
subject: FWD: Stand with Hakeem Jeffries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Add your name now >>

| **The fight for working families is heating up, and Hakeem Jeffries and New Dems are on the frontlines.**

Earlier this month, Republicans passed the largest cut to Medicaid in U.S. history — _stripping healthcare from millions of low-income families, seniors, and children._

Now, they’re setting their sights on silencing one of our strongest voices for justice: Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries.

**The GOP is using their narrow majority to push an agenda that hurts working families,** and they're trying to intimidate leaders like Jeffries who speak out.

That’s why New Dems are standing shoulder to shoulder with Hakeem Jeffries. But to push back effectively, we need a wave of public support to show the GOP we won't be silenced.

[**Will you add your name right now to stand with Hakeem Jeffries, New Dems, and commit to helping flip the House in 2026?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111800280/558452499/-2031390707?refcode=NDCAF_20250720_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2M2MDJkOS03MTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gGOTsoTf8SA1PoE7RNj9M0Sny1vuOejPm0o3FiAibMc=&emci=2c406681-0664-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=acc602d9-7165-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772) | [ADD YOUR NAME: STAND WITH HAKEEM JEFFRIES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111800282/558452501/-2031390707?refcode=NDCAF_20250720_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2M2MDJkOS03MTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gGOTsoTf8SA1PoE7RNj9M0Sny1vuOejPm0o3FiAibMc=&emci=2c406681-0664-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=acc602d9-7165-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: He wants us to be afraid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, it’s Jon.
Before I was elected, I led a team of investigative journalists rooting out corruption and exposing war crimes all over the world.
We worked in places where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses have to meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
_Under Donald Trump, we are seeing the very same thing happen in America._
I’m hearing it from people at every level. Including powerful people, those with status and resources.
They come to my office and tell me they’re afraid to say anything.
They’re afraid of retribution, investigation, destruction. They’re afraid of vengeance from their own government.
Fear is the currency of tyranny.
So it’s no coincidence that in the same bill that defunded hospitals to cut taxes for the rich, they made the budget for mass deportations larger than the FBI, ATF, DEA, and the Bureau of Prisons combined.
It’ll be the largest domestic police force in American history. The ones with masks.
Peter, do you remember when JD Vance gave a whole big lecture to foreign leaders in Europe about free speech?
Now, JD Vance will throw you in a Homeland Security dungeon for writing an op-ed he doesn’t like.
What’s happening to our country right now should _chill us to the bone._
***
Donald Trump wants the whole country to fear him.
He’s attacking the freedom of the press, he’s enlisting intelligence contractors to harvest our data and profile us, and he’s _still_ working to undermine elections.
**This descent into an un-American America must be stopped._We must regain Congressional power and hold Trump accountable.**_
And this Senate race in Georgia is critical.
I’m the ONLY Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won. That means I’m MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. They know if they win in Georgia, they hold the Senate.
**Help me beat them again, just like we did in 2021.**
[**Please, make a $5 contribution to my campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250720-1-subs&t=1&akid=558%2E5691347%2Ei8oNGx)
Thank you!
Jon

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=2&akid=558%2E5691347%2Ei8oNGx) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=558%2E5691347%2Ei8oNGx) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

This demonstrates the lunacy of the radical left.

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Josh Weil
subject: One coffee, two tariffs ☕
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This espresso was strong, and so was the message I heard from the owner of this bakery:
Tariffs are crushing small businesses, Friend.
I’m Josh Weil, candidate for U.S. Senate, reaching out to ask for your support for my campaign as I work to help small businesses all over Florida, just like this bakery.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/64386A356177384C396A472B646734626B506B3278506C4A4533794F4A475A685674484552594F7A53483156776A6E4278784269694D2F6242304B532F426838/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-20%20at%209.34.29%E2%80%AFAM.png]
From the price of imported ingredients to the cost of equipment, these trade policies aren't helping everyday Americans, they’re hurting the people who actually keep our communities running.
Meanwhile, Washington politicians hand out exemptions to their friends and donors, while local businesses are forced to raise prices or shut their doors.
We need a smarter approach, one that puts workers and small businesses first. Because right now the government doesn’t represent the people, it represents the millionaires bankrolling policy.
If you're with me in fighting for economic policies that work for Florida, not just the ultra-rich:
Donate Now to make aid the fight. We must hit our end of week goal to keep this up!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Every coffee shop, every bakery, every family-run store deserves a seat at the table and I intend to make sure they get it.
Are you with me?
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

Jacksonville, FL 32207

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: 3 key facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39908%2E3422442%2EF6laJp)
Dear Peter,
We know you get a lot of emails, so we’ll make this quick. Here are 3 things you might not know about the California Governor’s race:
1. **Gavin Newsom is termed out.** With no incumbent, this race is wide open, and weird things can happen.
2. **Republicans are competitive.** Polls have shown that almost half of Californians are open to voting for a Republican, with one poll even showing a Republican candidate _leading_ in this race.
3. **Donation limits are much higher than in federal races.** California has one of the highest limits in the country, with individuals (or even a corporation) able to donate almost $40,000 to a single candidate in both the primary and general election.

Unlike other candidates, Katie has fueled every single one of her campaigns with grassroots donations, and she’s keeping the promises she made to voters.
**[Will you please consider making a $5 donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250720_1_ak?refcode=em20250720-39908&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39908_3422442_F6laJp&akid=39908%2E3422442%2EF6laJp)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250720_1_ak?refcode=em20250720-39908&refcode2=39908_3422442_F6laJp&akid=39908%2E3422442%2EF6laJp)
—Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250720-39908&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39908_3422442_F6laJp&akid=39908%2E3422442%2EF6laJp)**

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Wes Moore
subject: 🦀 Maryland 🦀
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=335%2E1086043%2EDles-k ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=335%2E1086043%2EDles-k ]Wes Moore for Governor

Maryland is full of unique culture, Peter,
but sometimes people will crab boil us down
to a bunch of stereotypes.

They say Marylanders are obsessed with our fresh crabs, wear our state
flag any chance we get, and put Old Bay on everything. 🦀

And while they might be right, there’s Balti–more to being a Marylander
than that.

Marylanders look out for each other, and we’re proud of the resilience of
our communities and the opportunities we have for our people.

Like I always say, Maryland is a state where we Leave No One Behind.

It’s why we’re investing in our public schools, making it easier for folks
to get the supports they deserve with the Maryland Benefits One
Application, and fighting for work, wages, and wealth for every
Marylander.

clean_body: [ ]Wes Moore for Governor[ ]Wes Moore for Governor Maryland is full of unique culture, Peter, but sometimes people will crab boil us down to a bunch of stereotypes. They say Marylanders are obsessed with our fresh crabs, wear our state flag any chance we get, and put Old Bay on everything. 🦀 And while they might be right, there’s Balti–more to being a Marylander than that. Marylanders look out for each other, and we’re proud of the resilience of our communities and the opportunities we have for our people. Like I always say, Maryland is a state where we Leave No One Behind. It’s why we’re investing in our public schools, making it easier for folks to get the supports they deserve with the Maryland Benefits One Application, and fighting for work, wages, and wealth for every Marylander. [ ]Right now, we are working around the clock to make Maryland — the state that we know and love — even better. Will you pitch in to help us Orange Crush 🍊 our fundraising goals? name: Rep. LaMonica McIver
subject: I pleaded not guilty
body:
They are continuing to try to intimidate me, exhaust me, drain my resources and stop me from doing the work I was elected to do. Well, they won’t. I will not fold.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gy_3tqegOFAH8gpv8zNzw1DnLCr6QI7XjKwzFEbrNt2ePO1Wl1oPA3R9kWcaqr3lqvOwaQMciKJbQPz93KRNfYV-3fjbUqvepjzE30jzPDuc_CQfkNVGs5cjHnVCIoftF6pBYuFgL1ez_oxG2rYdBUD98UNTx50JFHULQbT1jPJfPJfb5K9JUNK_T4QzM57hpkyuoDzekRaYUTZftJmRZQ==&c=l2qyUxibwKdqGxMGIPouj6JHe_uocqxqGEtG6c3r-mref37WulTnUw==&ch=bT0yyDbLWoFx42RRfIkrX2Hsoz2S8OZ1pLDq-FjZcwp5XS7pLCOOEQ==)

| Peter,
I was at the courthouse recently where I pleaded not guilty to the Trump administration's baseless criminal charges against me.
They are continuing to try to intimidate me, exhaust me, drain my resources and stop me from doing the work I was elected to do. Well, they won't. I will not fold.
Let me be clear: under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my job and make sure that this administration wasn't violating people's rights.
Then, this administration decided to come after me because I dared to stand against their cruel agenda. I will not bow down to the Trump administration, but I need your help.
[Please split a donation between me and Defend Our Courts today to help me fight back against this baseless attack. We need another 3,321 donations before midnight to help amass the resources to win in court and send a message that Democrats won't back down.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gy_3tqegOFAH8gpv8zNzw1DnLCr6QI7XjKwzFEbrNt2ePO1Wl1oPA3R9kWcaqr3lqvOwaQMciKJbQPz93KRNfYV-3fjbUqvepjzE30jzPDuc_CQfkNVGs5cjHnVCIoftF6pBYuFgL1ez_oxG2rYdBUD98UNTx50JFHULQbT1jPJfPJfb5K9JUNK_T4QzM57hpkyuoDzekRbQrt9ZAoGxVg==&c=l2qyUxibwKdqGxMGIPouj6JHe_uocqxqGEtG6c3r-mref37WulTnUw==&ch=bT0yyDbLWoFx42RRfIkrX2Hsoz2S8OZ1pLDq-FjZcwp5XS7pLCOOEQ==)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s “lock him up” rhetoric has become real.
body:
Hi Peter — this is Adam Schiff. The Real Texas PAC said I could reach out with this urgent message:
Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.
Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072025_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072025_1]
Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot.
I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem.
Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and The Real Texas PAC to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072025_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Schiff and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072025_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072025_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072025_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072025_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072025_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=072025_1&amount=25]
Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.
But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever.
Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth.
He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will.
Please, rush a split donation to help me and The Real Texas PAC fight back today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072025_1]
Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator.
Thank you for standing with me,
Adam
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072025_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072025_1]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=9Fr8Q5tGM1h8tnXKCv9fjKxvFW24ooLWjES3xjvt6KB6BFgUx%2BzLsqbGMqGtjVqLsfe5bCJVUVkkwoWi4cN0xu%2Bma0dI6oO4yGWxXkmqoMH9Nu6hdBAFMEa5%2BvnpiMm2iLxEBNnp%2BUqvpZKQDsTFJkhRRechZF3E3iljWvA0qBtRtb9iS8nDrm0gZ24SaBrFsvB9rTKvlgLwHjnzxiRA983bdSpjxdc5Iik90j9r0FGCeQSEe6orpOJ9el1vXdZZeTeYBtwM9RZmxSuSHUHX20v%2F4d8Mzj%2Fegnn17A2cfN6E26tlUwKkr0H7pZbsMOgd%2By4WkIKYfZoMmycNZuI2CpsqF5mIZmnKqP05zE%2Bnt49RieDSkBpiybDk8eqWi4btCBNiC9DFy24Ix5xfo3UTeYM4kgMGVH9x%2FbM6tLp78QU%3D .

subject: The GOP is blanketing battleground states with ads

body:
Team Gillibrand is showing up early, organizing, and fighting back.
Team,

The GOP isn’t wasting a second. MAGA PACs are already blanketing battleground states with attack ads and misinformation to tip the scales before voters even tune in.

[**_Can you rush a contribution today to help us fight back early and flip the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111804273/558460322/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.20_GOP-Money_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDVjNmYyMi03ODY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8Sh4oQVNnUoTcIWULfEjrx3cCFrawaF4ywOhYREi3M=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111804274/558460323/246949951?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.20_GOP-Money_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDVjNmYyMi03ODY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8Sh4oQVNnUoTcIWULfEjrx3cCFrawaF4ywOhYREi3M=)

**Here’s the hard truth:** We have no margin of error in the race for the Senate majority.

These Republican super PACs are spending big right now to shape the narrative, define Democratic candidates and entrench their extremist agenda before we have a chance to respond.

A GOP super PAC is launching a $5 million ad blitz against Senator Jon Ossoff — and Republicans won’t stop there. Donald Trump has a $600 million war chest he’s ready to spend on battleground Senate races across the map.

**We don’t have the luxury of waiting until 2026 to get serious.** From Social Security and health care access, to voting rights and the future of our democracy, too much is on the line to let Republicans dominate the airwaves and silence our movement.

If we are going to flip the Senate, we need to show up early — and show up strong. That means organizing on the ground, investing in key races and building a movement that can compete dollar for dollar with the right-wing machine.

Our grassroots team has always been our greatest strength. Let’s put it to work. [**_Will you chip in whatever you can today to help us fight back and win the Senate majority?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111804279/558460328/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.20_GOP-Money_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDVjNmYyMi03ODY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8Sh4oQVNnUoTcIWULfEjrx3cCFrawaF4ywOhYREi3M=)

Together,

Kirsten Gillibrand

name: The Democrats
subject: You deserve to know...
body:
---
Derek, Today, we’re going to ask you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee. But first, we think you deserve to know how we will put your $3 contribution to work. Let us explain: Republicans in Congress passed the largest health care and food assistance cut in American history. **So Democrats are fighting back.** We launched our Organizing Summer program, the DNC’s **largest-ever investment in local organizing** , and as you read this email, volunteers across the country are working to register voters, spread the word about the harm Trump and his allies are inflicting on our country, and make sure people all over the country are ready to vote accordingly. This is on top of the _$1 million total monthly investment_ we are making in every state Democratic party — helping them build the year-round organizing structure that will be essential to winning races up and down the ballot this fall, and to taking back the House and Senate in 2026. And, in the meantime, we are fighting back in the courts — holding the Trump administration accountable for their efforts to suppress voters and disrupt our democratic processes. We know that the next elections might feel far away right now, but the truth is that the work to elect Democrats has already begun, and early donations allow us to hit the ground running in the races that matter most. **Every donation matters, and a LOT of our contributions come from grassroots supporters just like you, giving what they can in response to emails just like this.** [**So, Derek, could you give $3 to support our mission? Your donation will help us organize everywhere, uplift local Democrats, and support our legal team as they take on the Trump administration in court.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250720_3980_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3980_22930333_GaPOL6&akid=3980%2E22930333%2EGaPOL6) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250720_3980_fr&refcode2=3980_22930333_GaPOL6&akid=3980%2E22930333%2EGaPOL6)**

name: Congressman Louie Gohmert
subject: 50% off! Please join me in Denver, CO on August 9th!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Team Imer PAC and was not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
You are invited to join me and Team Imer in Denver, CO for a special evening celebrating the Golden Age of America...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XScVlUk_EWq_DnFO0uHzh70mchjinhXRhI7VXwnhUDlmTdo1nxKdGMXb7XXwbBmXttWj9ZH5cYag_NqHDx_tdN_W1Yek0fP0G0gLsYNBu_UbxugSXjPny9T-I0xZyOctjo5iGIfCTqY4UaNpyLGnLDmpiyZNh84KQlkS1hryTw-1GzZz0m8paCskdYhVe3X1sQsRuQs9uts2yJWKolQESE-6Nl1qSIXF10hYtIbDT000AWSHW6J-epU5eq1-N11x&c=mJgCqz2uJN0Lx_GowxjG1kmrWPt2BWMA-QEUjlHd1CfpVKZJFRSXkA==&ch=yjvdPQyzDrBi2sXU7M8PQb8SEr5bFUaFleobi1evA79gokkq2Q_OPA==)
---
---
| Friend, I would like to invite you to join me and Team Imer on Saturday, August 9th, in Denver, CO, for a special evening benefiting the critically important work Team Imer is doing in Colorado to preserve the America we all know and love.
During President Trump's second Inauguration back in January, I met Laurel and Weston Imer and was thrilled to hear of the work being done through the Team Imer PAC.
You know what the opposition has been doing in Colorado, which makes this effort all the more vital and urgent. We simply cannot write off Colorado when voters are waking up.
Joining all those who are helping Team Imer on August 9th, especially at this crucial time as we approach 2026, is a real pleasure for me.
I look so very forward to meeting you there, discussing the past, present and future, all while furthering the mission to help Colorado and America.
It can be difficult at times being a conservative and suffering the slings and arrows from hostile haters, as I well know, but this should be a grand occasion to discuss our victories and the work ahead.
For a limited time, tickets can be purchased at 50% off on the website below, and opportunities to join the host committee are still available.
Enter code: GOLDENAGE to recieve 50% off your tickets for a limited time only!
---
| [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XScVlUk_EWq_DnFO0uHzh70mchjinhXRhI7VXwnhUDlmTdo1nxKdGMXb7XXwbBmXttWj9ZH5cYag_NqHDx_tdN_W1Yek0fP0G0gLsYNBu_UbxugSXjPny9T-I0xZyOctjo5iGIfCTqY4UaNpyLGnLDmpiyZNh84KQlkS1hryTw-1GzZz0m8paCskdYhVe3X1sQsRuQs9uts2yJWKolQESE-6Nl1qSIXF10hYtIbDT02f2-TzgmXjAoBsBouiczam&c=mJgCqz2uJN0Lx_GowxjG1kmrWPt2BWMA-QEUjlHd1CfpVKZJFRSXkA==&ch=yjvdPQyzDrBi2sXU7M8PQb8SEr5bFUaFleobi1evA79gokkq2Q_OPA==)
---
| [RSVP Here!](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XScVlUk_EWq_DnFO0uHzh70mchjinhXRhI7VXwnhUDlmTdo1nxKdGMXb7XXwbBmXttWj9ZH5cYag_NqHDx_tdN_W1Yek0fP0G0gLsYNBu_UbxugSXjPny9T-I0xZyOctjo5iGIfCTqY4UaNpyLGnLDmpiyZNh84KQlkS1hryTw-1GzZz0m8paCskdYhVe3X1sQsRuQs9uts2yJWKolQESE-6Nl1qSIXF10hYtIbDT00-Ka2_WeLAgXfNcJXJnGTa&c=mJgCqz2uJN0Lx_GowxjG1kmrWPt2BWMA-QEUjlHd1CfpVKZJFRSXkA==&ch=yjvdPQyzDrBi2sXU7M8PQb8SEr5bFUaFleobi1evA79gokkq2Q_OPA==)
---
| Our gracious hosts, Mr. and Mrs. Michael DiManna, Mr. Adam DeRito, Mrs. Charleen Carter, myself, and Team Imer are hopeful you will join us for this patriotic and fun filled evening.
See you soon!
My Best,
---
| | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XScVlUk_EWq_DnFO0uHzh70mchjinhXRhI7VXwnhUDlmTdo1nxKdGMXb7XXwbBmXttWj9ZH5cYag_NqHDx_tdN_W1Yek0fP0G0gLsYNBu_UbxugSXjPny9T-I0xZyOctjo5iGIfCTqY4UaNpyLGnLDmpiyZNh84KQlkS1hryTw-1GzZz0m8paCskdYhVe3X1sQsRuQs9uts2yJWKolQESE-6Nl1qSIXF10hYtIbDT00cm_cg6fMKc54XoUfw3Au0&c=mJgCqz2uJN0Lx_GowxjG1kmrWPt2BWMA-QEUjlHd1CfpVKZJFRSXkA==&ch=yjvdPQyzDrBi2sXU7M8PQb8SEr5bFUaFleobi1evA79gokkq2Q_OPA==)

subject: Trump and Boebert just defunded NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/JFqQfvEDJVJAkbvFThF_lHlW8WgRtDR0Br7-LDcNJ43vdcPfyvNtiXjFCKjO5TDQ0vuMGi5IOU1bb-WHRcc9O5TIiMz_XVqI1QITbZP2Xpru3PuWYqrAwx8jcMypdz5zi7f2VXiwcSn5ZOlGJ6YVhJjEDFL6JKq-dHC1fPy5ZiSO-v41VF7noqWfcMqjj7uxaB8vvGVtzcuNl3UQEcaevlNj04ciIbcwI04aWu3pM6_KfOcqKdQvMA7Hyb5WMxqiY5YI9wzxCyng8AsgGfC0tOg_EqtMqKj0WEt7nmY0TX8BOSPVdKfK-JmkBN4euIjn9QLKKanMqHPWbQdtX8nxPobOVhEYOBDTm6WF0szHM1pznbV70Yb0caoeYgApbTAeZn0IEpBVgInWVseg0W97cd-hNB_aA2-Wrr2b/YVEb9PWhCS69ZxlQBMw3nCa4K8p7Ox9E/11) Friend, Last night, Lauren Boebert did Donald Trump's bidding and voted to defund NPR and PBS — two of the most trusted sources of news, education, and cultural programming in the country. **[Add your name letting us know you support NPR, PBS, and public media.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/_mLMfD-15tsoHFdT082ca5J4NGBo7tIyuPS9ejfkIZFB-8FNCM6NmwPF7Y63IZIaaowg6iAbW42RshNit-o8BCQU2xZwjmCW8aAV3MCK9uXQgjHV411zZ4wjAAqGwWYamk2AEETyOnrCRw9-9hheZa8AmKIwpq6FTEpc8RgzLOZSf46pvx6GjP-6IOjmi7D99DJb6-qHEviymQYYJlvsvCcmIfw04ueWHi2Ihz6RUg4Ck5-yl_hSdbgsEf4kubtMPd53fVOHODPrx34_MFQ0Z31S_mNYCVVrjmPZ8EIRaTznRlTZhAQTNHT5I8WIcBT0f5b60xQM5Yd05vQgx3aSGA96Dfk94Ng3NyOYs6TL-CvBxBTiEJTyWjel_1OZKghVjOu6A6IjUAzMO3FWGomXyU3V64ttfEQy_MPU/TE-oOXXe3_wTmY-Gpu2rsIPs5pLtFuIi/11)** [ADD MY NAME](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/i7iDfPfQSb9eEqt766bWUVKEp2hiGHY96FvfkKEW1FdHcywLNZh_h3jyYxWmOsDoL7AQ-5wWtSE_P0pnC8VWla1RP8QmtfFrV3d_J7fWxJcZjTKsRwzg-QCWlF1jZYze4uW5-4365u40MkbLwT9pQng0a2X9AMQwxz4ZT1bqO5UF5SZWledypYU5n5e3cTE5RufngGMsy0TwE67jgXuVpyhqxWj6OgVD-nJUuUxlbS4fAtroJJCsZ6aKQWLhKVGohHcrx8inNjNOzaD0AE58hS0s-C6RBzFtrlRmjN3WRsezQaqzaKONXfX61ViKLz945TNvalsqE3uiq_AAb7XE7DotspqWLcqFPljC0bqZH0H5uiW6ebXP-_xlbXKwRtxE9smGykUtfq5wTKJ2d4raMAXp_-Dhnx6xtg7z/m8euzi72r0jY5YI1OeA-v7ypZwnS_Ern/11) This is the clearest sign yet that the Republican Party in Washington are completely in line with Donald Trump. And the Democrats in the Capitol are incapable of stopping them. Public media connects rural communities, supports educational programming for kids, and gives Coloradans access to reliable, independent reporting. In a time of chaos and disinformation, it’s never been more essential. Lauren Boebert doesn’t want Colorado’s 4th District to have access to honest, public-interest journalism. clean_body: | | | Friend, Last night, Lauren Boebert did Donald Trump's bidding and voted to defund NPR and PBS — two of the most trusted sources of news, education, and cultural programming in the country. This is the clearest sign yet that the Republican Party in Washington are completely in line with Donald Trump. And the Democrats in the Capitol are incapable of stopping them. Public media connects rural communities, supports educational programming for kids, and gives Coloradans access to reliable, independent reporting. In a time of chaos and disinformation, it’s never been more essential. Lauren Boebert doesn’t want Colorado’s 4th District to have access to honest, public-interest journalism. John does. Thanks for standing up for truth, facts, and public service. — Team Padora John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Medicare Accountability Alert via Care in Action
subject: We’re holding Republicans to account
body:
Republicans just gutted Medicaid – and they’re not done yet...
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111805236/558462130/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-accountability-fundraiser&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA0OGIzYi03YTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99vLaEdCS-4Wn8XOhk4gfuH_l-mCYT5gvozfE4Ro0j0=&emci=6958964c-6063-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae048b3b-7a65-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
**Republicans in Congress just passed the biggest cuts to Medicaid in history** – all so they can hand massive tax breaks to billionaires and supercharge Trump’s inhumane deportation machine to rip even more families apart.
Because of this incredible cruelty, millions will lose essential healthcare coverage, while **countless domestic workers lose both their healthcare and their livelihoods**. And the threats aren’t over yet: **Republican leadership in Congress is gearing up to pass TWO MORE reconciliation bills.**
That’s why Care in Action is mobilizing around the clock to ensure Republicans feel the heat from their constituents. We’ve kicked off a massive on-the-ground organizing effort to **make sure every voter in vulnerable Republican districts knows that their representative was responsible for cutting Medicaid – and we’re just getting started.**
[**We’re ramping up right now to ensure that vulnerable Republicans see and hear from their constituents every single day to make sure they stop the attacks – and show them there will be a political price to pay for their vote. But to pull it off we need your support – can you chip in to help us make sure Republicans pay for cutting Medicaid?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111805237/558462136/-499192177?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-accountability-fundraiser&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA0OGIzYi03YTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99vLaEdCS-4Wn8XOhk4gfuH_l-mCYT5gvozfE4Ro0j0=)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111805239/558462147/-499192177?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-accountability-fundraiser&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA0OGIzYi03YTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99vLaEdCS-4Wn8XOhk4gfuH_l-mCYT5gvozfE4Ro0j0=)
Make no mistake: these cruel cuts will kill. One recent study found that more than 51,000 people will die every single year as a direct result of this bill. For millions of domestic workers, Medicaid is a lifeline – it’s used to pay for 70% of home care and is often care workers’ only pathway to affordable, quality care for themselves.
**Countless care workers will lose their jobs _and_ their healthcare, facing impossible choices between medicine, food, and rent.**
Millions will suffer, which is why **our team is working nonstop to mobilize in key congressional districts to shine a bright spotlight on the Republicans who voted to rip away healthcare from families**. We already kicked off a series of in-district events in key states, and we’re quickly ramping up to show up at town halls, organize community speak-outs, and ensure our voices can't be ignored.
With more disastrous budget bills looming, we have to move quickly to show Republicans just how angry the public is about these cuts – and to do it we urgently need your help. **With your support, we can scale up our efforts, expand event turnout, ramp up digital pressure campaigns, and launch targeted accountability actions in critical battlegrounds.**
[**It’s up to all of us to ensure Republicans are held to account for choosing to cut Medicaid for millions. Will you urgently chip in to hold Republicans accountable for what they’ve done?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111805240/558462148/-499192177?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-accountability-fundraiser&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTA0OGIzYi03YTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99vLaEdCS-4Wn8XOhk4gfuH_l-mCYT5gvozfE4Ro0j0=)

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: Peter, I’m going to be straightforward with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
Point blank. No gimmicks.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111805429/558462632/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWY4OGQzNS03YTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mpWMlqymb0wlbT6OTjTpCLJJO4Rm9-A6a3DgRuSOW58=)
---
Peter, it’s Ritchie. This email is asking you for $3. Point blank. No gimmicks.

Here’s why: most people don’t even look at these, _much less read them._

But if you know anything about me, you know I don’t do a second of call-time.

**That means I can’t protect my seat or take back the House without the help of grassroots donors, chipping in $3 at a time, to emails like this one.**

And if you support what I’m doing here, _**_[I hope you’ll consider having my back by making a donation of just a few bucks.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=68ea746155704cc28f017fcde1121bbb&_e=ao-aDVA0Y7XwGq_XirRM4ge-K1s3RB5SVN0LlXgN-XGNd5ZhaM6eprlcJFloBqpnaY9IlzTmnAyg4SgHTj9t6CTKq3Newll3hE2BgnXJvCJxCzWlvlKYGNG2KXUr1lIx1vKTzORF7EASOxvlpC-MD_8scHe8HVn7QlXiaoHq8IB9mxdo9M8aL41M7g5fH0pJLsnnGEcBBjplYrhor2a-EgKcNEkWesD-FaUeYV_-hyWip2a3VHwinxwfmannbR1wL7xB3cRy5DKUaRfhbkpwcwbPuXXSc2HypaBMTvL6n0pcdZAT9wxaPIBgKq7EfvA21dQnoN4jZansTHcpoPcyiPC7M_C8C2FZO9ySzy66VMRAwqzEyQVwSDHnDPPFhxWOFpKDnwhLoXpWs1MJeUZt2xd1WPyXBCG9FQAne2nwL4bCDnRBn8PMcniTJ2FPghJJna050ar3CypvBeeONzs5YIAlrpQMdP-zZV717jh2zqmKjLKoRa5ofTrugO6IqMSlden3EEdU1XH6RMG-EijNdyRi-MFs2hM-ad_-bh3XCFBAyde5qs-cNdbHBsGQg4d6hCRcyvQwP8jbcY6ntSacuw%3D%3D)_**_ I am about to file something called a “discharge petition.” **_In simple terms, I am using a congressional procedure to attempt to FORCE a vote on releasing the Epstein files in their entirety._** \- The client lists \- The blackmail networks \- The foreign intelligence interests ALL must be exposed. **If this vote succeeds, EVERY Member of Congress will be forced to vote simply “YES” or “NO” on whether or not the government should release the Epstein files.** **And at the end of the day, this decision, this action right here and right now, could be the end of a 20-year-long saga of CORRUPTION, LIES, and CRIMINAL ACTIVITY.** I’m about to make a lot of enemies – Republicans, Democrats, Independents, and everyone in between. I don’t care who I upset – all I care about is the TRUTH. Thank you for taking a moment out of your time to read my message. Sincerely, Congressman Thomas Massie P.S. Whether or not you donate today, I am moving forward with this. I’m not pay-to-play like so many other politicians in Washington. **I won’t be bought, bribed, or blackmailed.**
But the tidal wave of pressure from the Uniparty is about to get 10X worse when I force them to go on record over the Epstein files... _**_[_**_and when it does, I truly need patriots like you in my corner. _**_](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=68ea746155704cc28f017fcde1121bbb&_e=ao-aDVA0Y7XwGq_XirRM4ge-K1s3RB5SVN0LlXgN-XGNd5ZhaM6eprlcJFloBqpnaY9IlzTmnAyg4SgHTj9t6CTKq3Newll3hE2BgnXJvCJxCzWlvlKYGNG2KXUr1lIx1vKTzORF7EASOxvlpC-MD_8scHe8HVn7QlXiaoHq8IB9mxdo9M8aL41M7g5fH0pJd2mDfxG2nMaP7drdk3C9mEORM1pPyjaFN4drsPl00NbgznZQuT58xnOdbWbN_eqE7VW5N5hUq9t5hhRuUr1QkGNevw6RoP07TKYCVsg8mVpFcnk1qfwfBpusgII5AWHaI4NvYxz42FcNR-nxQLWt88Z56IuuOs87ubfKkdrF1N_nffb030Z5-FiLdFfAecChWQRIC9imDklkB26b9M5AlnOtFkGN27yMdNzCLc33q37Dd3XKKmHbkTAaCJaJn_5yEL9POK0f1bWGaMkRdYSmv_Wd-n_Kh_R7WVAwMBWTgAy38Rald2ApXsMsMIE7--Q8a1kLANo6V0mpwvARP5Yg0tua3laI1yi5F4iNfaEBmVHcVCHyG8CnGxUWg5q_7Q4dz5Y6lTjtSHFxDsrif7g2mg%3D%3D) _**_
