| [](https://substack.com/redirect/139f2693-b31c-410f-a8f3-03237016ee35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Meet Regina McCrea...

She's Governor Brad Little's appointment as Kootenai County's newest district judge, overseeing family court cases involving children's welfare. She's a trial attorney with over 20 years of experience, who served as a Community Library Network board trustee from 2016 to 2023.
But...
During that time, she resisted efforts to remove obscene/porno material from children's library sections. And she was even endorsed by the Kootenai County Democrats for her trustee role!

Take a look:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f98d5727-df65-43ed-9164-1247d5cd3b7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fb4dc168-8ee9-42cd-af0d-7be75b6af37b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_[Photo/video credit: Brandy Paradee](https://substack.com/redirect/229ca1b8-8480-4b89-8ac8-b18244cdd649?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
Troubling, right?
So, why is our Republican Governor appointing her as a judge?!
_**Well ... he's not. **_
_Not really._
Because a LOBBYIST and a Congressman's WIFE picked her - NOT the Governor.
Let me explain...
[The Idaho Judicial Council](https://substack.com/redirect/8566cb87-54fb-44f5-9b09-3ead9aa3db2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a cozy clique of elites who picks our judges, and it's dripping with conflicts of interest. It currently consists of:
1. Hon. Chief Justice G. Richard Bevan (Boise), Ex-Officio Chairman, leading the charge.
2. Hon. Nancy A. Baskin (Boise), Vice-Chair, a district judge with a front-row seat.
3. Hon. Todd Garbett (Paris), another judge in the mix.
4. Keely E. Duke (Boise), attorney, appointed by the Governor.
5. John A. Bush (Boise), attorney, another Governor's pick.
6. Jason B. Kreizenbeck (Boise), non-attorney and **registered lobbyist** with deep ties to Idaho's power brokers (we've had more in the past).
7. Scott W. Madison (Boise), non-attorney
8. Kathy Simpson (Idaho Falls), non-attorney and **wife of Congressman Mike Simpson** (talk about insider access)!
9. Michael R. Kennedy (Coeur d'Alene), adjunct magistrate judge, chiming in when they're disciplining or retiring magistrates.

**THESE FOLKS PICK OUR JUDGES.
NOT THE GOVERNOR.**
Then, after they pick the candidates, the council hands Governor Little three judge candidates, and he must pick one.
He has no veto, and no real choice.
And if all three are the council's cronies, Idaho gets another insider judge.
_**Worse though, judges often retire early (way before their terms end) to create vacancies so the council can slide in their handpicked replacements and dodge public elections.**_
No voters, no accountability.
Just a rigged game where the "good old boys" club calls the shots.
The conflicts are blatant. With lobbyists and congressional spouses picking judges, how can Idahoans trust the courts to be fair? The Judicial Council is the gatekeeper, not the Governor.
**The solution?**
> 1. _**Abolish the Idaho Judicial Council**_
> 2. _**Demand elections for all judges unless extreme circumstances arise**_
>

Let regular Idahoans, not (lobbyists or congressmen's wives) decide who delivers justice.
Until we do, this council will keep rigging the bench, laughing all the way to the courthouse.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: The fight for fair maps in Texas is on!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Join us in the fight! |
---

| | | | Tomorrow, the Texas Legislature begins its special session—and redistricting is on the agenda. Tomorrow night, Lizzie will host a town hall meeting with Vice Chair of the Texas Redistricting Committee Jon Rosenthal (D-HD-135) and Former State Senator and Current Harris County Commissioner Rodney Ellis to talk about what is happening and what we can do about it. [_**Join us!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111807948/558469584/892485993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmIzYzQzNi03ZjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DWBYjMi8pS8W07_u1UyHjsfterYAdt5tha1ztqatOL8=&emci=2dde80a9-5f65-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7fb3c436-7f65-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=30230943) | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111807949/558469585/892485993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmIzYzQzNi03ZjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DWBYjMi8pS8W07_u1UyHjsfterYAdt5tha1ztqatOL8=&emci=2dde80a9-5f65-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7fb3c436-7f65-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=30230943)

Governor Abbott and Texas Republicans have utterly collapsed to pressure from President Trump, and they have surrendered Texas to political operatives from Washington, prioritizing helping out-of-state political operatives so that national Republicans can try to hold on to the majority of seats in the U.S. House of Representatives and further discriminate against minority voters in Texas.

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: Your voice is the center of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://alexkelloff.com/ [https://alexkelloff.com/]
Team,
We finished up a journey of more than 1,073 miles through 21 Colorado counties.
I’m humbled by the incredible turnout and enthusiasm we saw on our Listening Tour. Because of you, we’re building something truly special across CO-03.
Every conversation inspired us, every story mattered, and your voices continue to shape this campaign every step of the way. Thank you to everyone who joined us—let’s keep this momentum going!
From packed rooms in Pagosa Springs to energized crowds in Durango and Cortez, we heard your passion for protecting public lands, growing our rural economy, and defending what makes Colorado home. This was one unforgettable day—and we’re just getting started.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act]
In the San Luis Valley, we had a great time in at the Sky Hi Stampede Parade. Monte Vista—you were wonderful to us and I loved getting the chance to hear your stories.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act]
Thank you to everyone who joined us in Walsenburg. Grateful to Shad Murib, Pam Espinoza, and the Huerfano Dems for helping build momentum in southern Colorado.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act]
This campaign is about showing up and leading by example—listening to the people who make this district strong and putting their voices at the center of everything we do.
Let’s keep up the pace,
Alex
https://alexkelloff.com/ [https://alexkelloff.com/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act]
Alex Kelloff is an accomplished entrepreneur, financial executive, and committed community advocate whose family’s Colorado heritage dates back to 1897.
His family has operated community-oriented businesses across Colorado—including Kelloff’s Food Stores and Kelloff’s Movie Manor—for over a century. He took that entrepreneurial spirit and became a seasoned financial executive at Jefferies and SBC Capital, focused on expanding IT infrastructure and high-speed internet to rural America, and a dedicated community advocate. Then he co-founded Armada Skis, one of the most innovative brands in the industry and on the slopes.
Now, Alex is running in one of the most competitive seats in the country.
Inspired by his father, Dr. Gary Kelloff, who dedicated decades to cancer research at the National Institutes of Health, he brings that same deep sense of purpose to this campaign.
In Congress, he’ll fight to create jobs, lower costs, preserve our public lands and water rights, protect our seniors, and defend our democratic institutions. He’ll listen to the people back home—and make sure they come first.
Help him flip our Colorado 3rd by chipping in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250720_JulyEventRecap1_act&recurring=1]

Alex Kelloff for Colorado

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Republicans only care about their corporate bosses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111809786/558472560/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGExYWQ5Yy04MjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTAQBerBX-u90BkDLSfLhCD29trLFxxL61iY1net_TU=&emci=4891c69a-8a61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=60a1ad9c-8265-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) Derek,

I believe in something pretty straightforward about the American dream—if you work hard and play by the rules, you’ve got a shot at it.

**The thing is, folks are working hard—yet the cost of housing, groceries, and just about everything else remains too high. The corporate stranglehold on our economy is ripping people off across the country.**

Republicans have controlled all of our federal government for months now, and they've done **nothing** to bring down costs. They’ve done **nothing** to break the corporate stranglehold on our economy, and they're not going to—because they do the bidding of their robber baron bosses. Here in Washington they care about one thing: helping robber barons plunder everybody else.

Their plan is tax giveaways to corporations and the ultra-rich. That is the only economic program they have. **But let’s be real, trickle-down economics has never worked for America. It never worked for Western Pennsylvania.**

That’s why I'm working to stop corporations from ripping people off—by breaking up monopolies and staying focused on what really matters: making life better for everyone, restoring the American dream, bringing down costs, and defending our freedom.

But here’s the truth: I can’t take on this power alone. The GOP is backed by robber barons and special interests that will spend whatever it takes to keep their grip on our economy. **[Every dollar you can donate helps build the campaign to stand up to them—one that puts working people first, not corporate profits. Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States
clean_body: Derek, I believe in something pretty straightforward about the American dream—if you work hard and play by the rules, you’ve got a shot at it. The thing is, folks are working hard—yet the cost of housing, groceries, and just about everything else remains too high. The corporate stranglehold on our economy is ripping people off across the country. Republicans have controlled all of our federal government for months now, and they've done nothing to bring down costs. They’ve done nothing to break the corporate stranglehold on our economy, and they're not going to—because they do the bidding of their robber baron bosses. Here in Washington they care about one thing: helping robber barons plunder everybody else. Their plan is tax giveaways to corporations and the ultra-rich. That is the only economic program they have. But let’s be real, trickle-down economics has never worked for America. It never worked for Western Pennsylvania. That’s why I'm working to stop corporations from ripping people off—by breaking up monopolies and staying focused on what really matters: making life better for everyone, restoring the American dream, bringing down costs, and defending our freedom. But here’s the truth: I can’t take on this power alone. The GOP is backed by robber barons and special interests that will spend whatever it takes to keep their grip on our economy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I will never stop fighting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4878%2E35263%2ESQ1Ee2)
Donald Trump signed his Big Ugly Bill into law — and Peter, it is a disaster for Wisconsinites and so many Americans. This bill rips away health care from 17 million Americans and over a quarter million Wisconsinites — all to pay for massive tax cuts for billionaires and big corporations. It will have particularly devastating impacts on rural Wisconsin and rural America. We know that some of the hospitals and clinics on the edge of closure are in rural communities. We’re already seeing notices of impending closures of rural hospitals around the country due to the Medicaid cuts in this Big Ugly Bill. As Wisconsinites and Americans learned more about this bill, it became less and less popular. And the people who voted for it need to be held accountable. In the meantime, I will never stop fighting to bring costs down for working families, to make healthcare more affordable and more accessible to all Wisconsinites, and to make sure families receive the food assistance and nutrition they need. **[We’re going to continue this fight until we win, Peter. If you can power that fight with a donation of any amount today, I’d be incredibly grateful.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-july25.PrghHS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4878%2E35263%2ESQ1Ee2)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-july25.yzPNVJ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4878%2E35263%2ESQ1Ee2)

Here are the facts, Peter:

👉 We’re just **_3 SEATS AWAY_** from taking back the House in 2026.
👉 Republicans are handing out tax breaks to billionaires and funding a prison in the Everglades that costs over $450 million a year.
👉 Meanwhile, Democrats are fighting for healthcare, disaster response programs, and working families.

clean_body: Emergency Roll Call of Seniors| | | | | | | | Dear Friend,Seniors are under attack... Polling and disturbing trends show that seniors—once the backbone of the conservative movement —are now the target of an all-out propaganda war!And I’m worried that it’s working... So today, I’m performing an EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS. ... Time is of the essence because recently we’ve seen disturbing reports. According to RealClearPolitics, President Trump is underwater with seniors aged 70+ —the only age group where his approval is negative.And the anecdotal evidence is even stranger—maybe you’ve noticed that the radical protestors showing up to anti-Trump rallies are often 50+, or that older Americans on social media are suddenly turning on Trump! Maybe you even know friends, family, or neighbors who have suddenly fallen into the left’s trap. But with such a radical shift happening before our eyes, we have to ask... what on earth is going on?Is it the Liberal Media? We know that 66% of seniors still rely on TV for their news , and the media has become an echo chamber for anti-American lies. CNN, MSNBC, CBS, ABC, NPR, PBS...The list goes on and on; and their radicalism and propaganda has only increased since Trump took back the White House.Could it be the AARP? They have a direct line to millions of older Americans—and they aren’t shy about their support for ObamaCare, Medicare for All, the “Inflation Reduction Act” under Joe Biden, LGBTQ ideology, and more, even as they play the role of a moderate, “middle of the road group.” Or maybe it’s even George Soros and his web of influence? You and I know that George Soros has a massive web of NGOs, PACs, and investments designed to influence lawmakers and spread Marxist propaganda and chaos.And according to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP Foundation accepted over 10 MILLION DOLLARS —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The AARP once even honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine , calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators ” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time. ” My friend, maybe it’s the combination of the three...the Liberal media, the AARP, and George Soros who are targeting seniors; your friends your family, and YOU. And it’s why I’m asking you to stand with AMAC Action. Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative patriots 50 years of age and over. We have 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And we have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. In fact, our efforts have been so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for mature Americans to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!And today, we are focusing our efforts on fighting back on the left’s increasing grip on America’s seniors. My friend it’s simple—AMAC Action is THE antidote to forces targeting YOUR generation. Because if we don’t act now, we’ll wake up in a country where American seniors are the backbone of the Marxist movemen t...Where the liberal media has a stranglehold on your friends and family ... And where liberal elites and groups ensure this generation will be remembered for radicalism instead of patriotism ...I know I don’t want to ever see that America...and I think you don’t either.AMAC Action is the most effective voice in the nation, advocating for conservative values and changing the hearts and minds of mature Americans. But all that we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. We don’t receive of dime from the federal government. We’re funded by grass roots patriots just like you. So when you answer YES to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS ... When you support AMAC Action, you’re not just declaring your opposition to the left’s propaganda—you’re fighting back! Your donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 or $1,000 ensures that we have the resources to: Advocate for conservative values and policies Spread the truth to seniors everywhere and counter propaganda Ensure that our generation, yours and mine, is remembered for patriotism, NOT for radicalism. And so much more. My friend, together, we can save this generation and secure America’s future. But it starts with your YES today. Please give your critical answer to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS below. Thank you for standing strong.Let’s show them that patriotic seniors aren’t fooled—and we aren’t going anywhere. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. ** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

clean_body: They are serious about trying to flip Texas blue. | Peter, The radical left already made their move. Bernie Sanders and Beto O’Rourke rolled through Texas-24 with their “Fight the Oligarchy” circus, preaching socialism, bigger government, and higher taxes — right here in our own backyard. It was a warning shot. They are serious about trying to flip Texas blue. They are already dumping cash into my district. They think North Texas is up for grabs. I have news for them:not a chance. We are launching a full-force, early offensive to protect this seat and everything we’ve built: ✅ Grassroots Power Hours happening across the district. ✅ Spotlighting the success of the America First agenda. ✅ A full-throttle campaign to get our message out early and often. But none of this happens without you. The radical left has money pouring in. They’ve got national figures lined up. And they are going to spend every dime trying to flip this district. If we want to hold the line and stay on offense, we have to fight back now — and that means raising the resources to win this fight. - The left already tried to bring their circus here. Let’s make sure they never come back. Beth Van Duyne P.S. We are ramping things up early for a reason. Every contribution goes to building the kind of ground game it takes to keep TX-24 red and stop the socialist left in their tracks. Let’s get it done → . GET TO KNOW BETH: | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress. She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

I’ve been fighting powerful interests for decades, and I know a cover-up when I see one. | **Trump administration says it won't publish major climate change reports on NASA website** _\- NBC NEWS, July 15, 2025_
---
Earlier this month, the Trump administration quietly pulled down the government websites that hosted the national climate assessments, hiding taxpayer-funded climate data that explain how this crisis endangers our communities and what we can do about it.
At the time, the White House said NASA would host the reports. But now, under Trump’s pressure, NASA has abandoned those plans entirely.
We need to see this charade for what it is: **An attempt to bury the truth and protect the fossil fuel lobby that helped bankroll his campaign.**
**[This is exactly why we need leaders who will stand up for science and truth. Our planet is on the line, our lives are on the line, and right now, we need your help to power our movement to transform the face of leadership in our country. Will you make a donation today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111813792/558481833/2105508926?refcode=ea.739a867b-8765-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.739a867b-8765-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczOWE4NjdiLTg3NjUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dyoyD1F65BiFg3XA2_d1TS0cLzdb04LFhAz6QeNTN0M=)**
This latest stunt comes on the heels of Trump's devastating spending bill that handed oil and gas companies free rein to poison our communities, gutted NOAA funding right as we enter hurricane season, and dismantled pollution limits on coal plants.
Let me say this plainly: Donald Trump doesn't care how history will judge him, and that's so deeply sad. With how things are going, Trump will have many millions of lives on his hands by not only denying the climate crisis but also trying to destroy humanity's chances of doing something about it.
**I'm in this fight because I refuse to give up on what's worth saving. If you feel that too — if this moment fills you with anger and purpose — then join me.**
**[JanePAC is doing the critical work of building a political firewall to block Trump's fossil fuel agenda, but we don't have time to waste. Can I count on your donation today to help us continue the fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111813793/558481835/2105508926?refcode=ea.739a867b-8765-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.739a867b-8765-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczOWE4NjdiLTg3NjUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dyoyD1F65BiFg3XA2_d1TS0cLzdb04LFhAz6QeNTN0M=)**

clean_body: I refuse to give up on what's worth saving. | I’ve been fighting powerful interests for decades, and I know a cover-up when I see one. | Trump administration says it won't publish major climate change reports on NASA website \- NBC NEWS, July 15, 2025 Earlier this month, the Trump administration quietly pulled down the government websites that hosted the national climate assessments, hiding taxpayer-funded climate data that explain how this crisis endangers our communities and what we can do about it. At the time, the White House said NASA would host the reports. But now, under Trump’s pressure, NASA has abandoned those plans entirely. We need to see this charade for what it is: An attempt to bury the truth and protect the fossil fuel lobby that helped bankroll his campaign. = This latest stunt comes on the heels of Trump's devastating spending bill that handed oil and gas companies free rein to poison our communities, gutted NOAA funding right as we enter hurricane season, and dismantled pollution limits on coal plants. Let me say this plainly: Donald Trump doesn't care how history will judge him, and that's so deeply sad. With how things are going, Trump will have many millions of lives on his hands by not only denying the climate crisis but also trying to destroy humanity's chances of doing something about it. I'm in this fight because I refuse to give up on what's worth saving. If you feel that too — if this moment fills you with anger and purpose — then join me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s fight like hell for our planet. xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: They know Mariannette Miller-Meeks is vulnerable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111814135/558482680/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2NiMDYxMC04ODY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n4nQe6l9ESIGALbzNZu71btzL6qkkJ___05YPNukoJI=)
Hi, it’s Christina —

Mike Johnson just raised $50 million to protect the GOP majority in the House, and a massive chunk of that money went straight into Mariannette Miller-Meeks’ warchest.

She’s one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress, and they know it. That’s why GOP leadership is pouring cash into her race. Not because she’s popular or effective, but because they need someone in this seat who won’t push back.

We can’t afford to ignore this.

We don’t need $50 million of special interest money, but we do need to stay on track toward our own fundraising goals. It's not easy to compete against a party willing to buy this seat, but I know if we keep up our momentum, we can beat this machine.

I’m running to represent the people of Iowa’s 1st District — not national donors, not party bosses. But to win, we need to meet this moment with the urgency it demands.

clean_body: | = Hi, it’s Christina — Mike Johnson just raised $50 million to protect the GOP majority in the House, and a massive chunk of that money went straight into Mariannette Miller-Meeks’ warchest. She’s one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress, and they know it. That’s why GOP leadership is pouring cash into her race. Not because she’s popular or effective, but because they need someone in this seat who won’t push back. We can’t afford to ignore this. We don’t need $50 million of special interest money, but we do need to stay on track toward our own fundraising goals. It's not easy to compete against a party willing to buy this seat, but I know if we keep up our momentum, we can beat this machine. I’m running to represent the people of Iowa’s 1st District — not national donors, not party bosses. But to win, we need to meet this moment with the urgency it demands. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: THIS WEEKEND: The second meeting of our Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship
body:
Our Fellows participate in 30 hours of instruction followed by 20 hours of field work―and they’ll receive a $1,000 stipend at the end. | | |
---
Friend, Yesterday, we held our second meeting of our 2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship where our 18 fellows learned from three local leaders about Organizing 101 and criminal justice reform. Our first meeting included a training on how to stay rooted in your progressive values, led by Dessa Cosma, Executive Director of Detroit Disability Power (pictured below). Over six weekends this summer, our fellows—who are 100% BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, or people of color), 67% female, and ranging in age from 14 to 24—will participate in 30 hours of instruction followed by 20 hours of field work. At the end, they’ll receive a $1,000 stipend. During our first meeting, fellows learned about how to stay rooted in progressive values from the Executive Director of Detroit Disability Power.
Today is our second meeting of the Youth Fellowship. This weekend we’ll hold an Organizing 101 training, led by the Michigan State Director of the Working Families Party. We’ll also do a deep dive on criminal justice reform, led by the Executive Director of the Detroit Justice Center and the Executive Director of Michigan Liberation.
Youth fellows will also begin reporting back on the official city council, school board, or library board meetings they have attended―a new requirement of our Fellowship this year.
Our Fellows participate in 30 hours of instruction followed by 20 hours of field work, after which they’ll receive a $1,000 stipend.
**As we continue the Youth Fellowship, we’re also gearing up to launch our Youth Advisory Council,** where we’re offering a chance for high school students to work alongside me and other policymakers to create meaningful change.
**With your support, we’re giving young people the hands-on experience they need to be leaders in their communities and help craft legislation that uplifts their communities—** such as my _Youth Homelessness Guaranteed Income Pilot Program Act_ to address youth homelessness by providing monthly cash assistance.
**At a time when people face so much fear and uncertainty, it is inspiring to see these undaunted young people who are ready to make a difference.**

clean_body: Our Fellows participate in 30 hours of instruction followed by 20 hours of field work―and they’ll receive a $1,000 stipend at the end. | | | Friend, Yesterday, we held our second meeting of our 2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship where our 18 fellows learned from three local leaders about Organizing 101 and criminal justice reform. Our first meeting included a training on how to stay rooted in your progressive values, led by Dessa Cosma, Executive Director of Detroit Disability Power (pictured below). Over six weekends this summer, our fellows—who are 100% BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, or people of color), 67% female, and ranging in age from 14 to 24—will participate in 30 hours of instruction followed by 20 hours of field work. At the end, they’ll receive a $1,000 stipend. Selected from an applicant pool of 89 people, these bright young leaders are learning the skills necessary to organize their communities and demand the promise of our multiracial democracy. Your support allows us to run this Youth Fellowship, while paying our fellows a $1,000 stipend. And your support is powering our upcoming Youth Advisory Council , which will run from August through May of next year and will give high school students a chance to work alongside me and other policymakers to make change happen. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Together, we are empowering the next generation to fight for our shared future. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Sat, July 19, 2025 Subject: THIS WEEKEND: The second meeting of our Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Last month we launched our 2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship, and thanks to your support we’re able to offer this free program to more students than ever before. Out of 89 applicants, we accepted 18 fellows, ranging in age from 14 to 24. 100% of the cohort is BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, or people of color), and 67% are female. Your donations are powering our youth engagement work―including the Youth Fellowship this summer and our Youth Advisory Council starting in September and running through May of next year. ** During our first meeting, fellows learned about how to stay rooted in progressive values from the Executive Director of Detroit Disability Power. Today is our second meeting of the Youth Fellowship. This weekend we’ll hold an Organizing 101 training, led by the Michigan State Director of the Working Families Party. We’ll also do a deep dive on criminal justice reform, led by the Executive Director of the Detroit Justice Center and the Executive Director of Michigan Liberation. Youth fellows will also begin reporting back on the official city council, school board, or library board meetings they have attended―a new requirement of our Fellowship this year. Our Fellows participate in 30 hours of instruction followed by 20 hours of field work, after which they’ll receive a $1,000 stipend. As we continue the Youth Fellowship, we’re also gearing up to launch our Youth Advisory Council, where we’re offering a chance for high school students to work alongside me and other policymakers to create meaningful change. With your support, we’re giving young people the hands-on experience they need to be leaders in their communities and help craft legislation that uplifts their communities— such as my Youth Homelessness Guaranteed Income Pilot Program Act to address youth homelessness by providing monthly cash assistance. At a time when people face so much fear and uncertainty, it is inspiring to see these undaunted young people who are ready to make a difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Together, we are empowering the next generation to fight for our communities and our rights. In solidarity, Rashida * | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . name: Steve Scalise
subject: Bidding FAREWELL to America’s Golden Age?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats.
- FROM THE DESK OF - Majority Leader Steve Scalise
* * *

Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats. Don't forget: Our Majority is the FIRST LINE OF DEFENSE standing in the way of House Democrats having complete power to:

* Impeach President Trump
* Investigate Conservatives
* Stonewall the America First Agenda

There are three upcoming Special Elections THIS YEAR and one more on the horizon. Democrats are favored to win all of them. If Republicans fail to overperform here, we'll be closer than ever to surrendering control to the Democrats.
So here's what we need:
Our FIRST deadline since we missed our major FEC fundraising goal is only days away and we're pacing behind yet again. [We need to rally between 50,000 and 60,000 Conservative donors to get back on track before our House Majority shrinks. I hate to ask you like this but can you please help us out?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90326cd093cf4d50bd14862e894ead35&_e=txV3vzu8HKd0h1nTvJy6dSIk6x_8LDR-d66_C_9GmfAOBG17Y7BpvIRmAgEpgBDJ7VbUeRHomdiyVyY5M1eoB64Ftaa5Bn-eXwAZLfM1STcjhKP2wzn0RW24pxO5379e1sQEQV-e3di23vn806Lz2gPS6TuAsB0dymLRMnY1E2z04zypk4slZj5GBRRv1yB2ZR99DOfMdbKQZhQ_Oaegk4jzUqZtOj2T507SpjtkqqqlEjChKjsok9X4SHeDeQTNkqcILIUK8mGhMyv59hS2nefprk_oWgTQBS1OKiWTfQ21iOIz2j6vo3j6hcp9WB4ATQHfA7N-iGdvoZ96jbnHP1-B1i1jZdvfgzfKth8-iMUkNdh2UsQTOTQDNj-GrF6f1_MC9HLOjHCuZDUG3E8jNE4PPpga4dYDq-rCtPMi3YAJD6QGPTjXlociRsAMpEa2jEwltBrjXAYVjheNlYi2udvLUSZfoNj5ZA17DxyiY8P7bZ_x4mG-dvl2Wnyo8LuPIv_6u7cuA4HR3E5bFzzILZIe8jjKw5o5QhrWAhVQ5sjWip_X23WLpOpbOjzp5cBO1j9AoFMyrLbwXYqLuqKxVDgkX9uUH6QVPDl7fULMZHChZAWpi4XXTYBBQRJ7ZI0-y2Lpkjh4Po2fkaybKP5C0H0Ov9P1wHXVVBFC_9OtT5gL9ENfvX63yJj_Cbyygr36vKuChmKDRYXfBdUItyO9yA%3D%3D)[SEND HELP HERE
](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90326cd093cf4d50bd14862e894ead35&_e=txV3vzu8HKd0h1nTvJy6dSIk6x_8LDR-d66_C_9GmfAOBG17Y7BpvIRmAgEpgBDJ7VbUeRHomdiyVyY5M1eoB64Ftaa5Bn-eXwAZLfM1STcjhKP2wzn0RW24pxO5379e1sQEQV-e3di23vn806Lz2gPS6TuAsB0dymLRMnY1E2z04zypk4slZj5GBRRv1yB2ZR99DOfMdbKQZhQ_Oaegk4jzUqZtOj2T507SpjtkqqqlEjChKjsok9X4SHeDeQTNOovRk_WTl_4Woa5YISQnEurYKhGvyzIda4BZ5qaGnMBq-51s3pNar7dBVBiR1LpMFPMS34402zK6fNwT1ckKBcXNRCDVjmDZBBkAvdeBCtgWdPAb0Gq0iGfNaLQg0egCojnnOog6Be9Rs5LKhXU1UoVknYWUo7hY7TdCsFTAgH7Jq_LZryVVUHARDusbewdGak1elRSVlYlwyHx2gb5Ar4ODcVQ5gk1xZNMFmj79UyTbiir4MzCI5TToAE_mGyBaiLo6S2jrDrNSQMhJ-IBgsfRhOXUCbAdZY2wUFckYuTseY91aQJP0eQ-pJkt01b68CtOGITtjvaIN7Tt0veE_1PmtnY_SiU7NavKmiSfZWWNOnZwHi-uojZoZNPTOwbMO1jD-vqvuTJRrf2ewTx5uIggTarTAIJjppAq39JQsM3deKmh-5SoN8GHJQSAZGMF2eEN640xDOW8v7WipjnTFPQ%3D%3D)Our House Majority is already one of the smallest in a CENTURY. We're about to lose one more Conservative in our corner and the Democrats are favored to win ALL THREE upcoming Special Elections.
The odds were already stacked against us but now they just jolted in favor of the Democrats. I understand if you're sick and tired of folks like me asking you for money...
But here's the bottom line:
President Trump needs us to hold the line. Without our Conservative House Majority, his entire legislative agenda will be dead on arrival in the House, his allies will be investigated to no end, and he could face impeachment on DAY ONE of Democrat control.
I've been around long enough to say this with authority: The pressure is on like never before.
If we fail to defend the House, we might as well kiss America's Golden Age goodbye and brace ourselves for a torrent of Liberal Witch Hunts.
But if we can mobilize enough Conservatives, we'll have the resources to support our Special Election candidates, defy the odds, and keep the House in GOP control for all four years of Trump's term.
[But to do that, we need your help right here and right now.I’m personally asking: Will you dig deep and pitch in a few bucks to help us out?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90326cd093cf4d50bd14862e894ead35&_e=txV3vzu8HKd0h1nTvJy6dSIk6x_8LDR-d66_C_9GmfAOBG17Y7BpvIRmAgEpgBDJ7VbUeRHomdiyVyY5M1eoB64Ftaa5Bn-eXwAZLfM1STcjhKP2wzn0RW24pxO5379e1sQEQV-e3di23vn806Lz2gPS6TuAsB0dymLRMnY1E2z04zypk4slZj5GBRRv1yB2ZR99DOfMdbKQZhQ_Oaegk4jzUqZtOj2T507SpjtkqqqlEjChKjsok9X4SHeDeQTNmYIlCyxJkU5lylnmD_wT6EJsCTHHg-1D1lRRjnrpd2LX69A6-JpKkQY02N4YIhlX31KOCLynEDgupvASoKwoPGDxl9OartzymtSfX9WiV-x4UHR07qvns5tVmiOvZq6LZqGDmIwQbxtV1L6qi7T63i6JUDbl5w_w7n6LCExPQJa8F2Mhv9IhH-z5n7ofJD4WAZCTgH4lvmKUTYE01IKHwpzMvKx7K9_Lyt155tTzZ98A6WorUiQRE8MofIj1Ev2KRdvQTSaGuyzn5IDsRR9BUCPGKh5N1PNJbqE66ZwyXJKqGknCDqhLsvcX7YfGmF1x2XwL6kU9YwodnIchjEHOivBzmJaWIppFOOu0WIkcyEenkD09QvhPPcmIb1D0znDaf7C51H5rPxnb6tiw9o0dXuYl6aoReLGGlAV9pg-ZupRxD9ycFa-15A82_ZqIljY1exBVcJoFowglT5Hkzg_F0w%3D%3D)[SEND HELP HERE
](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=90326cd093cf4d50bd14862e894ead35&_e=txV3vzu8HKd0h1nTvJy6dSIk6x_8LDR-d66_C_9GmfAOBG17Y7BpvIRmAgEpgBDJ7VbUeRHomdiyVyY5M1eoB64Ftaa5Bn-eXwAZLfM1STcjhKP2wzn0RW24pxO5379e1sQEQV-e3di23vn806Lz2gPS6TuAsB0dymLRMnY1E2z04zypk4slZj5GBRRv1yB2ZR99DOfMdbKQZhQ_Oaegk4jzUqZtOj2T507SpjtkqqqlEjChKjsok9X4SHeDeQTN1y5pSNQdPsPgJjSaRi2-b6liYKTphE_fd5Z7vEfcAtXDr7eKV2VeBdW_I0bftHy6I5126eyOuPFJFwFD_FQ1jjtktglWKIASZDAxqURqV-xzHqnZnQPprTgs-c21Xmg_KJ5YaCOu7TTlVuC7_Xp9ijylV1eilEzosm6QLpW5Gg6jJMmQyn9pSdoU5aQeZEyBmM024SilZjIpTuQqR7zRnmZ_57e4C4KQmG-NVezPhPTJMLdUyAdBPyZY4_u4LtFLJAzCCyBCeSfpiAHCfv9Le2CEzHsKPKVf2b_h8oJV7abxW2RB94WrpoluWgdM_pT3eeLWcNJrRmsdPH5FpGCJuLnyT2A8s_Zt2YpC8_WEp9SE0ukHbnmNodUvW-cuHv9Xd04oHa33zXxiSh_RMYGmQ9GfrJu8SgbNgJ9l_2h2q5XVvWzYHuK6fgsAy4ZOMe7l5dkAdfNxn9a7WQcDyGlE4g%3D%3D)Thank you for all you do. I mean it.
- Steve Scalise
* * *

clean_body: Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats. - FROM THE DESK OF - Majority Leader Steve Scalise Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats. Don't forget: Our Majority is the FIRST LINE OF DEFENSE standing in the way of House Democrats having complete power to: Impeach President Trump Investigate Conservatives Stonewall the America First Agenda There are three upcoming Special Elections THIS YEAR and one more on the horizon. Democrats are favored to win all of them. If Republicans fail to overperform here, we'll be closer than ever to surrendering control to the Democrats. So here's what we need: Our FIRST deadline since we missed our major FEC fundraising goal is only days away and we're pacing behind yet again. House Majority is already one of the smallest in a CENTURY. We're about to lose one more Conservative in our corner and the Democrats are favored to win ALL THREE upcoming Special Elections. The odds were already stacked against us but now they just jolted in favor of the Democrats. I understand if you're sick and tired of folks like me asking you for money... But here's the bottom line: President Trump needs us to hold the line. Without our Conservative House Majority, his entire legislative agenda will be dead on arrival in the House, his allies will be investigated to no end, and he could face impeachment on DAY ONE of Democrat control. I've been around long enough to say this with authority: The pressure is on like never before. If we fail to defend the House, we might as well kiss America's Golden Age goodbye and brace ourselves for a torrent of Liberal Witch Hunts. But if we can mobilize enough Conservatives, we'll have the resources to support our Special Election candidates, defy the odds, and keep the House in GOP control for all four years of Trump's term. you for all you do. I mean it. - Steve Scalise \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**| | | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

# [Why I'm Asking You To Support Salaam Bhatti for Congress](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168778487&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4Nzc4NDg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTMwMzA5ODUsImV4cCI6MTc1NTYyMjk4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hLM6x2uPC4rH0zRpBWf33hhIerP4bHGN-9wl7zWhvjM)
### We have a real chance to flip a red seat blue, but it will take all of us
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)

| Jul 20
---

My good friend Salaam Bhatti is a public interest lawyer, and has just announced his run for US Congress in Virginia's First. I am writing this to ask you to donate to his 100% people funded campaign and to support him to flip Virginia's First District Blue.
[Support Salaam for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/99851de7-fd9b-475c-898b-c23596159db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Six years ago, right before COVID wreaked havoc, I made the decision to run for U.S. Congress. I then lived in Virginia's First District, a deep red seat, and ran against a right wing MAGA fascist named Rob Wittman. While I did not win, I earned record turnout and the most votes ever by a Democrat in the history of that district. Many people reading this are from Virginia and remember that run. I'm grateful to the thousands that supported me then, and if you are reading this while in Virginia District 1, I earnestly encourage you to consider Salaam, and to support him for the reasons I share below. **Let 's Address This.**
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sL5M61NfhcaeLMlKL4wVi032yPwSQFt0P21_FjLOzqw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168778487)
Let me get the donation ask out of the way, and then dive into the three main reasons why I hope you donate anywhere from $1 to the max of $3500 to Salaam's campaign.
[Support Salaam for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/99851de7-fd9b-475c-898b-c23596159db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c9ff84d-cce9-4ccf-b81e-4bd8a0c5025c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Salaam Bhatti, Democratic Candidate for US Congress in Virginia District 1
## 1\. Who Is Salaam Bhatti?
Below is Salaam's simple launch video. He doesn't believe in high priced consultants, fancy cameras, or flashy messages. He has a simple message--he knows what its like to be hungry, he's spent his life ensuring people have enough to eat, and he wants to go to Congress to ensure we eradicate hunger and economic injustice in America. And he's advanced the work in Virginia to prove it can be advanced nationwide. Watch Salaam's 90 second launch video:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c78d9682-87b7-4c4d-9243-ed3fa0e50b9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Because of Salaam's leadership, tens of thousands of families in Virginia, and millions of families nationwide now have access to food. And to be sure, he hasn't "just helped Democrats." He's served _all_ people in this country, because that's what a true public servant does. Moreover, like me, Salaam grew up low income and on social welfare programs. His lived experience is one reason he's so driven to stop the economic warfare that MAGA Republicans and billionaires are waging against working people.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/92c0b009-0413-4bb6-9044-a3805a52e40f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Salaam (left) was a super volunteer for my 2020 run for US Congress in Virginia's First District. He knocked doors, made calls, and donated. He has put in the work for years. I hope everyone reading this shows up for him the way he has consistently shown up for Virginians.
Speaking of, Salaam rejects all corporate money, because he knows corporate influence in our politics is killing our Republic, and wants to lead by example that he will never let corrupt money influence his decisions. That's why it is that much more important that we, as citizens, donate our small dollar donations to his campaign. We can prove "the many" can overcome "the money."
[Support Salaam for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/99851de7-fd9b-475c-898b-c23596159db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## 2\. Who Is Incumbent Robb Wittman?
Wittman is basically your classic MAGA sycophant who pretends to care about working people but votes with Trump without question. He supports Trump's tax cuts for billionaires, SNAP cuts for working people, Medicaid cuts to 17 million Americans, and the Trump tariffs which have so far forced Americans to spend another $106B out of our pockets. As climate change destroys our planet, Wittman ignores the erosion on Virginia's coast and aligns with Trump's claim that "climate change is a Chinese hoax." Wittman support's Trump despite his 28 cases of credible sexual abuse, voted to block the Epstein list from going public, and stands by Trump even as he called Charlottesville Nazis "very fine people."
Wittman and Trump are effectively the same corrupt person.
In a past lawsuit that went all the way to the Supreme Court, Wittman argued that Virginia's redistricting of his Congressional district was unfair because it included "too many Black people." Yes, that was his actual argument. The Supreme Court ruled against him 9-0. Wittman's wife is a public school teacher, meaning he knows full well that Trump's move to eliminate the Dept of Education will devastate countless kids, teachers, and schools. Yet, Wittman supports Trump's destruction of public education anyway. This is the spineless MAGA cultist that Salaam is facing in Virginia's First District. It's why we must make sure Wittman's time in office ends in 2026.
[Support Salaam for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/99851de7-fd9b-475c-898b-c23596159db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## 3\. Is Virginia Congressional District 1 Flippable?
In a word, yes.
For one, Salaam is the right candidate and this is the right moment. Americans are tired of MAGA politicians, they're tired of corporate funded Democrats, and they're tired of people who refuse to fight. Salaam is a fighter, he's committed to We the People, and he has the proven career chops to lead and get things done.
Two, early polling conducted by the Democratic Party shows a clear path to victory. In fact, in 2024 the district went for Trump by only 5 points. Salaam can flip it Blue, provided we build the momentum, raise the funds needed, and build a volunteer army to knock doors and make phone calls.
Three, the Democratic Party has targeted Virginia District 1 as flippable for 2026. That means that the Party will be investing national resources behind this seat to help make that happen.
Which reminds me, I hope you donate, but also, I definitely hope you visit Salaam's website sign up a volunteer. (Scroll to the bottom of the home page for the form).
[Volunteer for Salaam for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/d4b8cf7f-0771-4ebc-a63f-f5037e15169e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## In Closing
I loved my time in Virginia. I returned home to Illinois to take care of my aging parents, who have both since passed. For anyone who supported me in Virginia, know that I give Salaam my full and total endorsement and support. And I hope you do as well. Salaam has the experience, the empathy, and the execution to win this District, and flip it Blue. What he needs are your trust, your resources, and your time investment. We are facing an existential threat to our Republic, and we need fighters like Salaam at the forefront to protect our basic economic and civil rights. That's what Salaam has done his entire career, and that's what he will do as your next Congressman. So whether it is $1 or $3500, please take a moment to donate to Salaam's campaign for U.S. Congress, and let's elect a true public servant who will lead with compassion through action. Are you in?
[Support Salaam for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/99851de7-fd9b-475c-898b-c23596159db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

This survey helps shape our work for the months ahead: where we recruit, how we train, and what support we provide to Emerge women running for office.

Our mission is to recruit and train Democratic women of the New American Majority to lead at every level, but we don’t make decisions in a vacuum. We listen to our community. And that includes you.

name: NO KINGS IN AMERICA! (via VPP)
subject: Elizabeth Warren’s urgent call to action >>>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This fight isn’t over!
| **FIRST:** Trump used his unchecked power to DECIMATE Medicaid, GUT Social Security offices, and END birthright citizenship. _Even the Supreme Court refused to stop him!_

**THEN:** Sen. Elizabeth Warren issued an URGENT call to action for Democrats: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250720_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ) **SO NOW,** we’re launching into action to reign in Trump’s authoritarian takeover before he can completely DESTROY our country!

**Do your part by 11:59pm:**

[**Should Congress pass the No Kings Act and stop Trump from becoming a dictator? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250720_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ) | [YES, TRUMP IS NOT ABOVE THE LAW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250720_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ)
---
[NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250720_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250720_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ)
Thank you,
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20668%2E878179%2EjBdAVZ)

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: $3. Today.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250720-1438-foote&t=1001&akid=1438%2E342411%2E1jyL7u ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Squad’s mission is simple: Build a people-powered movement, back our
progressive leaders, and create a democracy that works for everyone.

Right now, we’re up against powerful forces. MAGA extremists are ramping
up their attacks — spreading hate and targeting Squad Members — because
we’re organizing for a future where working people, not the ultra-wealthy,
set the agenda.

We don’t take corporate PAC money. We don’t ask billionaires for checks.
We never have, and we never will.

That means our movement is powered entirely by grassroots supporters like
you. Today, we’re asking if you’ll chip in $3:

$3 to hold Trump, his administration, and far-right
extremists accountable.

$3 to build grassroots power and strengthen our movement
from the ground up.

$3 to advocate for justice and create a democracy that works
for everyone — not just corporations or billionaire backers.

$3 may not seem like much compared to the GOP billionaires,
but when combined with support from people nationwide, it helps build the
power we need to take on the fights that lie ahead.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250720-movement.0OVPd5&refcode=em20250720-1438&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1438%2E342411%2E1jyL7u ]If you can, please chip in to the Squad Victory Fund today:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250720-movement.0OVPd5&refcode=em20250720-1438&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1438%2E342411%2E1jyL7u ]Contribute ››

Thank you for standing with us,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1438%2E342411%2E1jyL7u

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Adam Schiff
subject: They’ll spend an astronomical amount to hold their narrow majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8796%2E5257348%2E3bhzI1 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250720_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1004&akid=8796%2E5257348%2E3bhzI1 ]AXIOS headline - Scoop: Senate Republican super PAC smashes fundraising
record. By the numbers: SLF and its affiliated group One Nation have
raised over $85 million since the start of the year

I want to speak plainly,
Derek — flipping the Senate next
year is imperative, but with a flood of GOP dark money, it won’t be easy.

GOP super PACs, backed by millions of dollars from dark money donors, are
planning to spend big to continue Trump’s disastrous agenda of tax cuts
for corporations and healthcare cuts for families. They know if we retake
the majority in Congress, we can stop the madness of this administration
in its tracks. And they know that the unpopularity of the big ugly bill
and Trump’s tariffs make Republican Senators uniquely vulnerable at the
polls.

And while our work is not going to be easy — I know that together, we can
hold our most competitive seats and flip red states blue next year.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250720_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1005&akid=8796%2E5257348%2E3bhzI1 ]Will you make a contribution today to help power my efforts to flip the

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Stephen Colbert canceled. Free speech under attack?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Real Texas PAC, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-upsl?refcode=072025_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-upsl?refcode=072025_2]
CBS just announced it’s canceling The Late Show with Stephen Colbert in May 2026 — just days after Colbert blasted his own parent company for handing Trump a $16 million settlement he called a “big, fat bribe.”
Now CBS claims it’s purely financial. But with ad revenue down and pressure from the right mounting, many are asking:
Was this about budget cuts — or silencing dissent?
Top Democrats are demanding answers. Americans are watching closely. And we want to hear from you:
How concerned are you about the stifling of free speech in America?
Extremely Concerned [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-colbert?refcode=072025_2]
Very Concerned [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-colbert?refcode=072025_2]
Somewhat Concerned [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-colbert?refcode=072025_2]
Not at all Concerned [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-colbert?refcode=072025_2]
Paid for by The Real Texas PAC, www.therealtexaspac.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
ABOUT THIS PAC:
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States

Folks, it’s Jasmine. And I’m going to keep it real with you: **We have a lot of work ahead of us if we want to take back power in Congress next year.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111816462/558488924/-31074794?refcode=250720_Jasmine_Midterms&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmEzODIxMS04ZDY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xLGVkj0vX8HIeypcVmttGLEAR5T14Er6Twarp_pLlSo=)** I’m not one to wallow in doom and gloom about the future — _even though it’s tough to see the light right now._ I’d much rather roll up my sleeves and get to work to fix the mess that we’re in right now. **That’s why I’m doing everything I can to spread Democrats’ message of hope, progress, equality, democracy, and opportunity — _while calling out the Republicans’ agenda of hate, divisiveness, and suffering._** But I can’t wage this fight alone — and it’s clear our message isn’t reaching all the people it needs to. name: Clean Energy Poll (Team Fetterman)
subject: one Big, Ugly Betrayal (need your response, Derek)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hi, Derek, Team Fetterman here.
Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill – now _law_ – is a raw deal for working families, especially in PA. The clean energy cuts buried in the bill alone are going to wreak havoc on household budgets, local economies, and our fight against the climate crisis.

All so Republicans' megadonors can get a fat tax break. 🙃
Specifically, here’s what Trump's clean energy cuts mean for PA:
👉 **Billions in investment gone.** Over $3 billion in clean energy projects – and 26,000 future PA jobs – are on the chopping block.
👉**Higher utility bills.** Trump's cuts will _raise_ electricity costs by $93 per household and 10% for businesses by 2026. Gas prices? Up $582 per year by 2035.
**👉 Job losses in PA. **Trump’s bill guts the 30% tax credit for solar installation, risking layoffs across growing green industries, especially in Western PA.
This budget is a disaster. We need to know where you stand.
**[We're asking YOU and 4,999 others to respond to this poll before MIDNIGHT:](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk191-su-fl&t=1&akid=10209%2E434096%2EOM3faP)**
**Do you support Trump's clean energy cuts?**
| | | [YES](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk191-su-fl&t=2&akid=10209%2E434096%2EOM3faP)

name: Ryan Crosswell
subject: Did you see me on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Jen Psaki had me on her show to talk about the DOJ leader who asked me to drop the corruption charges against Eric Adams on Donald Trump’s behalf.
| | | | |

| | | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b8bba89-ef1d-4561-9e6b-5b5ae324010d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Recently, Bove had to answer to the claims I made in my resignation letter from the DOJ in front of the U.S. Senate. And I have no doubt that he was sweating bullets. Because I know the truth: the Trump administration asked me to ignore the law — and I said no. Any denial of that claim is a lie. I’m running for Congress because Democrats are in desperate need of leaders who will stand up to Donald Trump, not bend the knee like my MAGA opponent has done time after time. I’ve stood up to Trump before, and I’d do it a thousand times more. [**If you’re with me, please split $10**** between ****Blue Amp Action**** and my campaign today. We’ve set a goal to raise $20,000 through digital by the end of the week, and I need your help to reach it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T347cb30c-72e9-4a93-89be-917bb313d705/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Sharice Davids
subject: Read this if you’re feeling exhausted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s depressing, enraging, and frustrating all at the same time

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111820537/558493095/-1340363074?refcode=email_072025_exhausted&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzA0NmFmOC05MTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKj_WfIpGiGZyNCBka7fdCUnr8_ejmBf9U2gvvaOCpw=) [_**It’s Sharice Davids, and I want to be totally candid: Yes, this is a fundraising email. I’d be really grateful if you could read my note below about the anger and frustration we’re all feeling right now, then chip in to help me do something about it in Washington.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111820538/558493096/-1340363074?refcode=email_072025_exhausted&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzA0NmFmOC05MTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKj_WfIpGiGZyNCBka7fdCUnr8_ejmBf9U2gvvaOCpw=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111820539/558493097/-1340363074?refcode=email_072025_exhausted&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzA0NmFmOC05MTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKj_WfIpGiGZyNCBka7fdCUnr8_ejmBf9U2gvvaOCpw=)
---
If you’re feeling angry or exhausted with politics right now, you’re not alone.
It feels like Donald Trump and National Republicans are somehow getting more and more extreme by the minute, all while working families are begging them for relief. Watching this process up close, it’s no wonder why so many people feel left behind by their government.
It’s depressing, enraging, and frustrating all at the same time.
But that doesn’t mean we should tune out everything that’s happening in DC, even if it’s tempting. Because that’s exactly what National Republicans want us to do.
**Let me put it another way: There is nothing Donald Trump would love more than to watch us voluntarily remove ourselves from the political process.**
Why? Because he KNOWS that grassroots movements like this are still a roadblock to his agenda. He KNOWS we have the power to protect families from his worst impulses if we fight back each and every time.
So even though so many of us (including yours truly) are feeling exhausted, enraged, or terrified, I’m asking you to stay engaged in this work. I’m asking you to keep fighting. And I’m asking you to resist, even if the odds are stacked against us.
[_**I’m going to keep fighting, scratching, and clawing for progress in every way I can, and I hope you’ll be there by my side. So please, can you chip in right now to help me win this fight for our country’s future?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111820540/558493098/-1340363074?refcode=email_072025_exhausted&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzA0NmFmOC05MTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKj_WfIpGiGZyNCBka7fdCUnr8_ejmBf9U2gvvaOCpw=)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Under Kristi Noem, it’s masks on, accountability off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Are masked ICE raids what Kristi Noem calls “security”? |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111821228/558494057/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWJkN2FkMS05MjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHfOkxhb8nO-EfYs1-p4BwBWG8B5T7wmgxAA8TFYlc0=&emci=e35c6d45-0364-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f1bd7ad1-9265-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7878003)
Hey friend, [**Let’s talk about what's happening in our communities: ICE raids carried out by agents in masks, refusing to identify themselves. This is the new normal under Secretary Kristi Noem—a lawless procedure that tramples our values and erodes trust in the entire system.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111821231/558494058/444482356?refcode=E14225-20250720-ICERaids-SL-Immigration&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWJkN2FkMS05MjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHfOkxhb8nO-EfYs1-p4BwBWG8B5T7wmgxAA8TFYlc0=) **Here’s the honest truth:** If you treat immigrants and American citizens like criminals—bursting into homes, hiding behind masks, and ducking accountability—it’s not about safety.**It’s about fear and control.** No other agency in America operates like this, and we wouldn’t stand for it if they tried.
| [HELP ERIC FIGHT BACK »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111821233/558494059/444482356?refcode=E14225-20250720-ICERaids-SB-Immigration&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWJkN2FkMS05MjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHfOkxhb8nO-EfYs1-p4BwBWG8B5T7wmgxAA8TFYlc0=)
---
Secretary Noem keeps dodging Congress, refusing to answer for these secret raids or the chaos they cause.**Apparently, she’d rather run from accountability than defend what ICE is doing on her watch. That’s cowardice, plain and simple.**
**What message are we sending our kids when law enforcement acts this way? It’s not justice. It’s intimidation—especially for women, children, and families who deserve better.**
**I’m demanding answers and real oversight. It’s time to say enough to the secrecy, the drama, and the power grabs. Law enforcement should work for the people, in the light, not hidden behind masks, operating in the shadows.**
Eric

clean_body: Are masked ICE raids what Kristi Noem calls “security”? | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Hey friend, = Here’s the honest truth: If you treat immigrants and American citizens like criminals—bursting into homes, hiding behind masks, and ducking accountability—it’s not about safety.It’s about fear and control. No other agency in America operates like this, and we wouldn’t stand for it if they tried. | = Secretary Noem keeps dodging Congress, refusing to answer for these secret raids or the chaos they cause.Apparently, she’d rather run from accountability than defend what ICE is doing on her watch. That’s cowardice, plain and simple. What message are we sending our kids when law enforcement acts this way? It’s not justice. It’s intimidation—especially for women, children, and families who deserve better. I’m demanding answers and real oversight. It’s time to say enough to the secrecy, the drama, and the power grabs. Law enforcement should work for the people, in the light, not hidden behind masks, operating in the shadows. Eric | = Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. | | Reader,It wasn't so long ago that The New York Times was upheld as the gold standard in journalism. Today, many Americans feel the paper has betrayed its readers.

Now, enthusiasm is growing over The New York Sun returning to its historic role as a counterweight to the Times. We've heard a lot of frustration over the widening gulf between what the Times claims to be and what it is in reality.

It won't be easy. The Times is large and established. It's a modern David vs. Goliath media battle.Ultimately, a membership with the Sun doesn't just give you full access to the finest American journalism, **it also sends a message to the Times and other newsrooms that have lost their way.
