name: Haley Stevens
subject: Thank YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Can you do me a favor?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3877?t=2&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3878?t=3&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)
Hi null,

Before anything else, I want to say _thank you_. I can’t even begin to express how much it means to me to have you stand beside me as we fight to keep Michigan blue.
Thanks to your support, we’re off to an incredible start: **_Multiple_ polls have shown me leading my MAGA Republican opponent, Mike Rogers.**
That’s HUGE. And even though my lead is within the margin of error, it shows we’ve got real momentum and that working people in Michigan are sick and tired of Trump’s chaos agenda.
But now we need to keep our momentum going. And I want to make sure I’m focused on the issues that matter most to you and your family. null, **[will you take 60 seconds to complete my official Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3879?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3879?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)
---
Your feedback will help guide this campaign every step of the way, from the messages we share to the voters we reach out to all across this great state.
**I love Michigan. I grew up here – surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work.** My parents ran a landscaping business, and from a young age, I learned what it meant to put in a full day’s work to build a better future for your family.

I’ve spent my career doing just that. During the Great Recession, I helped lead President Obama’s Auto Rescue, helping save over 200,000 Michigan jobs. Then in 2018, I flipped a Republican-held House seat blue – and helped Democrats take back the House majority.
Now, I’m raising my hand again, this time to fight for Michiganders in the U.S. Senate.

null, I can’t do it alone. This campaign is built by and for grassroots supporters like you. Your voice matters deeply to me, **[so will you share your thoughts and take my official Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3879?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3879?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)
---
With gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3877?t=8&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3877?t=9&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=390%2E49239%2EkSLCL_)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Team WFP
subject: Trump and Republicans sold us out. On July 26, we show up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Behind closed doors — and in plain sight — Republicans in Congress and the Trump administration are making devastating choices, Peter. **Ruthless ones.** They’re stripping health care from 17 million people. Slashing food assistance so severely that parents are forced to choose between paying rent and putting dinner on the table. Cutting school lunches — not out of necessity, but because a child lives in the “wrong” ZIP code. And as wildfires rage in the west and floods rise in the east, they’re hollowing out FEMA. They’re tearing apart immigrant families — our neighbors, our coworkers, our loved ones. All while handing billionaires, corporate CEOs, and Wall Street donors another windfall. This isn’t negligence. It’s cruelty by design. And we’ve had enough. **[On Saturday, July 26th, people in all 50 states and Washington D.C. are taking part in the Families First Day of Action, a nationwide day of events, rallies, and marches.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMSLs3uQVktkhGjO4n3zOuE01TWfLuH391szqeDGX3kFrMbtC62D6feRPLfMDHfAQ_EDcDrDjPj4ekzwdv8HkmZyTlgClkPUju5b-nM33YOnwHursTk18L2hUfYFdPLGit1u3J1VmK5LAgWNaaUxu53AY87McwB1krcLGgkXZO-HjyGzQqrwDdVKwsemSxmE9JG2C-eMfIq-sGGLVoy7RFYZa9ux-L5_cpI4YUgfjVq7viV5rvOZaWT1xYpkhet5T17h01UBKN9BOYMxiVxtxfPs/4ic/BNpdvxY9SVyaM31bpfSsGw/h0/h001.ufJ4cUwgdl_YVy7buHYGru4ShEFhCCwufCebZp9Df78)** It's our moment to say what should never have needed saying: **our families come first.** Not billionaires. Not corporate lobbyists. Not the politicians who sold us out. **[Find an event near you »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMSLs3uQVktkhGjO4n3zOuE01TWfLuH391szqeDGX3kFrMbtC62D6feRPLfMDHfAQ_GEb-pxffGv78T2zSnyB7Lrd4juWJZeugp0EPQiD7Gpw9t5DGTk-aEyJQdUQ17xig26mExw30XH30CtUOL21TtwlKmwrubyZ7MikP25PI8-peZAmpRJ2mtotuUyCX-Ze4FwGV24h_O39kG770OoGgXtU9pCYqHk1MhCPkWoKC_6TtzF2WNK42Szqay1BP002tGCrW1ZiCGs4iknvjib6lJY/4ic/BNpdvxY9SVyaM31bpfSsGw/h1/h001.A0bi8X3slGoJ48wp-ihlXYAZdRBui1Zj09etvjS0QHs)** From small towns to big cities, families are rising up on July 26th — because we know exactly what’s at stake, Peter, and we know what side we’re on. We’re standing together for a future where every child is nourished, every person has health care, and every family, no matter their ZIP code or immigration status, can live with safety, dignity, and hope. While Republicans and the Trump administration make it clear who _they’re_ fighting for, it’s on us to show the country who _we’re_ fighting for — **and who we refuse to leave behind.** **[Find a Families First event happening near you on July 26th and be a part of the movement putting people before profit:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMSLs3uQVktkhGjO4n3zOuE01TWfLuH391szqeDGX3kFrMbtC62D6feRPLfMDHfAQ_KL2r0uJHc9ahKzRI4FtCWKvUED4aUNmnPWNi94BZwnKzvBpR2voY2yWaBdN5H9eM9Z0L4HIYejEv2j9DmQw6MeLdkujpg3B5FIM4TtJP13K3mHo2InsTExbODmd-mGtXCEfD4sRvURrBZL5_oROv4AK0WjcpdvZYTj0Hhb1ATgvGae2XYOsGvD1d5JpetHNJmam_epmbQ17OAGlCSOxQCA/4ic/BNpdvxY9SVyaM31bpfSsGw/h2/h001.zp6KhQga84colL4w51Oo-qJNBeCAz8n2_6GPxusAAb4)** clean_body: | | | Behind closed doors — and in plain sight — Republicans in Congress and the Trump administration are making devastating choices, Peter. Ruthless ones. They’re stripping health care from 17 million people. Slashing food assistance so severely that parents are forced to choose between paying rent and putting dinner on the table. Cutting school lunches — not out of necessity, but because a child lives in the “wrong” ZIP code. And as wildfires rage in the west and floods rise in the east, they’re hollowing out FEMA. They’re tearing apart immigrant families — our neighbors, our coworkers, our loved ones. All while handing billionaires, corporate CEOs, and Wall Street donors another windfall. This isn’t negligence. It’s cruelty by design. And we’ve had enough. It's our moment to say what should never have needed saying: our families come first. Not billionaires. Not corporate lobbyists. Not the politicians who sold us out. From small towns to big cities, families are rising up on July 26th — because we know exactly what’s at stake, Peter, and we know what side we’re on. We’re standing together for a future where every child is nourished, every person has health care, and every family, no matter their ZIP code or immigration status, can live with safety, dignity, and hope. While Republicans and the Trump administration make it clear who they’re fighting for, it’s on us to show the country who we’re fighting for — and who we refuse to leave behind. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families Party and Working Families Power, please .

# [Release Trump's FULL Medical Records NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T293e653b-f913-4f38-a6aa-3d032eca0bc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T475f3703-5d83-478d-a8c1-b8af971b01a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After everyone with eyes was able to plainly see Trump's swollen legs, discolorations, and other troubling symptoms, the White House FINALLY released a snippet of health information -- [Trump has "chronic venous insufficiency.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2794797f-18e0-419a-a4a0-35a59c967fee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)" In tones normally reserved for a hangnail, they said this was no big deal, very common, nothing to see here... Except that this can indicate a very serious heart condition, possibly life-threatening, along with a range of other very dangerous ailments. But we don't have the full records, so we have to take the word of chronic liars. [**Add your name, and demand that ALL Trump's medical records be released, as has been common practice for presidents for decades.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdebd911f-4cc0-47ff-8365-b438adfca2dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This also must include cognitive, memory, and related tests, given the rapidly worsening symptoms Trump has been showing on that front as well (including an utterly [bizarre public rant](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7474732e-0cd4-46a9-89cd-6785fd012ff7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) about the Unabomber and Trump's uncle). This man has his finger on the nuclear button, which is already frightening. But if he's falling apart physically and mentally, that takes it to a whole other level. And we need to know that, so we can act accordingly. [**Add your name, and demand that ALL Trump's medical records be released.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T111bdd04-0388-4760-a779-54736e08b68c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Tell The DOJ: Release The Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If there’s truly nothing else to see here, then we’ve got some questions.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250720-5261-footer&t=1&akid=5261%2E420207%2Eq30IQT)
Peter,
Last Wednesday Pramila joined CNN’s _Situation Room_ to call out President Trump and the DOJ for doing a complete 180 on their demands for transparency on the Epstein Files.
**If there’s truly nothing else to see here, then we’ve got some questions:**
* Why was Attorney General Pam Bondi **bragging about having a client list on her desk** earlier this year?

* Why has one of Trump’s top officials at the FBI reportedly **threatened to resign** over the handling of the case?

* Why did House Republicans vote down a bipartisan bill demanding the release of the documents, only to advance their own **_non-binding_ resolution** instead?

**We need the truth, and we need it now.[Will you add your name to our petition demanding the Department of Justice publicly release the full Epstein files with no exceptions and no redactions?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250720-1-epstein?source=em20250720-5261&akid=5261%2E420207%2Eq30IQT)**
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250720-1-epstein?source=em20250720-5261&akid=5261%2E420207%2Eq30IQT)**
The reality is that this information should have been released under the Biden administration. And while Trump and his MAGA allies were all too happy to use the case as a political weapon back then, now that they’re in power, they’re shutting the door when it matters most.

clean_body: If there’s truly nothing else to see here, then we’ve got some questions. Peter, Last Wednesday Pramila joined CNN’s Situation Room to call out President Trump and the DOJ for doing a complete 180 on their demands for transparency on the Epstein Files. If there’s truly nothing else to see here, then we’ve got some questions: Why was Attorney General Pam Bondi bragging about having a client list on her desk earlier this year? Why has one of Trump’s top officials at the FBI reportedly threatened to resign over the handling of the case? Why did House Republicans vote down a bipartisan bill demanding the release of the documents, only to advance their own non-binding resolution instead? We need the truth, and we need it now. The reality is that this information should have been released under the Biden administration. And while Trump and his MAGA allies were all too happy to use the case as a political weapon back then, now that they’re in power, they’re shutting the door when it matters most. If we accept anything less than full transparency here, we’re going to be letting the powerful off the hook once again. We can’t let that happen. Our democracy depends on accountability, not cover-ups. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Team Schrier
subject: Tell the Senate: Pass Kim Schrier’s clean energy bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[PETITION] [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111824668/558502597/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWIwZTIzYS05OTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXOYxdHydlZFdLopZzpRfm0lwHwbAejARbVEeQ0JZcs=&emci=1958d6d4-dd63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a9b0e23a-9965-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

Kim’s bill to bring more transparency and accountability to hydropower just passed the House—with bipartisan support.

This is a major win for clean energy. Hydropower is one of the most reliable sources of renewable electricity. It’s already powering homes, businesses, and communities—especially here in the Pacific Northwest.

But right now, outdated permitting rules are holding it back. Many hydro projects are stuck in a long and confusing relicensing process that can take more than a decade. That slows down clean energy and hurts Washington. Kim’s bill ensures that this process is more transparent by requiring the federal government to clearly report where each project stands and what’s causing delays.

_And here’s why it matters_ —**hydropower is** :
* Zero-emission. There's no burning, no smog, no carbon. Just clean energy from flowing water.
* 24/7 reliable. It runs day and night, rain or shine. Unlike solar or wind, hydro is always “on.”
* Grid-stabilizing. Can ramp up fast when demand spikes, reducing reliance on coal or gas backups.

This is the only bipartisan energy bill to pass the House so far this year—and Kim is just getting started.

Kim is fighting tooth and nail to modernize how we build and maintain clean energy infrastructure, and this bill moves us in the right direction. Now, we’re building support to keep the momentum going.

But with our deadline quickly approaching, we still have a campaign to run, and right now, we’re falling short of where we need to be. | = | Peter, It’s no secret that fundraising can be tough during the summer. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111824695/558502655/-788614911?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250720_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE2N2UxNS05OTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_9ge38NMZrC7IfKyNvhPoLbYrWVsTyxWOY01EYJXxA=) Team, I’ll cut to the chase: America is in **deep, deep trouble.** In just the first six months of Trump’s second term, here’s what we’ve seen:
* Massive tax cuts for billionaires while kicking millions of Americans off of their health insurance.
* Federal officers fired for being “disloyal.”
* Civil servants purged.
* Critics arrested.
* Trump’s DOJ used to retaliate against political enemies.
* The economy tanked with reckless tariffs and chaos.
* **And worst of all: no one’s stopping him.**

The Supreme Court ruled he has absolute immunity. The Republican Congress cheers him on. And Democrats in the Senate? Despite fighting like hell, we’re outnumbered, losing vote after vote while Trump rewrites laws by executive order. Social Security? On the chopping block. The Department of Education? Dismantled. Women’s rights, gun safety, and climate progress? **All at risk.** This isn’t politics as usual. This is authoritarianism. And pretending democracy will fix itself? That’s a fantasy. Here’s the truth: **Flipping the Senate in 2026 is our last, best shot.** **That’s why Flip the Senate exists. ** They’re not the DNC. clean_body: They know that if voters hear the truth, Jay’s campaign collapses. | | | Friend, My hard-hitting ad exposing Jay Jones’ record is lighting up the airwaves, and the far-Left is furious. They’re desperate to shut us down. They know that if voters hear the truth, Jay’s campaign collapses. Jay Jones wants to eliminate bail, make it harder to hold criminals accountable, and put social justice over public safety. I have been a relentless defender of law and order. I have reduced violent crime, cracked down on drug traffickers, and defended victims when woke prosecutors looked the other way. They have Hollywood donors and activist cash. We have the TRUTH — and YOU. Let’s win this together. For Virginia,Jason Miyares Attorney General of Virginia | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: URGENT:
subject: ⏳ We’re running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, we’re running out of time.
We’re heading into the final stretch of the week, and we’re still short of our goal to stay on track for July. That means fewer resources for community events, field organizing, and ad reach and more ground lost to the dark money machine behind Ashley Moody .
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/78326A2F6C2B7A4243304146526272734E4F44424D4E613852777179787242436A675542516465653143566B46684A6F565365526C65482B466F753345433947/editor_images/Halloween%20Time%20GIF%20by%20Perecz%20Annabella.gif]
If we don’t close the gap, we risk falling behind early. Moody has the power of calling on Daddy Trump for money at a moment's notice, we’re doing it the old fashioned way , the way it should be.
We need to raise $7,300 by midnight, and I’m asking you directly:
Will you chip in to help us hit our goal before time runs out?
[Rush a donation now] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
This isn’t just a campaign, it’s a movement rooted in people, not politics as usual. It only works when everyone leans in together.
So let’s flip the hourglass. Let’s prove that grassroots power can still win in Florida.
But we have to act fast.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: My story. Our fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hey Peter — I wanted to take a minute to tell you a little bit more about myself,**but if you’re short on time today, I’ll cut to the chase:**[**Will you consider making a contribution to help us continue this work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111826479/558507724/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFiZDZkMS05ZTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVcZ4j_nyakDPRXBDq4iMbMHKtwbVFYXdALk8TmrcRY=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111826480/558507725/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFiZDZkMS05ZTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVcZ4j_nyakDPRXBDq4iMbMHKtwbVFYXdALk8TmrcRY=) I got my start in politics thanks to my mom. She immigrated to this country from a growing theocratic regime threat in Iran and instilled a deep respect for democracy in me and my brother. Our dinner table conversations were a bit different than most families. Instead of talking about sports or about what we did in school that day, we were discussing politics and why none of us should ever take this democracy for granted. I didn’t start my career running for office, Peter — after graduation, I spent time as an advisor in the Executive Office of United Nations Secretary General Ban Ki-moon, serving on the team that helped to deliver the historic Paris Climate Agreement. Fighting for sustainable solutions to address our rapidly growing climate crisis has always been at the core of my work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111826481/558507726/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFiZDZkMS05ZTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVcZ4j_nyakDPRXBDq4iMbMHKtwbVFYXdALk8TmrcRY=) During the first Trump Administration, I couldn’t just stay silent as his extremist regime attacked women, working families, our environment, and immigrants, **so I decided to stand up and fight back**. I was proud to stand with thousands of Americans in protest of the confirmation of right-wing extremist Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court, but I knew that to create the change I wanted to see, I needed to do more. **So after knocking on tens of thousands of doors with my team (and my mom) in 2020, I became the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111826482/558507727/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFiZDZkMS05ZTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVcZ4j_nyakDPRXBDq4iMbMHKtwbVFYXdALk8TmrcRY=) And we got straight to work after Election Day. When the extreme right-wing Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ with the _Dobbs_ decision, I led and passed a resolution to ensure that patients, doctors, nurses, and pharmacists weren’t being criminalized for administering or accessing care — a huge risk in Arizona at that time. As a Councilwoman, my office was always an open door for workers and I was proud to pass some of the most progressive, pro-union policies in Arizona’s history, including a prevailing wage ordinance that improves the quality of life for construction workers, a Worker Heat Safety ordinance that protects thousands of outdoor workers from the extreme heat Arizonans experience due to our escalating climate crisis, as well as helped to raise wages for thousands of city workers across Phoenix. Everyone deserves a living wage and dignity in the workplace and whether I’m in Phoenix or in Washington, I’ll always fight for working people. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111826483/558507728/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFiZDZkMS05ZTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVcZ4j_nyakDPRXBDq4iMbMHKtwbVFYXdALk8TmrcRY=) Trump’s disastrous plan for the country is already negatively impacting our progress. Cuts to Medicaid will mean hospital closures and worse outcomes for all of us. Cuts to SNAP mean fewer families will be able to put food on the table. And the rolling back of our climate goals will mean harsher, more extreme weather and more deadly outcomes. As an expert on climate policy and the impact of our climate crisis, I know that this is the defining issue of our time — that’s why I will lead and support policies that accelerate the transition from fossil fuels to renewable energy, increase our climate resilience, and work directly with FEMA to declare extreme heat as a natural disaster. Each and every person deserves a pathway to success. We deserve living wages and affordable healthcare. I’ll fight every single day in Washington for the everyday people of Arizona’s 3rd District, and I’m glad you’re in this fight with us. **[So, I’ll ask one more time: will you make a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111826484/558507729/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFiZDZkMS05ZTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVcZ4j_nyakDPRXBDq4iMbMHKtwbVFYXdALk8TmrcRY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111826485/558507730/-912468211?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250720_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWFiZDZkMS05ZTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVcZ4j_nyakDPRXBDq4iMbMHKtwbVFYXdALk8TmrcRY=)

name: Jason Crow
subject: Aurora: 13 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Thirteen years ago today, our community in Aurora was forever changed because of a mass shooting.

Twelve lives were stolen. Dozens more were wounded. Families, friendships, and futures were shattered.

And yet, in the years since, we’ve seen the same tragedy repeat itself again and again, from Boulder to Colorado Springs, from Uvalde to Buffalo.

As a dad, veteran, and Coloradan, the fight against gun violence is deeply personal to me. As your representative, I’ve worked hard to pass common-sense gun safety reforms that protect our families and save lives. And Colorado has helped lead the way by raising the age to buy firearms, strengthening background checks, and keeping guns out of the hands of domestic abusers.

But right now, much of that progress is at risk.

The Trump administration is launching a coordinated effort to dismantle the very agency that regulates the gun industry. They’re pushing deep cuts to ATF, allowing gun dealers to destroy records early, weakening background checks, and making it harder for law enforcement to trace crime guns.

Just weeks ago, Republicans in Congress passed legislation eliminating taxes on silencers and military-style weapons while cutting Medicaid and food assistance for millions of Americans.

We cannot accept that as the new normal.

I believe in a country where our kids don’t have to grow up fearing gun violence. That’s why I pledge to honor the lives lost in Aurora not just with words, but with concrete action. I hope you’ll join me.

— Jason
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

name: Victory Mailings
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205gt4c3mfqd3pe3pfz0x24v0itlv5wvnusdcv9rxzojz6alu15engwzjgo0g1id75m2icy1qh7wt74qip8&__stmp=szpq7q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szpq7q&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol02ltprdlu1kxiojuaz8sirs90zrfk7rnylmez41t1dk1sm1eflkpfl6w7tzliogc0j3y1vrciqpal0ec2twniwe8kgc9dhcd4pkey3xk1yefjhh009q3wvuy7zv8kh09exco3e2ztu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szpq7q&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szpq7q&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szpq7q&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szpq7q&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol02ltprdlu1kxiojuaz8sirs90zrfk7rnylmez41t1dk1sm1eflkpfl6w7tzliogc0j3y1vrciqpal0ec2twniwe8kgc9dhcd4pkey3xk1yefjhh009q3wvuy7zv8kh09exco3e2ztu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szpq7q&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szpq7q&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Peter, it’s Charlie. We don’t have a shortage of MAGA Republicans in Georgia. And we certainly don’t have a shortage of Republicans who think they deserve a reward for doing nothing for the people they claim to represent. Buddy Carter. Burt Jones. Chris Carr. Marjorie Taylor Greene. They’ve always put Trump first, billionaires and big corporations second — and hardworking Georgians dead last. But this is also the state that gave us Stacey Abrams, Rev. Raphael Warnock, Sen. Jon Ossoff — a President for the people in Jimmy Carter, and a civil rights giant in John Lewis. Georgia is capable of achieving great things. And come 2026, the people of Georgia will once again choose progress over extremism. But we can’t take anything for granted. Peter, we need your help to lay the groundwork for critical gains across Georgia: to protect our Senate seat, elect proven Democratic champions, and move this state forward, not backwards. **It’s time to turn Georgia from a purple state to a blue stronghold once and for all.** But none of that works without you. In this short amount of time, we’ve seen Trump gut funding for critical agencies like the Social Security Administration and the VA, spend millions of taxpayer dollars on his military birthday parade, and sign his trash bill into law that will strip Americans of their healthcare and food assistance. I know this moment may seem difficult, but we can’t give up. Together, we must continue to fight back against Trump and stand up for the future we want for the next generation. So as we look ahead, here’s my promise to you: **I will always show up to serve YOU no matter what.** I will be here to listen and fight for our families. To fight for healthcare, safer communities, and better education. To fight for a brighter future for our children. **On behalf of Oregonians, I’ll continue fighting to make life more affordable and to give our kids the future they deserve.** [**I’m not backing down in the fight against Trump and the fight for the hard working Oregonians I came to Congress to represent — and I need you standing with me. name: David Hogg
subject: Changing who's in power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Right now, we’re facing a real problem.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250720-1&t=1&akid=2409%2E587540%2EFdLRCT)
Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg.
We have to ask ourselves: How do we build a Democratic Party that the working class wants to vote for?
Because right now, we’re facing a _real_ problem.
Millions of people are leaving blue states and moving to the South, where their votes are gerrymandered and suppressed out of power.
We say we want to win back the working class. We say we want dramatic change.
But then we turn around and expect to do all that _without changing who’s in power._
That’s not going to work.
**The cast of characters that brought us here are not who’s going to get us out of here.**
If we’re serious about saving our democracy, if we’re serious about becoming the party of the people, not just the lesser evil — then we need to start acting like it.
That’s why Leaders We Deserve is building a healthy, people-powered culture of primaries.
**We believe that being in office for 30 years shouldn’t mean you get to coast through the next 10 without a challenge, especially not in the middle of a crisis.**
We are a democracy. We are the Democratic Party. We need to have a healthy culture of ensuring that people, including incumbents, can be challenged in primaries — and it’s not looked down on. It is embraced and celebrated.
We’re not doing this to be divisive. We’re doing this because our party has to dramatically change if it wants to survive and win elections again.
We need to tangibly show voters why we are not the least bad of two options, but why we are the best option. Period.
And that’s not going to happen with the same insiders spouting the same empty talking points year after year.
We need a new generation of leaders — with new ideas, new energy, and the courage to tell voters the truth and actually earn their trust. And yeah, that might make some folks in power uncomfortable.
But guess what? _That’s the point._
**Comfortable people — especially comfortable people with power — do not change. And right now, it is time for a change in management.**
This is a moment of crisis. We cannot keep tiptoeing around the truth.
Our democracy is being dismantled in broad daylight. And if we don’t meet this moment with urgency, courage, and new leadership — we will lose.
We have to change this culture and truly embrace democracy within our party if we are going to find our way out of this. Because no single person has the answer — but I can assure you, a healthy culture of competition is something our party can only stand to benefit from.
**At Leaders We Deserve, we’re not afraid to shake things up. We’re building the bench. We’re challenging the status quo. And we’re backing the kind of young, bold, progressive candidates who have the guts to do what this moment demands.**
But we need your support to do this work. We can only keep changing the game with folks like you stepping up to power our grassroots movement.
**[Peter, contribute $5 or anything you can right now to back us in this fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250720_1_primaries?refcode=em20250720-2409&amount=5&refcode2=2409_587540_FdLRCT&akid=2409%2E587540%2EFdLRCT)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250720_1_primaries?amount=5&refcode=em20250720-2409&refcode2=2409_587540_FdLRCT&akid=2409%2E587540%2EFdLRCT)**
With urgency and gratitude,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250720-1&t=2&refcode2=2409_587540_FdLRCT&akid=2409%2E587540%2EFdLRCT)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2409%2E587540%2EFdLRCT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2409%2E587540%2EFdLRCT)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

clean_body: | | | Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican nominee for Virginia Governor this November, said, “don’t panic” about massive cuts to Medicaid. She says Trump’s Big Ugly Bill “does so many great things.” Tell that to the 322,000 Virginians at risk of losing healthcare, and the hospitals and clinics fearing they’ll close thanks to Medicaid cuts. Our next chance to REJECT the Trump agenda is November’s Virginia elections, where we can hand MAGA big defeats in state legislative elections. Social worker and mom Elizabeth Guzman is running in a toss-up red to blue race, and to expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. Over 5,000 online donations are powering our campaign to flip VA-HD22, and there are just over 100 days left until Election Day. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump targets YOU - look!
body:
Donald Trump just signed an executive order targeting ActBlue — the platform that powers nearly every grassroots Democratic campaign in America.
He’s not going after billionaires or corporate PACs. He’s going after us — the small-dollar donors who power progressive candidates and movements.
This is a direct attack on the heart of our democracy. And if we don’t fight back now, he’ll keep going. Chip in NOW to stand against this blatant act of authoritarian rule >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND ACTBLUE AGAINST TRUMP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
Trump has launched a direct attack on the grassroots. And if we don’t fight back now, there's no telling how far he'll take this.
Rush $7 to defend ActBlue and protect the future of small-dollar democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND ACTBLUE AGAINST TRUMP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
Imagine this:
You chip in $5 to support a pro-choice woman running for Congress. Or a first-time statehouse challenger. Or a school board candidate fighting book bans.
Now imagine the President of the United States signs an executive order to investigate — and dismantle — the platform you used to make that donation.
Not a right-wing conspiracy theory. Not a hypothetical.
That just happened.
Donald Trump is abusing executive power to go after ActBlue — the secure, trusted platform that powers nearly every grassroots Democratic campaign in the country.
He’s not targeting dark money. He’s not going after billionaire-funded super PACs. He’s coming after you — the small-dollar donors who fuel this movement.
We launched a $25,000 emergency fund to defend the platform that keeps this movement alive — but we’re still $13,000 short. And time is running out. If we don’t speak up, they’ll silence us. Chip in $7 or more to help us fight back before it’s too late: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]

name: Kendall Qualls, Candidate for Governor
subject: Tim Walz has failed us
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I refuse to let us be the generation that lost America.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aOUj/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDUxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDUxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | Friend,
It’s important that you know why your support is absolutely critical:
**Grassroots support is how we prove to the media, to voters, and to Tim Walz that our campaign is serious, competitive, and ready to win.**
We’re up against an incumbent with deep-pocketed allies and national name recognition. If we fall short now, the political class will write us off before we even get started.
**_[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today to help us show we’re ready to win. Can I count on you to rush in a donation now?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aOUj/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDUxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDUxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
Now let me tell you why I’m running.
I was raised in poverty in Harlem and a trailer park in rural Oklahoma. I delivered pizzas to pay for college, served as an officer in the U.S. Army, and earned my MBA from the University of Michigan.
I didn’t get where I am because of DEI programs, welfare, or government handouts. I got here through grit, faith, and opportunity—the very things Democrats like Tim Walz are trying to erase.
Tim Walz has failed Minnesota. He’s burdened us with $10 billion in new taxes and left a $5 billion budget hole. He’s stood by while crime surged, our schools declined, and indoctrination replaced education.
Minnesota doesn’t need more government. It needs leadership.
**_We need a conservative outsider with real-world experience who will:_****✅ Restore law and order****✅ Reverse the radical agenda****✅ Fix our economy ****✅ And give every Minnesotan the chance to succeed. **
**_[Help power my campaign and support me in this mission by donating $5, $15 or $25 today.>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aOUj/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDUxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDUxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
If we want to win, we must show strength right now.

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aOUj/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDUxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDUxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | Thank you for believing in this fight.
With gratitude,Kendall QuallsCandidate for Governor of Minnesota

clean_body: I refuse to let us be the generation that lost America. | | | | | | Friend, It’s important that you know why your support is absolutely critical: Grassroots support is how we prove to the media, to voters, and to Tim Walz that our campaign is serious, competitive, and ready to win. We’re up against an incumbent with deep-pocketed allies and national name recognition. If we fall short now, the political class will write us off before we even get started. Now let me tell you why I’m running. I was raised in poverty in Harlem and a trailer park in rural Oklahoma. I delivered pizzas to pay for college, served as an officer in the U.S. Army, and earned my MBA from the University of Michigan. I didn’t get where I am because of DEI programs, welfare, or government handouts. I got here through grit, faith, and opportunity—the very things Democrats like Tim Walz are trying to erase. Tim Walz has failed Minnesota. He’s burdened us with $10 billion in new taxes and left a $5 billion budget hole. He’s stood by while crime surged, our schools declined, and indoctrination replaced education. Minnesota doesn’t need more government. It needs leadership. We need a conservative outsider with real-world experience who will:✅ Restore law and order✅ Reverse the radical agenda✅ Fix our economy ✅ And give every Minnesotan the chance to succeed. If we want to win, we must show strength right now. | | | | Thank you for believing in this fight. With gratitude,Kendall QuallsCandidate for Governor of Minnesota | | Prepared and paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082 | | **The appearance of Kendall Qualls in military uniform does not imply or constitute endorsement by the U.S. Army or U.S. Department of Defense. | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

**THEN:** Trump and DOGE fired Social Security workers to line the pockets of wealthy billionaires, including _Elon Musk!_

name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Now, more than ever?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=wP6FBmngsAn+QDCluYAZTGgGHJX4OQqi8KFpf19/PWLaiRH6a6XDDbCqiAQrOIWZlX3Z5nZzOv3ciVuPB/7H9y6EPoas2nPzk/Fbvv/vzsY=]
Headline: 85 Percent of Voters Want Congress to Pass the Equal Rights Amendment [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/ERA_Poll.png]
Fifty years after the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) was initially passed in Congress, an overwhelming majority of likely voters want the provision aimed at guaranteeing equal rights for all genders to go into effect .
Recent polling from Data for Progress finds that 85 percent of likely voters support Congress passing the ERA to give it a second chance at being adopted as a constitutional amendment. Support for the amendment is bipartisan, with 93 percent of Democrats and 79 percent of both independents and Republicans agreeing that the provision should be passed.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should we adopt the Equal Rights Amendment to guarantee full & equal protections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=20.00&contactdata=wP6FBmngsAn+QDCluYAZTGgGHJX4OQqi8KFpf19/PWLaiRH6a6XDDbCqiAQrOIWZlX3Z5nZzOv3ciVuPB/7H9y6EPoas2nPzk/Fbvv/vzsY=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=20.00&contactdata=wP6FBmngsAn+QDCluYAZTGgGHJX4OQqi8KFpf19/PWLaiRH6a6XDDbCqiAQrOIWZlX3Z5nZzOv3ciVuPB/7H9y6EPoas2nPzk/Fbvv/vzsY=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=wP6FBmngsAn+QDCluYAZTGgGHJX4OQqi8KFpf19/PWLaiRH6a6XDDbCqiAQrOIWZlX3Z5nZzOv3ciVuPB/7H9y6EPoas2nPzk/Fbvv/vzsY=]

name: Bill of Rights Institute
subject: The Battle That Changed EVERYTHING
body:
META TAG (title): TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend,Today, many of us take the outcome of World War II for granted. But back in the 1940s, it was anything but. Before the Battle of Midway, victory in the Pacific War was far from certain. The Axis powers were strong, and America needed a miracle. Today, we reflect on the Battle of Midway as a pivotal moment in American History. But nowadays, too many Americans - especially students still in school - aren’t learning about these critical events.Our team put together a quick explainer on the Battle of Midway and World War II, and we’re offering it for free to new donors to the Bill of Rights Institute today.The Battle of Midway didn’t just change the course of World War II - it changed the way we conduct naval warfare forever. Our video reflects on the decisions made by leadership on both sides that led to America’s stunning victory over the Japanese.It’s great for history teachers and the casual history lovers alike, so be sure to suport the Bill of Rights Institute now and get a digital copy of this amazing video today.The Bill of Rights Institute is dedicated to teaching Americans of all ages about history-defining moments like the Battle of Midway.With history and civics education taking a backburner to other subjects in schools, the work we do to empower teachers, parents, and community members is more important than ever. Help us keep American history and principles alive. Watch our EXCLUSIVE Battle of Midway explainer now and support our efforts in civic education.Thank you,Bill of Rights Institute Team ADD YOUR SUPPORT >>1310 North Courthouse Rd., Ste. #620, Arlington, VA 22201

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us. It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any personal information we may collect about you, including across our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com Click here to unsubscribe.

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email: today@thefederalistwire.com

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Republicans are trying to steal the midterm elections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
At Donald Trump’s urging, they want to make an already-outrageous gerrymander even more extreme.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111829357/558515758/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwZTEwY2U5LWFkNjUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeqRfo7rhFuX1-h_hJ5Um_EIUhEsSEEeq8SC-8scQpA=&emci=8a4e5f98-1f64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c0e10ce9-ad65-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Let’s not kid ourselves about what Republican lawmakers in Texas are trying to accomplish right now. **They want to steal the midterm elections, at Donald Trump’s urging,** by drawing an even more gerrymandered congressional map — which could tilt four or even five House seats in their favor. That could be more than enough to swing control of the U.S. House, which Republicans only won by three seats in 2024, and could make the difference between Speaker Hakeem Jeffries and Speaker Mike Johnson. Republicans want to secure illegitimate power because they’re scared to face voters after passing Trump’s horrific, deeply unpopular budget bill, and they are eager to continue advancing his appalling agenda. **They know that they cannot win fairly, so they are willing to cheat. But we are not powerless to stop them.** At the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, we fight in Texas and around the country to end gerrymandering by electing fair maps champions, advancing redistricting reform, and growing a grassroots movement for free and fair elections. [**People like you make it possible for the NDRC to keep up this vital work of defending our democracy and responding to urgent, fast-moving threats like what we face in Texas. Please make a donation today to fight back against Republicans’ blatant plots to seize unearned power.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111829358/558515759/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXRedistrict_email_20250720-NDRC-Tier1-TXRedistrict_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250720-NDRC-Tier1-TXRedistrict_&utm_campaign=TXRedistrict&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwZTEwY2U5LWFkNjUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeqRfo7rhFuX1-h_hJ5Um_EIUhEsSEEeq8SC-8scQpA=) The GOP has run this play before. North Carolina Republicans gerrymandered three House seats in their favor leading up to the 2024 elections, when the GOP went on to win a three-vote majority. And Texas isn’t the only state where new maps are on the table. Ohio Republicans could steal three more House seats during this year’s redraw. Make no mistake: If the GOP is able to remain in power despite the will of the people, it will be an outrageous violation of our democracy. Let’s say that on November 3, 2026, a majority of voters cast their ballots for Democratic House candidates. It’s the culmination of months and months of tireless organizing. It’s a clear sign of opposition to Republican rule. But it isn’t enough. The GOP narrowly holds onto House control anyway, even after losing seats, through pick-ups in Texas and Ohio. Republicans could manufacture power for themselves for years to come through actions they take _this month_ in Texas. We must fight back. As the GOP goes all out to embed themselves into permanent minority rule, the NDRC is going all out to stop Republicans from manipulating maps and twisting our democracy in their favor. We’re executing a 10 Year Plan to secure fair maps, but it depends on ongoing support from people like you who are committed to this cause. [**Peter, that's why I’m asking if you can contribute any amount today and help hold the line for free and fair elections, with maps that truly reflect the will of the people.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111829359/558515760/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXRedistrict_email_20250720-NDRC-Tier1-TXRedistrict_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250720-NDRC-Tier1-TXRedistrict_&utm_campaign=TXRedistrict&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwZTEwY2U5LWFkNjUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeqRfo7rhFuX1-h_hJ5Um_EIUhEsSEEeq8SC-8scQpA=) Thank you for all you do to make this fight possible, Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111829360/558515761/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXRedistrict_email_20250720-NDRC-Tier1-TXRedistrict_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250720-NDRC-Tier1-TXRedistrict_&utm_campaign=TXRedistrict&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwZTEwY2U5LWFkNjUtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeqRfo7rhFuX1-h_hJ5Um_EIUhEsSEEeq8SC-8scQpA=)
---

clean_body: At Donald Trump’s urging, they want to make an already-outrageous gerrymander even more extreme. | Peter, Let’s not kid ourselves about what Republican lawmakers in Texas are trying to accomplish right now. They want to steal the midterm elections, at Donald Trump’s urging, by drawing an even more gerrymandered congressional map — which could tilt four or even five House seats in their favor. That could be more than enough to swing control of the U.S. House, which Republicans only won by three seats in 2024, and could make the difference between Speaker Hakeem Jeffries and Speaker Mike Johnson. Republicans want to secure illegitimate power because they’re scared to face voters after passing Trump’s horrific, deeply unpopular budget bill, and they are eager to continue advancing his appalling agenda. They know that they cannot win fairly, so they are willing to cheat. But we are not powerless to stop them. At the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, we fight in Texas and around the country to end gerrymandering by electing fair maps champions, advancing redistricting reform, and growing a grassroots movement for free and fair elections. = The GOP has run this play before. North Carolina Republicans gerrymandered three House seats in their favor leading up to the 2024 elections, when the GOP went on to win a three-vote majority. And Texas isn’t the only state where new maps are on the table. Ohio Republicans could steal three more House seats during this year’s redraw. Make no mistake: If the GOP is able to remain in power despite the will of the people, it will be an outrageous violation of our democracy. Let’s say that on November 3, 2026, a majority of voters cast their ballots for Democratic House candidates. It’s the culmination of months and months of tireless organizing. It’s a clear sign of opposition to Republican rule. But it isn’t enough. The GOP narrowly holds onto House control anyway, even after losing seats, through pick-ups in Texas and Ohio. Republicans could manufacture power for themselves for years to come through actions they take this month in Texas. We must fight back. As the GOP goes all out to embed themselves into permanent minority rule, the NDRC is going all out to stop Republicans from manipulating maps and twisting our democracy in their favor. We’re executing a 10 Year Plan to secure fair maps, but it depends on ongoing support from people like you who are committed to this cause. = Thank you for all you do to make this fight possible, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Peter,

I'm going to level with you and tell you what most Democrats are too scared to say out loud... Voters don't trust us anymore, and quite frankly they haven't been given many reasons to. The Democratic brand is in serious trouble. It's not because Americans love Republicans. They really don't. We're living under the most unpopular Republican presidency in history. The problem is that the Democratic Party isn't offering any real alternatives. Too many Democrats are afraid to lead. They offer timid critiques, talk to lobbyists and mega donors, and hide behind "bipartisanship" while working families drown in rising costs, climate disasters, and disappearing civil liberties. My opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, is the embodiment of that failed thinking. Marie wants you to believe she's some kind of common-sense moderate but when it's time to fight the hardest, she votes with Donald Trump's agenda again and again. She backed the **Laken Riley Act** , which laid the legal groundwork for Trump's mass deportation campaign. She voted for the **SAVE Act** , a voter suppression bill cooked up by MAGA Republicans to disenfranchise millions of American women. She parrots Republican talking points about immigrants and fentanyl, and she's refused to stand up to Speaker Mike Johnson while he pushes the biggest tax giveaway for billionaires in a generation. And now? While Trump's Education Secretary is holding **$137 million hostage from Washington schools** , Marie is nowhere to be found. Every Democratic Representative from Washington State signed a letter demanding the release of those funds. Every single one **_except_** Marie Gluesenkamp Perez _._ That money supports after-school programs, teacher training, and critical help for families like mine. It's life-changing support and she chose to betray our working class families. I'm not here to rubber-stamp MAGA-lite policies or water down our values so we can appeal to imaginary swing voters who only exist in memos drafted by billionaire-funded D.C. think tanks.
I'm running for Congress because I believe the working class in this country deserves a party and a candidate that will **fight like hell** for them.
---

I'm a working class dad from a working-class district. I know what it means to budget between groceries, childcare, and medical bills, and I know the Democratic Party won't win people like us back with another slate of careerists who think, _" if you can't beat 'em join 'em"_. We win when we're clear about what we believe, who we're fighting for, and who we're fighting against. This campaign is part of a broader movement to stand in solidarity with working people for truth and economic justice. I'm not waiting for permission from overpaid out of touch consultants. I'm not receiving support from billionaire donors. That is why I need **you** in this fight with me now. clean_body: | | Peter, I'm going to level with you and tell you what most Democrats are too scared to say out loud... Voters don't trust us anymore, and quite frankly they haven't been given many reasons to. The Democratic brand is in serious trouble. It's not because Americans love Republicans. They really don't. We're living under the most unpopular Republican presidency in history. The problem is that the Democratic Party isn't offering any real alternatives. Too many Democrats are afraid to lead. They offer timid critiques, talk to lobbyists and mega donors, and hide behind "bipartisanship" while working families drown in rising costs, climate disasters, and disappearing civil liberties. My opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, is the embodiment of that failed thinking. Marie wants you to believe she's some kind of common-sense moderate but when it's time to fight the hardest, she votes with Donald Trump's agenda again and again. She backed the Laken Riley Act , which laid the legal groundwork for Trump's mass deportation campaign. She voted for the SAVE Act , a voter suppression bill cooked up by MAGA Republicans to disenfranchise millions of American women. She parrots Republican talking points about immigrants and fentanyl, and she's refused to stand up to Speaker Mike Johnson while he pushes the biggest tax giveaway for billionaires in a generation. And now? While Trump's Education Secretary is holding $137 million hostage from Washington schools , Marie is nowhere to be found. Every Democratic Representative from Washington State signed a letter demanding the release of those funds. Every single one except Marie Gluesenkamp Perez . That money supports after-school programs, teacher training, and critical help for families like mine. It's life-changing support and she chose to betray our working class families. I'm not here to rubber-stamp MAGA-lite policies or water down our values so we can appeal to imaginary swing voters who only exist in memos drafted by billionaire-funded D.C. think tanks. I'm running for Congress because I believe the working class in this country deserves a party and a candidate that will fight like hell for them. I'm a working class dad from a working-class district. I know what it means to budget between groceries, childcare, and medical bills, and I know the Democratic Party won't win people like us back with another slate of careerists who think, " if you can't beat 'em join 'em". We win when we're clear about what we believe, who we're fighting for, and who we're fighting against. This campaign is part of a broader movement to stand in solidarity with working people for truth and economic justice. I'm not waiting for permission from overpaid out of touch consultants. I'm not receiving support from billionaire donors. That is why I need you in this fight with me now. We've got this shot to prove that bold, honest, working-class leadership still has a place in Washington. Let's not waste it. Let's Heal Washington! Brent | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [_**pitch in to my friend Mark Warner’s reelection campaign,**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111829433/558515981/-2079073387?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kaine_250720_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmYwOTFkOC1hZTY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DofK-sEwuUXBjRu9PtS5a2jPBe9B5kxqhPMJRFPmYXY=) but first, I want to tell you why I’m asking.

I know that it’s a difficult time right now. Americans are reeling from the onslaught of punishing actions by President Trump and his cronies. That’s why one of the most important things we can do right now to hold Trump accountable is establish a stronger opposition that can fight back against this extreme administration.

**That starts with reelecting Senator Warner, taking back the Senate, and disrupting the GOP trifecta.**

This won’t be easy. Republicans have made Mark a target. They believe they can take back his seat and expand their majority in the Senate — which means Mark needs to be prepared for their billionaires to put up a $50 or $100 million superPAC against him.

If his campaign falls short of his July fundraising goal (or any goal over the next 16 months, for that matter), he won’t have the resources he needs to fight back, win, and hold this important seat for Democrats.

Honestly, Derek, I could think of a hundred more reasons it’s important we back Senator Warner. But honestly, the biggest reason is because I trust him to always have the best interests of all Americans at heart. Amidst all the chaos and corruption in Washington, he continues to lead the fight to stop Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda. He continues to stand up and speak out when the administration’s actions threaten your rights, your freedoms, or your bank accounts.

Peter,
I wanted to take a second and introduce myself as the new campaign manager for Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo’s re-election campaign.

name: Liz Cheney
subject: Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | Dear Peter,

My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for defending our democracy and our Constitution.

I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress.

Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines as we continue to protect and secure the future of our democracy.

We all must look beyond party and support people like Zoe who will defend the Constitution, someone we know will do the right thing. _We need good, smart, honest and honorable people in elected office._

[**_With your help we can make sure Zoe has the resources needed to stay in Congress and continue the important work of defending our Constitution. Please join me in supporting her and contributing $10 today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111829729/558517113/-1467160713?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-20_LIZ_ZOL_ES-27863_RS&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzFhYjdjZS1iMjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3le476Vlj83sqBc67Ry6rmFQ1ihbuJmBJBBOSld4q_U=)

I hope I can count on you to join me. [**_We need to support and stand with Zoe now!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111829730/558517114/-1467160713?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-20_LIZ_ZOL_ES-27863_RS&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzFhYjdjZS1iMjY1LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3le476Vlj83sqBc67Ry6rmFQ1ihbuJmBJBBOSld4q_U=)

Best,

Liz Cheney

# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Reader,I'm pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column. In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country - **and there are many.** Our nation has lost its way. Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead.
---
| | [ JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ → ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9fd9f2ec78b34ebfb3635fb1e666a16b&_e=UPRGpRj0iKCF6tvVxPr-SFBzmmVjiFK4_Dae62DmSOvh0-xn3TMReUXie6iETmK6LlgKeLrsdwq-Fu3EwgDM1DOl_8lxgbGoiljj1YHTJo_oIVTB-R6iSzsRSOGJhtFq7R_VckK7yXEp5ITeH8-Zb249rI5nU-PoLNuOS7P8wDojFwDHqWMeJG3iuo7-zSlRlhCPTKEWY2dwiV6AAbuVHU7zx444UaiNt0tOVFxaT2MGH6ijEhCFNfGa7nnQ_EwqVYhpLJTcXbn15HWw4iRMpPSOa-Uc4gtkw-RWZQngmFBe6O5xprGJNs77yABZw88QVH-9WaC3NrCrbj8fnytvF7oRyECPHDcQ7F2LBLnGuRvsDxq4H_3AxMomMBZvj3PqMCFN2vzcduqi1Zz-r-xecvjOF_BEb-1gTrjQKjO4_fqpInol8Gfz3haF_h8LOAV034Xla7gAPm3Tf419QQXF4WySzN3F50PRPDQODJgNkDdYgRZmkVYlyzz8Qc0IBrRmOzfc0AX2Jfc4NHJBOJpwsuHI70c0i1jDOcURlMYfZsg8GOxGQKAnlvXxgKUbW32cV5O3FzlxxCBSyKqEWiqoOFHfm4mvXd3ukolfAbub8Qk%3D)
---
| | But it's the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I've never seen it so bad. For this reason, **I 've chosen The New York Sun as a partner.**It's a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years. It's a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values. It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.It remains our nation's most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of "paper of record" but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens. Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.**To win, we need you to join us.** To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America. Membership starts at just 1 cent per day.

# [Superman: Super woke? Or is Hollywood finally done preaching to us?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=168333110&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4MzMzMTEwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMwNTA2NDUsImV4cCI6MTc1NTY0MjY0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MnfSK5sBkcsX1qKHTjUsfif7ciznw_d9KYmPKJH-xQ0)
### Another Hollywood woke joke? See for yourself...
| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---
| Jul 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=168333110&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4MzMzMTEwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzA1MDY0NSwiZXhwIjoxNzU1NjQyNjQ1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kerQ-4HiWrpkkg9r9lzO-OL-BlvqAmfwvJSifhzAAb4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=168333110&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4MzMzMTEwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMwNTA2NDUsImV4cCI6MTc1NTY0MjY0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MnfSK5sBkcsX1qKHTjUsfif7ciznw_d9KYmPKJH-xQ0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
