| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/superman-super-woke-or-is-hollywood?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a4320bc3-b142-44ab-9b61-cd28eb78bae8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There was major buzz surrounding the release of the highly-anticipated summer blockbuster _Superman_ , though many have expressed fear that the movie's kryptonite could be the usual Hollywood woke preaching that has ruined so many films recently.
The movie, directed by James Gunn, most known for his work on films like _Guardians of the Galaxy_ and _Scooby-Doo_ , came under fire after he told **[The Sunday Times](https://substack.com/redirect/594f0bc8-ea42-485c-9ece-1d89d658002e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , "I mean, Superman is the story of America...An immigrant that came from other places and populated the country, but for me it is mostly a story that says basic human kindness is a value and is something we have lost."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Z1gS9YfCkn4hNN9HO42QXJOk_qxT1H2HAqzjBUXrR3I?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168333110)
Gunn also said, "Yes, it's about politics," when talking about the film, but said so in relation to a specific scene where two characters discuss Superman's actions in terms of the fictional plot.
Gunn's "immigrant" comment (despite it being true) and past history of anti-Trump sentiments sparked concern among **[conservatives](https://substack.com/redirect/9a6252a6-c097-489c-95f9-6b81a1101eba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/9a6252a6-c097-489c-95f9-6b81a1101eba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)\- of another modern classic being utterly eviscerated by Hollywood's seemingly endless woke patronization and overly preachy politics that tarnish countless films and television today.
This has been an ongoing phenomenon in Hollywood for some time. The COVID-19 pandemic caused a downward spiral of movie attendance globally, with **[theatrical revenue dropping from 43% to 15% in 2020.](https://substack.com/redirect/27d1fd87-e43c-4da7-8732-f2fa1de9701c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Producing perpetual "woke" releases, Hollywood has struggled to put out films that have managed to yield high-grossing profits while not pissing off middle America by talking down to them and scolding them for their values. Besides some exceptions like the epic summer of _Top Gun 2,_ or movies with innovative marketing campaigns, like _Barbie_ and _Oppenheimer_ , much of the Hollywood landscape has been **[riddled with preachy flops](https://substack.com/redirect/06126c1f-5e17-4ce9-9b86-4a3f1ab3d4cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** like Disney's Snow White remake, for example, that received pre-release hate after painful interviews with its lead bashing her own character, ultimately **[losing Disney about $115 million.](https://substack.com/redirect/a072b91f-1639-4fab-977a-c2ed30b70c18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fe0471f7-bc0b-4221-8d2c-f85bdb8aa19d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thus, Gunn's comments garnered so much attention, even President Donald Trump himself weighed in:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac60d19e-9cc4-4ca1-8136-4d8559b72811?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Others also took to social media, saying that the plot involving two fictional countries at war, Boravia and Jarhanpur, were blatant statements about either Israel and Palestine (the statement being pro-Palestine), or Russia and Ukraine (pro-Ukraine).
**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Sponsored by AMAC](https://substack.com/redirect/064fa681-c654-4de6-8d7d-35903f08ef7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Tired of AARP? There's a Better Option - And It's FREE](https://substack.com/redirect/064fa681-c654-4de6-8d7d-35903f08ef7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/064fa681-c654-4de6-8d7d-35903f08ef7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch.
AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a **[FREE membership](https://substack.com/redirect/064fa681-c654-4de6-8d7d-35903f08ef7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached.
With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including:
* **Money-saving discounts** on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials
* The **AMAC Magazine** , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective
* Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more!
* A chance to get involved through **AMAC Action** , their grassroots advocacy network

Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started.
👉 **[Join the movement today and claim your free membership here:](https://substack.com/redirect/064fa681-c654-4de6-8d7d-35903f08ef7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Claim My Free Membership](https://substack.com/redirect/064fa681-c654-4de6-8d7d-35903f08ef7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
No pressure. No politics you don't agree with. Just real benefits for real Americans.
* * *
**(Piece continued)**
However, after the movie's release, it is clear the interpretation of Gunn's comments were not really representative of the film at all, meaning it is not, by popular definition "woke," and maybe, just maybe, symbolizes a shift from the political treachery that has been suffocating Hollywood for too long.
The overarching theme of the film truly is one thing: human kindness; and Gunn's approach is to incorporate his jaunty, sometimes quirky style to create a Superman that exudes the best parts of being human, all with an optimistic, Superman eye on the prevailing _goodness_ of humanity, and Earth. At one moment, Superman literally saves a squirrel.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Z1gS9YfCkn4hNN9HO42QXJOk_qxT1H2HAqzjBUXrR3I?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168333110)
If the film were to be a truly woke disaster, it would most definitely not be receiving **[83% on Rotten Tomatoes](https://substack.com/redirect/1cc8fa8a-e884-47dc-befb-ab59afc046ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a 93% audience approval rate, considering right-wing ideologies are currently in the majority.
Of course the plot involved international conflict, was rooted in modern day social media culture, and centered around a main character who is famously known as being an alien and immigrant, which, let's be absolutely clear, is _not_ bad, and is actually foundational to the America we know today. Joe Biden's disintegration of structured immigration policy, or lack of consideration for Americans and immigrants alike in terms of long-term propriety, done so seemingly for the Left's political gain *ahem, **[Gavin Newsom's ](https://substack.com/redirect/518eb0bd-0751-426b-9c85-c43e9f9ca817?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**recent "look like him" comments *ahem*, is the issue. But we digress. However, none of these factors supersede the real takeaway from the film, which is what a summer blockbuster is supposed to be: fun.
This is not a conversation about whether or not Gunn's adaptation bested Christopher Reeve in 1978, or if the zany side-characters in this latest installment proved too distracting. This is one based on the claims that Superman is all about making statements on American politics. Which, according to even **[Ben Shapiro](https://substack.com/redirect/4a96fe3e-833f-4d48-9cee-5748826a7a1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , who vocalizes his disdain for James Gunn, does not meaningfully take a political position or depict seriously a real world conflict on which it aims to make a commentary.
Really, Superman has always been representative, in a paradoxical way, of the everyman, highlighting how we each are super in our own right. This backs Shapiro's argument in the sense that perhaps there are all these interpretations of what Superman "meant" when really, these interpretations are just the personal reflections of a certain person's beliefs and experiences.
So to all those who hesitated to get tickets for the Superman film based only on the fear that it would be yet another slop from the slew of Hollywood's supercilious politics, fear not. It really is just a superhero movie - nay, a hero movie about family, adventure, and goodness - something we all need more of.
* * *

clean_body: Another Hollywood woke joke? See for yourself... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Another Hollywood woke joke? See for yourself... | | | Jul 20 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- There was major buzz surrounding the release of the highly-anticipated summer blockbuster Superman , though many have expressed fear that the movie's kryptonite could be the usual Hollywood woke preaching that has ruined so many films recently. The movie, directed by James Gunn, most known for his work on films like Guardians of the Galaxy and Scooby-Doo , came under fire after he told , "I mean, Superman is the story of America...An immigrant that came from other places and populated the country, but for me it is mostly a story that says basic human kindness is a value and is something we have lost." Gunn also said, "Yes, it's about politics," when talking about the film, but said so in relation to a specific scene where two characters discuss Superman's actions in terms of the fictional plot. Gunn's "immigrant" comment (despite it being true) and past history of anti-Trump sentiments sparked concern among \- of another modern classic being utterly eviscerated by Hollywood's seemingly endless woke patronization and overly preachy politics that tarnish countless films and television today. This has been an ongoing phenomenon in Hollywood for some time. The COVID-19 pandemic caused a downward spiral of movie attendance globally, with Producing perpetual "woke" releases, Hollywood has struggled to put out films that have managed to yield high-grossing profits while not pissing off middle America by talking down to them and scolding them for their values. Besides some exceptions like the epic summer of Top Gun 2, or movies with innovative marketing campaigns, like Barbie and Oppenheimer , much of the Hollywood landscape has been like Disney's Snow White remake, for example, that received pre-release hate after painful interviews with its lead bashing her own character, ultimately Thus, Gunn's comments garnered so much attention, even President Donald Trump himself weighed in: | | ---|---|--- Others also took to social media, saying that the plot involving two fictional countries at war, Boravia and Jarhanpur, were blatant statements about either Israel and Palestine (the statement being pro-Palestine), or Russia and Ukraine (pro-Ukraine). A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below) | | ---|---|--- If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch. AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached. With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including: Money-saving discounts on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials The AMAC Magazine , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more! A chance to get involved through AMAC Action , their grassroots advocacy network Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started. 👉 No pressure. No politics you don't agree with. Just real benefits for real Americans. (Piece continued) However, after the movie's release, it is clear the interpretation of Gunn's comments were not really representative of the film at all, meaning it is not, by popular definition "woke," and maybe, just maybe, symbolizes a shift from the political treachery that has been suffocating Hollywood for too long. The overarching theme of the film truly is one thing: human kindness; and Gunn's approach is to incorporate his jaunty, sometimes quirky style to create a Superman that exudes the best parts of being human, all with an optimistic, Superman eye on the prevailing goodness of humanity, and Earth. At one moment, Superman literally saves a squirrel. If the film were to be a truly woke disaster, it would most definitely not be receiving with a 93% audience approval rate, considering right-wing ideologies are currently in the majority. Of course the plot involved international conflict, was rooted in modern day social media culture, and centered around a main character who is famously known as being an alien and immigrant, which, let's be absolutely clear, is not bad, and is actually foundational to the America we know today. Joe Biden's disintegration of structured immigration policy, or lack of consideration for Americans and immigrants alike in terms of long-term propriety, done so seemingly for the Left's political gain ahem, "look like him" comments ahem, is the issue. But we digress. However, none of these factors supersede the real takeaway from the film, which is what a summer blockbuster is supposed to be: fun. This is not a conversation about whether or not Gunn's adaptation bested Christopher Reeve in 1978, or if the zany side-characters in this latest installment proved too distracting. This is one based on the claims that Superman is all about making statements on American politics. Which, according to even , who vocalizes his disdain for James Gunn, does not meaningfully take a political position or depict seriously a real world conflict on which it aims to make a commentary. Really, Superman has always been representative, in a paradoxical way, of the everyman, highlighting how we each are super in our own right. This backs Shapiro's argument in the sense that perhaps there are all these interpretations of what Superman "meant" when really, these interpretations are just the personal reflections of a certain person's beliefs and experiences. So to all those who hesitated to get tickets for the Superman film based only on the fear that it would be yet another slop from the slew of Hollywood's supercilious politics, fear not. It really is just a superhero movie - nay, a hero movie about family, adventure, and goodness - something we all need more of. | | POLL Have you seen Superman yet? | ? ? ? ? * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. Friends,I was just in Templeton, a town of 8,000 people in the Central Coast. On July 4th, arsonists burned down the historic Templeton Feed & Grain, **family-owned and operated since 1946.**

The criminals threw fireworks on the roof.

This wasn’t just a building. It was a family’s livelihood. What’s more, the family lost their insurance because California Democrats have destroyed the insurance market.

What happened is a perfect example of what the radical left is doing to our state:
* Out-of-control crime
* No insurance
* Honest families and businesses under attack

If you’re over the age of 50, man or woman...
And you’re struggling with pain in your joints, loss of mobility, or loose, sagging skin that’s robbing you of your confidence...
You’ve probably heard about collagen and its incredible anti-aging benefits.
But if we’ve learned anything (especially this time of year), it’s that it’s vital to do our own research when it comes to our health.
So before you run to the store and grab the first jar of collagen you see, [one health expert is urging anyone over 50 to see these 5 collagen warnings](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e31513008/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjA/LbmNsamtCUzc5WQ/qP3NpZD0xMzYwJnB1Yj0yNDA1NzMmYzE9MjAyNTA3MjAtQUZXUi0xNDUwJmMyPVREVjNBbHRTTDQmYzM9QUZXUg/gaH1sHA/s2icc3a4abd).

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s “lock him up” rhetoric has become real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Hi — this is Adam Schiff. Ohio House Dems said I could reach out with this urgent message: **Donald Trump went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.** Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. clean_body: Protecting students, parents, and public schools from funding cuts through state legislative action has never been more important. | | | | | ---|--- UPDATE: The Supreme Court will allow Trump to proceed with mass layoffs at the Department of Education, Justice Sotomayor calls the decision “indefensible.” This decision marks another devastating blow to our democracy and the American people. State legislative action to stand up for students, parents, and public schools facing funding cuts has never been more important. With the federal government under Trump’s control, state legislatures are the only line of defense between the GOP's wicked agenda and access to the quality education every American child deserves. Only Democrats at the state level will stand up for public education across the country in 2025 and beyond.
